Friend,

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
We see through the charges against former President Trump.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=87e4a65a70&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# It’s Time to Overhaul the Justice Department
---
|
---
| | |
---
| **Fellow Patriot,** Like so many of you, I was disturbed to learn yesterday that the Biden Administration’s Justice Department is pursuing hyper-politicized charges against former President Donald Trump. With an FBI informant now disclosing that the Biden family has received $10 million in bribes, it is especially infuriating that, instead of taking accountability for his corruption, President Joe Biden is choosing to direct the might of the Justice Department to persecute his political opponents. [**STAND AGAINST THE CORRUPT BIDEN JUSTICE DEPARTMENT**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=2755f2fbc6&e=0be619cbaa)
---
Even though former President Trump and I are both running for the GOP nomination for president in 2024, I strongly oppose any attempt by a president to weaponize the federal government against a past or future competitor. Bottom line: the American people deserve better than a two-tiered system of justice that vilifies one side and covers for the other. Restoring the federal government to its constitutional limits should be a top priority for anyone running for president in 2024. The next man or woman in the White House must be committed to overhauling the Department of Justice to ensure equal treatment under the law. As president, I would do just that. Standing with you, **Larry Elder
**GOP Candidate for President [**P.S. With so many forces working against conservatives these days, our campaign is counting on patriots like you to spread our message of a new Golden Age for America. Will you stand with me against the CORRUPT Biden Justice Department?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=15b821b556&e=0be619cbaa)

subject: act now to help safeguard abortion access in the South
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

We need to ACT NOW to stop an authoritarian
takeover of Virginia — and the rollback of women’s reproductive rights —
on June 20th.

That's why Our Revolution is going all-out to prevent right wing GOP Gov.
Glenn Youngkin from picking up the ONE seat he needs to take control of
the state Senate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8714?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia&t=1011&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Can we count on you to chip in now to fight back against Republican
authoritarianism in Virginia on June 20th?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8715?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia&t=1012&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8716?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia&t=1013&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8717?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia&t=1014&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8718?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia&t=1015&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8719?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia&t=1016&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8714?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia&t=1017&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

Just ONE seat in the Senate will make the difference on critical policies
— like protecting reproductive health care — and hold extremism in check.

That’s why we’re working hard to elect candidates like Ben Litchfield for
Virginia State Senate. Ben knows first-hand about poverty, hunger, and low
wages, and he will be a fierce advocate for working people.

Early in Ben’s childhood, his family was ripped apart by the opioid
crisis. His father, like many blue-collar workers, got hurt on the job and
became addicted to prescription painkillers. When those became too
expensive, he started using heroin. Being raised by a single mother shaped
Ben’s views on issues like paid family leave, childcare subsidies, and the
challenges that working parents face balancing work and home.

“One of my earliest memories is standing in line at the food pantry with
my mother. But, like many working families, giving up was never an
option,” Ben recalls.

“I am running for Virginia Senate because for too many, the American Dream
feels like a broken promise. Despite a booming economy, it's hard for
workers to find a job that pays a living wage, for families to afford
housing in the communities where they work, and for our kids to receive a
first-rate education.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8714?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia&t=1018&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Early voting is underway and election day is June 20th! Make a donation
today to help us mobilize voters for Ben and the rest of our progressive
slate to stave off rightwing extremism and win real progressive policy
change in Virginia.

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia.JTJk0p&t=1007&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia.M1GeMF&t=1008&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2023 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia.NVZEGT&t=1009&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_FR_Virginia_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Virginia.jzpjc-&t=1010&akid=4360%2E5885482%2ESBMEYT ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

[Biden Moves to Improve Opportunities for Military Spouses](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvslbpvnsnn8cuggn7ehnnoo0i5aounaebmtg88o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpjm6o76c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1hmf834suh39c9l6eqqbdtjekr7b8bnmmibbc3ieupnadd7m1o7fcjhelpr9cbkmkr7b8pnm9qqbd5hmion8cjkumj70ttlepqjctt24no)
At Fort Liberty, North Carolina, today, President Joe Biden signed an executive order designed to strengthen economic opportunities for military and veteran spouses, caregivers and survivors. "This new executive order establishes the most comprehensive set of administrative actions in our nation's history to support the economic security of military families, veterans, spouses, caregivers and survivors," Biden said at a large gathering of military personal and spouses at Fort Liberty.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zskla58a1ldfv7p6ugonb6t7knpd424mpak3cl50_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpjm6o76c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1hmf834suh39c9l6eqqbdtjekr7b8bnmmibbc3ieupnadd7m1o7fcjhelpr9cbkmkr7b8pnm9qqbd5hmion8cjkumj70ttlepqjctt24no)

Peter,
A new list of the most vulnerable members of Congress was just published – and my name is on it.

As a freshman Congresswoman who won with just 51.1% of the vote, I have to say the fact I’m under attack doesn’t really surprise me.

The Democrats in Washington see my seat as an easy pickup to restore their majority.

_But this is about so much more than just a majority to me.
_
This is about serving you, giving you a better quality of life, and restoring beauty and peace to Oregon’s 5th district.

I think the majority of politicians forget that districts like mine aren’t just chess pieces in some game.

_They’re communities and homes filled with real people who are really impacted by the decisions made in Washington.
_
_But I haven’t forgotten that.
_
I haven’t forgotten that you elected me to fix our mounting crime and drug problem, fight for parental rights in schools, and prioritize American citizens by securing our border.

_And I’m working hard every day to get these things done for you, Peter.
_
But that doesn’t leave me with a lot of time to fundraise or engage with these political attacks.

So I’m counting on you to help me get the fundraising out of the way so that I can keep my focus on delivering results for the people of Oregon.

clean_body: | | | | I need to keep my focus on work, can you handle this one? Peter, A new list of the most vulnerable members of Congress was just published – and my name is on it. As a freshman Congresswoman who won with just 51.1% of the vote, I have to say the fact I’m under attack doesn’t really surprise me. The Democrats in Washington see my seat as an easy pickup to restore their majority. But this is about so much more than just a majority to me. This is about serving you, giving you a better quality of life, and restoring beauty and peace to Oregon’s 5th district. | I think the majority of politicians forget that districts like mine aren’t just chess pieces in some game. They’re communities and homes filled with real people who are really impacted by the decisions made in Washington. But I haven’t forgotten that. I haven’t forgotten that you elected me to fix our mounting crime and drug problem, fight for parental rights in schools, and prioritize American citizens by securing our border. And I’m working hard every day to get these things done for you, Peter. But that doesn’t leave me with a lot of time to fundraise or engage with these political attacks. So I’m counting on you to help me get the fundraising out of the way so that I can keep my focus on delivering results for the people of Oregon. Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- =

body:

I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze5uq4ajvg1es4e9eogjecnvh9v5rbnoml00h2g8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie8oj2cjh2bs)

---

If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. [**And I want to send you a copy of _The American Response to the Great Reset_ RIGHT AWAY. Please claim your book right now with a gift to Turning Point USA of ANY AMOUNT, even just five dollars.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlpdc9j7fnrt57bu49fg01dffrc8hp98ae8nosho_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie8oj2cjh2bs) Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America,

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25153%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mKBpRGgj2hRAliTWj%2fYa6A&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25154%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QiphbYkDGSm5DJm5jXnWqA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25165%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K%2bmOXFkxI8deGURhgJKMfA&sysid=1)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcrueienhd3bbvpj1n3boeutd1uug7k8onnjcasg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie2o76c9h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs4im1g65oq25saalt1imorg3hun6qsd1p15ne1o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie2o76c9h2bs)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---

---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlshan3uefmlkmh3roogfqml5f3q444bobn4om7g_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie2o72cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi3rrri7uft790i5v18t9dbvmaj2bp3o7tg89b00_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie2o72cdh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9p0cogij62u35nm3lkoau2i69hns95lupo72jv8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie2o72cdh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zodl2g79ata64vqseri8sm0m0hgef98cnis3rb6o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34cjim8or246h22sh2s8i66o73cpie2o72cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpfc2ad7kdgujj15dle6134h2n6h6hcs1nc96i0o_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie2o72cdh2bs)_

body:

Join us in standing up against Governor Cooper's assault on school choice and ensuring that every family has access to quality education. name: American Action News
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from The Hollywood Conservative is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztstjeub9uqjq61qsmjjjq9v3q0v6b11uie2paso_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob0s1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7lee81fdca87s31mnq7t0ovg4h213gfqob5org_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob0s1h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfnf0gfn44bvjbrl5bavub1hji7cn047c7o7hnbo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob0s1h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgu3qbml36qhhncs0lq2js436v7c8c3lpc2p274g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68p34sdjmcoh1k8gn48n24hhm1or6cjge2o70c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z97p9cqah727922cp8kmukcolkun460d32r23jao_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob0s1h2bs)_

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsdgunnre372v0ijrrisudhq56ot36n1an59q4i8_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob1cdh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj1ur7h2bnqnfasgl3l3qg8p2t3nn2d0ghkr4rug_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob1cdh2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmf13fcrpjh9maoccug6jk35r958407a9vaau0g0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob1cdh2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl03jtkmmq67ani335j20o03c0i0ijll91so7l88_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob1cdh2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlgk0qfv8nc1t9m17vc7re9ochcir7r2k3bqblf0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob1cdh2bs)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmes40flnae7fdjvf8qrn0vvddk5ra0u3ecjdr38_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob1cdh2bs)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z52qfop7a7sul1ovtf6e6a5di6p5kk4bpkk7uscg_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob1cdh2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg71dir3f0nn65rga0q678qfokti7e2smrf4sel0_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob1cdh2bs)**.

---

GOP Presidential

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbis6tfaelf1citbigbpsmiv4slrjhhtoljairh8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34chieap76c8gq48bi4bh28or0sdj69o71c5hm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlh6ies150lb5d03dtg2o35p4ah3827qdlj7kvoo_rp22sh2s8i66o73cpie1ob1cdh2bs)_

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70765%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gc%2fmHJGTTBWXCkQJm2vFVA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70766%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tly1w5%2fhuMmfBhUe9dSYEQ&sysid=1)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70767%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ljiZ6m4frkCZAZ7SBfU17g&sysid=1)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70768%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ByCMldURl6Vr%2bELia674QQ&sysid=1)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70769%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=40nQ0GVBQO%2fmr92%2f3JO5qw&sysid=1)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70760%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5m%2b%2f6E1HXGuB7cbKScqQ4A&sysid=1)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70761%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bSoamwFdDSUJ72rl6n%2fKYA&sysid=1)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70762%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2NZ4PGu3UwQfVNMr9Q3TbQ&sysid=1)**.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have. In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me. It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. And leadership has a price.” I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me. That’s where you come in. ? When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting! A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced. name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkpbadd2sfoid9mi7e2bghivcka43d64g1bilep0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g60oj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3rtldngqop7u5obk1rqkqjkjnkj9j7j3qlck648_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g60oj2cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg80lt2l2tdabkl7lrh75eekiv6jlqlip3cmam08_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g60oj2cph2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
We value your input.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp8e75afl8c0vqa7c47ptgrn96151lvr5fk6o62o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g60oj2cph2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z520cs8b0m63gorq0n920ds4rupcne92r1v1pdb0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g60oj2cph2bs)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

ICYMI News

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWcR_-fD5N

You are an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly. You
love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWcR_-fD5N

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

Do you
believe the American education system is failing millions of
young Americans?
YES
NO

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand:

WHAT
the Constitution says
HOW
it relates to current issues and events
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61901362:WcR_-fD5N:m:3:2532013465:6AC6D88D68884C4EB622DEDEB2F20BFD:r

For our
children,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:

body:
A BIDEN-APPOINTED FEDERAL PROSECUTOR HAS INDICTED ME.

| | | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25174%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=POBgn2YdROu2BnZDytDCQQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
We are watching our Republic DIE before our very eyes.
The Biden-appointed Special Counsel has **INDICTED** me in yet another witch hunt regarding documents that I had the RIGHT to declassify as President of the United States.
This witch hunt began when the FBI RAIDED my home and then staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
**This is nothing but a disgusting act of Election Interference by the ruling party to ELIMINATE its opposition and amass total control over our country.**
The Deep State thought they had destroyed our campaign when a Soros-backed prosecutor indicted and even ARRESTED me earlier this year.
_But then, we SHOCKED them as our campaign grew even stronger ... _
...We broke fundraising records. 3 independent polls showed us beating Joe Biden by 7 POINTS. In fact, polls show I’m the _ONLY_ Republican who can beat Crooked Joe.
**So, after a _state_ prosecutor _failed_ to break us, the Deep State sharpened their attacks and unleashed a FEDERAL prosecutor to TRY and take us down.**
_But let me be as clear as possible:_
**No matter how viciously they attack me, I will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to the radical Left - and I will NEVER end this presidential campaign that puts YOU first.**
With YOUR support, we will once again surge even higher and prove that our America First movement truly is UNSTOPPABLE.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu7gb96eqia74l2it5pksa9r05ad62t23jfnohho_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6co71c3h2bs)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5jbscq6uth6hm2thop6rohb5isnm8qmdenh33m8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6co71c3h2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9b7nh923240si8civck3ou592vfb5j9r1unrsq8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6co71c3h2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z43aiiu4j47mbvk2mh7n6kui95dvie0ms7ug0lf0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6co71c3h2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7lblvv0jhe0r0cha36pe962bvhqnge0v31hv468_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6co71c3h2bs)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt36tcqkf5u52o97ao7ne32619314o3lc8uckgqg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6co71c3h2bs)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq3v5a165a06dbanovjvi07re5rigdedsnhab0l0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6co71c3h2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zckf064g1dv6blsd99nbetbq60a2occjok4p18r0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6co71c3h2bs)**.

clean_body: 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | Dear Friend, Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. You've seen my work. Most Americans have. In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me. It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. And leadership has a price." I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=423bf1b8e929430eabe312f18ee2ae08&_e=VFrY0PowJo9p4zIoIaiUD0-PDWaB8WyTTOuP4nlp9h0xNcjMVwZG8ZKbQ7EPfq8W3bgUnMZKLrCKmS-X_zo5YtBp9EKwcleW9XY_pfYr0BNR_9VptGsRytLMQy4Cgc_fVDR9snIc0QlZuhK3erMPccspEwVsn4x2YiFjsBMcX1rLOFgpxs20M-AkEoDBDLvcRM9YYgGZBQnsXrjKpm04Wes4b9ouxVuSjTfVTZU-O-R6SWaJdT012abWS_SXK8GFuu84fHEBMrlUm9ydiX7mFSRWFSM-VgtCBD35pwi798uM87xa49SAqmCC5sXTdr0YF38OBDYcdH1x_xc0g8ZieExWj5lney9_RgJ-DM3m4zGA-N6ZIx0YWgaSt0HXf_GTiyxn6q054mvduUcpOYJtidEslJt0GtEpVx_P_kKTPmQ%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=423bf1b8e929430eabe312f18ee2ae08&_e=VFrY0PowJo9p4zIoIaiUD0-PDWaB8WyTTOuP4nlp9h0xNcjMVwZG8ZKbQ7EPfq8W3bgUnMZKLrCKmS-X_zo5YtBp9EKwcleW9XY_pfYr0BNR_9VptGsRytLMQy4Cgc_fVDR9snIc0QlZuhK3erMPccspEwVsn4x2YiFjsBMcX1rLOFgpxs20M-AkEoDBDLvcRM9YYgGZBQnsXrjKpm04Wes4b9ouxVuSjTfVTZU-O-R6SWaJdT012abWS_SXK8GFxtGR1rC3GZnTJA3p0FMV4RK6gLX696DUwGb78dodWKuVEkM4yiP0KHgryANsnTNFrrgvRQOC8CzNtxrwknmCuajMrrT4KSyCvby-Qp51RszDrBAgXAAGywPLHlaAAoco8lj7DmHBPf_81696e1F4f3DMfTcSusYBhU9LoeyNLuA%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=423bf1b8e929430eabe312f18ee2ae08&_e=VFrY0PowJo9p4zIoIaiUD0-PDWaB8WyTTOuP4nlp9h0xNcjMVwZG8ZKbQ7EPfq8W3bgUnMZKLrCKmS-X_zo5YtBp9EKwcleW9XY_pfYr0BNR_9VptGsRytLMQy4Cgc_fVDR9snIc0QlZuhK3erMPccspEwVsn4x2YiFjsBMcX1rLOFgpxs20M-AkEoDBDLvcRM9YYgGZBQnsXrjKpm04Wes4b9ouxVuSjTfVTZU-O-R6SWaJdT012abWS_SXK8GF-Ws7peRUuuYXF5fA9NYs33udUfdGGtb78NZ-qz78WxhiZojZXnJywKb5Z0KBO5lfEY9JlgYPR4aGB92jgt4_VkCR7yicWMT164IPh6001azDfcxe605y5HT961gkxaIMXwHEcjNYnb3xQTBKfG5AWTMI7CL3CHX8QsoOQFfdUPI%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme. I wrote a new book, The American Response to the Great Reset , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e738db5adcc467996a0b97495666cb6&_e=IiYHvXcs0ZuRx1uGr2KsdSANybC5hW8CGgExjHSUmZfuK4u2FXMTyGIHIIqt-AQtFhVxBrpxkuhhai0Dauckjs5EIriKh0F7RDcddZYAPokp8HC48KGLmTX7jYDrZV8PR-DweL1f9gspIq_BifZVuYaeAwbFdoB52FFoCJyaYaEF1jfneYII7ElOqyOAvjMfxSKs4wLE2spVhOpw_9duBe0AHfOV8xz66uXHktbylpdI_W0PEU80PPH6HqyhOrXzXx0VwIIWVL5ZJhIZL9Qs00BRDyy6l5p2fyR6V55xS01z467lILNa0sIaSvTO_lm-KEzKLa3tfeK0I1JnGRz5QhM73M8T0ECaWulKVcwOOJ1HwraiUNRShV-olpva1qmUQ2sGPMN-ZbxsrOniigpLKiAoD-JbW4DMoGJScF16NTs%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e738db5adcc467996a0b97495666cb6&_e=IiYHvXcs0ZuRx1uGr2KsdSANybC5hW8CGgExjHSUmZfuK4u2FXMTyGIHIIqt-AQtFhVxBrpxkuhhai0Dauckjs5EIriKh0F7RDcddZYAPokp8HC48KGLmTX7jYDrZV8PR-DweL1f9gspIq_BifZVuYaeAwbFdoB52FFoCJyaYaEF1jfneYII7ElOqyOAvjMfxSKs4wLE2spVhOpw_9duBe0AHfOV8xz66uXHktbylpdI_W0PEU80PPH6HqyhOrXz-KaHIG_rTr8YgCSPaKNF36brRjCrcKNc9A5Ks01E17qrvVXVNuYjCj_11-VhHczbnxkDDzBM3nbihu7sbQ63xCH6U5T_ErPcYErEYE9L4pYgKByCHS0JURu2Jv8h9H6zOt-ULY91sIXqP9fxQORnjMz_76GuFX9V0GCVkNYf6qU%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." clean_body: Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of Imprimis --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below? Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... . . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. Why is this? Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and teach millions has never been more urgently needed. That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Never in a zillion years.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I am going to continue to use my voice to advocate for big, structural changes that help working people. I need to know if you're by my side in this fight. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64622049/410691401/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ14H_EGR_E_20230610_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmVkN2Y1ZS05NzA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoIS_b456h-nKL5CXSVL2n0_PqbqiMkrWVv4mKZcMT8=&emci=bfed7f5e-9707-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c2ed7f5e-9707-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
I never in a zillion years thought I'd be a U.S. senator. But my life has had a lot of twists and turns, just like a lot of people's. I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class. After my daddy’s heart attack, my family came within an inch from losing our house, but my mother got a minimum wage job at Sears that saved our family. I dropped out of college at 19 to get married, but got a second chance at a public college that cost $50 a semester and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher. I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I fought to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to protect people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations. The CFPB has already returned more than $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been cheated. After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them — and I beat him. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest in jobs and our infrastructure, and to rein in student loan companies. And guess what? We got it all done. [_**But the fight to make our government work for everyone — not just the wealthy and well-connected — isn’t over. So I’m running for re-election to keep up the fight. Will you make a contribution of $15 or anything you can today to help make sure I can keep fighting for working families in the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64622050/410691402/63430846?amount=15&refcode=EMZ14H_EGR_E_20230610_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmVkN2Y1ZS05NzA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoIS_b456h-nKL5CXSVL2n0_PqbqiMkrWVv4mKZcMT8=) | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64622051/410691403/63430846?amount=15&refcode=EMZ14H_EGR_E_20230610_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmVkN2Y1ZS05NzA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoIS_b456h-nKL5CXSVL2n0_PqbqiMkrWVv4mKZcMT8=)
---
Throughout my time in Washington, I’ve learned that when you start talking about policies that help working people instead of wealthy people or big corporations, plenty of critics will be quick to tell you what you can’t do and what’s not possible.
It’s like clockwork.
Take student loan cancellation for example. Cynics said we could never put our government on the side of working-class and middle-class people who fought to get an education and are getting crushed by debt. But we got organized, we got in the fight, and we got this policy to the president’s desk.
I’ll stay in the fight to get student debt cancellation over the finish line. Because that’s a case where we still see how the rules work differently for different groups of people: Right now we have a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo, but that same system worked overnight to ensure that billion-dollar crypto firms wouldn’t lose a dime in deposits during the recent bank failures.
The difference between these two scenarios? The willingness to fight for them.
I’m in this fight all the way — and I am going to continue to use my voice to advocate for big, structural changes that help working people. I need you by my side in this fight.
[_**A contribution of $15 or anything you can will help show the naysayers that our plans — like taxing the rich, reining in big banks, and making child care affordable — have strong support. Will you please pitch in today to support my re-election and make these plans possible? The amount of grassroots contributions we receive will help demonstrate the strength of our movement — and any amount makes a powerful difference.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64622052/410691404/63430846?amount=15&refcode=EMZ14H_EGR_E_20230610_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmVkN2Y1ZS05NzA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoIS_b456h-nKL5CXSVL2n0_PqbqiMkrWVv4mKZcMT8=)
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64622053/410691405/63430846?amount=15&refcode=EMZ14H_EGR_E_20230610_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmVkN2Y1ZS05NzA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoIS_b456h-nKL5CXSVL2n0_PqbqiMkrWVv4mKZcMT8=)

clean_body: I am going to continue to use my voice to advocate for big, structural changes that help working people. I need to know if you're by my side in this fight. | | | I never in a zillion years thought I'd be a U.S. senator. But my life has had a lot of twists and turns, just like a lot of people's. I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class. After my daddy’s heart attack, my family came within an inch from losing our house, but my mother got a minimum wage job at Sears that saved our family. I dropped out of college at 19 to get married, but got a second chance at a public college that cost $50 a semester and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher. I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I fought to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to protect people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations. The CFPB has already returned more than $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been cheated. After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them — and I beat him. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest in jobs and our infrastructure, and to rein in student loan companies. And guess what? We got it all done. = | = Throughout my time in Washington, I’ve learned that when you start talking about policies that help working people instead of wealthy people or big corporations, plenty of critics will be quick to tell you what you can’t do and what’s not possible. It’s like clockwork. Take student loan cancellation for example. Cynics said we could never put our government on the side of working-class and middle-class people who fought to get an education and are getting crushed by debt. But we got organized, we got in the fight, and we got this policy to the president’s desk. I’ll stay in the fight to get student debt cancellation over the finish line. Because that’s a case where we still see how the rules work differently for different groups of people: Right now we have a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo, but that same system worked overnight to ensure that billion-dollar crypto firms wouldn’t lose a dime in deposits during the recent bank failures. The difference between these two scenarios? The willingness to fight for them. I’m in this fight all the way — and I am going to continue to use my voice to advocate for big, structural changes that help working people. I need you by my side in this fight. = = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

At Fort Liberty, North Carolina, today, President Joe Biden signed an executive order designed to strengthen economic opportunities for military and veteran spouses, caregivers and survivors. "This new executive order establishes the most comprehensive set of administrative actions in our nation's history to support the economic security of military families, veterans, spouses, caregivers and survivors," Biden said at a large gathering of military personal and spouses at Fort Liberty.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
We value your input.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdodm5r53gneec0ii470eik6i1b7tnu4ltelkjv0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6eob4cph2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbdnqs14otogb10v4rheu5sotpm1v0blflusqffg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5g6eob4cph2bs)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e7296f1122940bca5c06fae3665656b&_e=8_wckKuoGfux-T31uAVFCnR_z4FS6CkrS6JNWqHConwfUdaa0_fasvQV3FDR_MWQgGSQiF6jdDfz39JuGrCFyhjjHLJmqUIFEROd3M4ezyi7UNLN3z-YxVuDxiiIhjG9Fauqzw00iJzPfTBMqMAC5QvxzYNmAyOwuY7VOMIrL_Rx50_MXHzgEBw60mXXTE8DVjM4UsQEZBkB0I_A488lK6mnHPMGLC66-PFaGB7mhiT2cydJxH-Cgieg6LGBnbJvIPhyNkqlkmxNwnnyD_OG2gUa9sA7HOeNu21ROnhFmhJazRYam2G5za5yEjDSuzCBVZB0WUitGEzu6_fGBg2Z_wGqHtyI22a7-KZN51SjcIf36pXGpxjDxEXpi5PpHqQ3)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e7296f1122940bca5c06fae3665656b&_e=8_wckKuoGfux-T31uAVFCnR_z4FS6CkrS6JNWqHConwfUdaa0_fasvQV3FDR_MWQgGSQiF6jdDfz39JuGrCFyhjjHLJmqUIFEROd3M4ezyi7UNLN3z-YxVuDxiiIhjG9Fauqzw00iJzPfTBMqMAC5QvxzYNmAyOwuY7VOMIrL_Rx50_MXHzgEBw60mXXTE8DVjM4UsQEZBkB0I_A488lK6mnHPMGLC66-PFaGB7mhiRV6y0j7oWvca_A24iTcp423p9-VDE0z265DRL2V-jwi1q8cKbT6X8Z8VN3uu3GKz8YhKLxjYbFsmZfySdMeLAwFtPLqywrQoa6FRC6lop-WFob4gBe42bbUE6Zg1PvARvAaDPhi1-yBLqwumr9C1ke)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
