name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=479e96b951434736a94e4a4abccfc7b8&_e=f5Io1Ge3b6ewcQJw0PyZSJdKBwt3x8Jj2-OtjHRF2f_sLPKHA7dHwF8WA0uGzFQ9anbYeVBlaa-4yaMkDXUrRzYg55eVWX53-FZN_QV2rFuZxUssPU-CBh7FPbS0mpCHbNj1Uy9my6KNteIvS8TjbcQ_ZUGsahGT5DCLwrklahLJl_ON5h-p9cmbxGxv7EAP7lQbFII_WZTmXeTesvUwR1vbR31xc02q4w9HuBjMIfxf4JF3R3o3EJbwHrjpfQkF6nTkpYgAOKAsaepDG9YcC349rVa6fLTPflV5Zfw543Hh8lHsjhNoNzPuNlfUnnfI4VPYt5zhLCtmRVSB4fa0_iu6gAUoe9jX-OLTb8uH0ncjlnX3Fp1xMQsRKJ9PuxjE)
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=479e96b951434736a94e4a4abccfc7b8&_e=f5Io1Ge3b6ewcQJw0PyZSJdKBwt3x8Jj2-OtjHRF2f_sLPKHA7dHwF8WA0uGzFQ9anbYeVBlaa-4yaMkDXUrRzYg55eVWX53-FZN_QV2rFuZxUssPU-CBh7FPbS0mpCHbNj1Uy9my6KNteIvS8TjbcQ_ZUGsahGT5DCLwrklahLJl_ON5h-p9cmbxGxv7EAP7lQbFII_WZTmXeTesvUwR7MBiYZ0WweiClz9PHbQtZ9agCjkpdUfXwjH8tIfjfmFfQkdFnLRb_6REbiTkZa2YWqXrzxuleXwpmPnSCBCRLMtSm3s6TQfam-y4cf60uyjjDD79q95brFnqHfWWje7oGX-PmKpClwiouG4Z3kvw7pjPDWXBrGI7WpVh7QiVA0t)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=479e96b951434736a94e4a4abccfc7b8&_e=f5Io1Ge3b6ewcQJw0PyZSJdKBwt3x8Jj2-OtjHRF2f_sLPKHA7dHwF8WA0uGzFQ9anbYeVBlaa-4yaMkDXUrRzYg55eVWX53-FZN_QV2rFuZxUssPU-CBh7FPbS0mpCHbNj1Uy9my6KNteIvS8TjbcQ_ZUGsahGT5DCLwrklahLJl_ON5h-p9cmbxGxv7EAP7lQbFII_WZTmXeTesvUwR8IJIL94yfPFmwQcMOIJ7BaxJEwm4axYZsNVwPVXyybgGNAVp7YXYcCc2jeD8TefBiN962-OERSL3C6_OAkU0Pgcy2n7eZ-6F6UXrq-_jS-iToA2iscRrjJiQ4EapUhryk4HWPQI-T-VyQ9b_1l3_Ta33HsCkxzD0PYuDD05s531)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=479e96b951434736a94e4a4abccfc7b8&_e=f5Io1Ge3b6ewcQJw0PyZSJdKBwt3x8Jj2-OtjHRF2f_sLPKHA7dHwF8WA0uGzFQ9anbYeVBlaa-4yaMkDXUrRzYg55eVWX53-FZN_QV2rFuZxUssPU-CBh7FPbS0mpCHbNj1Uy9my6KNteIvS8TjbcQ_ZUGsahGT5DCLwrklahLJl_ON5h-p9cmbxGxv7EAP7lQbFII_WZTmXeTesvUwR7ilO3a5819wjX7vhtjhjeM7RnTbMAU2DVUi_cHX59-5Znq0ruJ3BFJGQ9n6nyuDbQIZ4excJ4EMQi2edfG-u2DHUaQoeKh1k2OIVddjLNFO6zhtN1hAM9Y-XK0BUbRV-QunaNqa-H4xCDhLOLUdR0pL7n5mL5BsBB6vmMNwL-mB)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=479e96b951434736a94e4a4abccfc7b8&_e=f5Io1Ge3b6ewcQJw0PyZSJdKBwt3x8Jj2-OtjHRF2f_sLPKHA7dHwF8WA0uGzFQ9anbYeVBlaa-4yaMkDXUrRzYg55eVWX53-FZN_QV2rFuZxUssPU-CBh7FPbS0mpCHbNj1Uy9my6KNteIvS8TjbcQ_ZUGsahGT5DCLwrklahLJl_ON5h-p9cmbxGxv7EAP7lQbFII_WZTmXeTesvUwR29Ew0DL8-A3zPRhcGJOSdG0n5Y30dBhvjnOA1Zf09XHfW-PPb5t0Ev6hmw2KIHJw1W2f1HfufB-YMfo-uZ1afM3oVu3B4WVSMCO5lH2pbWFBixIxzP6qqjV-32MbdY_xQmANFOPUcJxjObCFF2dpVHJ2YxTF8nTdNnEgr2PyX9k)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=479e96b951434736a94e4a4abccfc7b8&_e=f5Io1Ge3b6ewcQJw0PyZSJdKBwt3x8Jj2-OtjHRF2f_sLPKHA7dHwF8WA0uGzFQ9anbYeVBlaa-4yaMkDXUrRzYg55eVWX53-FZN_QV2rFuZxUssPU-CBh7FPbS0mpCHbNj1Uy9my6KNteIvS8TjbcQ_ZUGsahGT5DCLwrklahLJl_ON5h-p9cmbxGxv7EAP7lQbFII_WZTmXeTesvUwR1mB10xk1As_7XMfANXC5mZv8UY5O5DAC890kL0IIaE6Woa9xCYIwtyvqxtejxdur6fZ3bG___YcOA9oQ8ZknDu1ii0a8THYpFOL8ApeKHKCDgumfUmAMSwjMn5BQFADgaqndH2yZe2yPJ9weKrfq2edsL5vpv1GeaosWWbLw_i8)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=479e96b951434736a94e4a4abccfc7b8&_e=f5Io1Ge3b6ewcQJw0PyZSJdKBwt3x8Jj2-OtjHRF2f_sLPKHA7dHwF8WA0uGzFQ9anbYeVBlaa-4yaMkDXUrRzYg55eVWX53-FZN_QV2rFuZxUssPU-CBh7FPbS0mpCHbNj1Uy9my6KNteIvS8TjbcQ_ZUGsahGT5DCLwrklahLJl_ON5h-p9cmbxGxv7EAP7lQbFII_WZTmXeTesvUwR_qkec3DuObryy8bkOj0Zs0ZZIDWMZp1XM7tPB0W4dBVmnTgzG_CcapykY2aGbY27joVF4GfMi5uL-342f8qCxZ5DEtsNtKaSP3adbqKJgl6gFngnIEYebjGSYvaWzMpnq1lRWSFwH55tNOqu0dD0EcJiElbulSv7LstmuvfQOuc)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=479e96b951434736a94e4a4abccfc7b8&_e=f5Io1Ge3b6ewcQJw0PyZSJdKBwt3x8Jj2-OtjHRF2f_sLPKHA7dHwF8WA0uGzFQ9anbYeVBlaa-4yaMkDXUrRzYg55eVWX53-FZN_QV2rFuZxUssPU-CBh7FPbS0mpCHbNj1Uy9my6KNteIvS8TjbcQ_ZUGsahGT5DCLwrklahLJl_ON5h-p9cmbxGxv7EAP7lQbFII_WZTmXeTesvUwR0ifTdY69CiD6Z--b-XwAwHpvgABJVb106X2HO66CKbP1-3si7F3ZAEG1seMrtcm5dtxBQLNAQnCdrfW96W-Gasy0VzyeeY654yzYMyHZt9x6SThY1YA7iuCrHXxVjV9E_PYwgL0a4wT0EU4UMDDtc_EpnSzaLc7Bbqnkdl0PwS1)**.

clean_body: 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | Dear Friend, Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. You've seen my work. Most Americans have. In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me. It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. And leadership has a price." I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me. That's where you come in. ? When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting! name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq83329v001qljh2q9rdnvnoqod5v163u8obimno_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i68p76c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zau9b8o57p8igu922manjmppsek7k28j32oa17io_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i68p76c9h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z29c80m82jlvvehrv85abdrk5s3va9cqd4rm3598_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i68p76c9h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlq50o3uhtmk3qq9amj02srkuo5o98ui23klerao_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i68p76c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chi69pr4shh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu9s0p0bqqvjmmavvqpdqgo8ftuteds9d72nv1jg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i68p76c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7r98sojbcr4on1ul81guau64ll64ngf6hc13cq0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i68p76c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Friend,
We are watching our Republic DIE before our very eyes.
The Biden-appointed Special Counsel has **INDICTED** me in yet another witch hunt regarding documents that I had the RIGHT to declassify as President of the United States.
This witch hunt began when the FBI RAIDED my home and then staged it to look like a made-for-TV crime scene with police sirens and flashing red and blue lights.
**This is nothing but a disgusting act of Election Interference by the ruling party to ELIMINATE its opposition and amass total control over our country.**
The Deep State thought they had destroyed our campaign when a Soros-backed prosecutor indicted and even ARRESTED me earlier this year.
_But then, we SHOCKED them as our campaign grew even stronger ... _
...We broke fundraising records. 3 independent polls showed us beating Joe Biden by 7 POINTS. In fact, polls show I'm the _ONLY_ Republican who can beat Crooked Joe.
**So, after a _state_ prosecutor _failed_ to break us, the Deep State sharpened their attacks and unleashed a FEDERAL prosecutor to TRY and take us down.**
_But let me be as clear as possible:_
**No matter how viciously they attack me, I will NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER our country to the radical Left - and I will NEVER end this presidential campaign that puts YOU first.**
With YOUR support, we will once again surge even higher and prove that our America First movement truly is UNSTOPPABLE.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aba3d50b9d5048e8ae812cef2a499d17&_e=Oe6KmIFGT3xYBtTA6eoIBOw3GJW1Vjifghso7N-443HihUAEF6E756nTaSKXO5T2hzF0tSWWEIxRNZd5wXIKMezesscjUCI9eNbrVIrh6SL1xdAkh1c93TF1wYH7lSp0nsvtqCtG4ElEaqZB32MHTjyLAjTMIGhkiMbc36_f9AN9FPtXrmDEW6O9MgNPIcMP9IxKs95MW9PRmgyzGRD2CURso-VSSproCYeeQxs6MlWQ4tNH8-ohWF5CpTdzq4HT9qhpWE13KOIrtT4epdxMdOi-2zdPFru0qijZbklAOSux9SJwEgmjargAz0zsmatbwdrbBakHB9fsJT7Cbzd9aVmEViPynwtyQIrhXy8jEJt_PwLcgO6RIMRuqEPKfRhl)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aba3d50b9d5048e8ae812cef2a499d17&_e=Oe6KmIFGT3xYBtTA6eoIBOw3GJW1Vjifghso7N-443HihUAEF6E756nTaSKXO5T2hzF0tSWWEIxRNZd5wXIKMezesscjUCI9eNbrVIrh6SL1xdAkh1c93TF1wYH7lSp0nsvtqCtG4ElEaqZB32MHTjyLAjTMIGhkiMbc36_f9AN9FPtXrmDEW6O9MgNPIcMP9IxKs95MW9PRmgyzGRD2CURso-VSSproCYeeQxs6MlXUGAfYR2E9HA7l-bO4iNLK4pIiZpA6X7oOJChhQPQA0O4zc84UzV_SdXGdZdFnMidJf2XBejZAQku10dXUF6-FqRq2SiqbY4GxWYmHPESfVYS9DTi8w6AyCV91yrS366Xx9SqNq-r_ZgFYJYklQVrO)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: A.G. Holder
subject: We have made significant progress.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team -- earlier this week, the Supreme Court of the United States, in _Allen v. Milligan_ , upheld a lower court decision striking down Alabama’s discriminatory congressional map as a likely violation of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) due to the state’s failure to provide Black Alabamians an equal opportunity to participate in the political process. _Allen v. Milligan_ is a redistricting lawsuit originally filed by Alabama voters with the support of our affiliate, National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), after the state legislature enacted a discriminatory congressional map.
This is a victory for all Americans, and it is an important step toward equal voting power and representation for voters of color across the country. It is also a testament to the tenacity of the voters of Alabama, who knew their rights were violated as a result of a map drawn in an unconstitutional and discriminatory manner, and took this fight as far as they could to **not only ensure their rights, but the rights of Americans across the country.**
As a result of this decision, the case moves forward, returning to the trial court for implementation of a fairer congressional map that all Alabamians want and deserve. The lower court ordered a second Black opportunity district be drawn in Alabama precisely because **Black Alabamians have been too long denied the opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice in all but one of the seven congressional districts.**
All of the protections enshrined in the Voting Rights Act of 1965 are still needed today. Although we have made significant progress since the Civil Rights Movement, **we still live in a nation where the safeguards found in the Voting Rights Act for minority communities remain necessary and must remain robust.**

****_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

One could almost hear the network executives and public officials screaming into their bluetooth headsets when the early ratings came in. “What is a Woman?” had more than 170 million views. Tucker Carlson’s new Twitter broadcast? 85 million. With numbers like that, companies that buy advertising are starting to visualize a Superbowl on Twitter. On .. Harvey Weinstein must be kicking himself now for not identifying as trans. Because based on one federal judge’s decision, apparently it’s just fine to force women to see your penis, as long as you say you’re a woman, too. Forget #MeToo—we’re now in an era where not wanting to be around a naked person of .. PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Why do some people prosper, yet others fail? - Update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133080?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Economic output per person is seven times higher on the American side of the US-Mexico border than on the other. Why?** How come the average Canadian is twelve times richer than the average Moroccan, despite both countries have similar size populations?

**We are often invited to believe that a society’s relative success has a lot to do with its geography or climate. I disagree. **

There are plenty of resource-rich countries in Africa, blessed in every imaginable way by geography and climate, that still produce only grinding poverty. Conversely, there are plenty of resource-poor places, such as Japan or Iceland, that prosper.

**Much more important than a country’s natural resources is its public policy. **

If property rights are insecure, power arbitrary and taxes high, a society will remain poor. If, on the other hand, people are free to spend more of their own money and make their own choices for themselves and their families, society overall will thrive.

**Perhaps the single best illustration of this is Korea**. Since the end of the Korean war, the Korean peninsula has been divided. North Korea has been run by a communist dictatorship, under which there are no property rights and rules for everything, including what you can wear. South Korea, especially since the 1980s, is an open, free market society, with relatively low taxes and light regulation.

**The North today can barely feed itself. The South is as wealthy as Europe or the US.** This NASA photo of the Korean peninsula at night shows the difference; the North hardly has any electricity.

---
|
---
_North Korea at night: communist societies are poor._
| Korea shows us what happens when a society is subjected to two different extremes – one free market, the other a tyranny.

**Making sure that every society – be it Korea, Canada, Morocco or Mississippi – is run along free market principles is essential to maximise prosperity. But even with the most liberty-minded policies in place, would everyone in a free market society flourish? **

In the late 1960s, a Stanford psychologist, Walter Mischel, undertook a famous experiment. He offered kids a marshmallow on the understanding that they could either eat the marshmallow right away, or they could wait a few minutes and have two.

**What Mischel was doing was measuring each child’s time preferences.** Those kids that were prepared to wait had what we call a low time preference. The less patient kids that opted to have one marshmallow right away, had what we call a higher time preference.

**Having assessed each kid’s time preference, Mischel then tracked their progress over the years that followed.** He discovered a startling correlation between having a low time preference (being prepared to wait) with academic and other kinds of success. **Those inclined towards instant gratification, his research seemed to suggest, would be less successful.**
---
|
---
_Different time preferences: do they explain where countries, not just individuals, end up?_
| **Time preferences, it seems, play an important part in how we as individuals do. Might time preferences also have a role in explaining the different trajectories societies take?**

**Could it be that the USA, Canada, Finland and Japan are relatively rich because they are countries with low time preferences?** There is a body of evidence to suggest that poorer countries, like Mexico and Russia have higher time preferences, and that really poor countries like Tanzania and Nigeria have really high time preferences.

**The conventional explanation for this is that prosperity produces lower time preferences. Might it not be the case that lower time preferences produce prosperity?**

If being wealthy explained your time preferences, not the other way round, you might expect that people with comparable incomes in different countries had similar time preferences. They don’t. As with Mischel’s marshmallow experiment, the implication is that time preferences impact outcomes, not the other way round.

**Mainstream economists have a lot to say about how individuals transact with other individuals. They less often look at how we as individuals transact with our future selves. **

Surely how people in a society transact with their future selves is critical in explaining economic outcomes? In a society with a low time preference, people are more likely to defer consumption and save. Dropout rates in education are likely to be lower. Capital and knowledge will accumulate from one generation to the next.

**Time preferences are a key factor driving a society’s economic development. What about propensity to commit crime? **Presumably if you are willing to risk seeing your future-self sent to prison in return for the chance of an immediate material reward you have a different time preference to someone that isn’t?

Time preferences can clearly be influenced by public policy. Should you, for example, have the misfortune to live in a society with hyperinflation, your time preference will rise since you will have a powerful incentive to spend, rather than save.

It would be fascinating to know, for example, how time preferences compare between North and South Korea. A recent paper I read suggested that exposure to communism had impacted the time preferences of East Germans, compared to those who lived in West Germany (albeit that the effect is wearing off and Germans overall have some of the lowest time preferences in the world).

Those of us in the liberty movement often assume that if only we tweaked this tax rate or removed that regulation, we would get improved outcomes. Sometimes.** Perhaps when we are considering some of those deep-rooted, inter-generational socio-economic challenges, we ought to think a little more about time preferences.**

What can we do to lower time preferences? Can one actually lower time preferences, or is it perhaps a case of not raising them?

**An idealist believes that if only we adopted the right policies, we would get better outcomes. A conservative needs to recognise that there are some aspects of human nature that we can neither change nor perfect.** Time preferences might be one of them.

Have a wonderful weekend!

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, Economic output per person is seven times higher on the American side of the US-Mexico border than on the other. Why? How come the average Canadian is twelve times richer than the average Moroccan, despite both countries have similar size populations? We are often invited to believe that a society’s relative success has a lot to do with its geography or climate. I disagree. There are plenty of resource-rich countries in Africa, blessed in every imaginable way by geography and climate, that still produce only grinding poverty. Conversely, there are plenty of resource-poor places, such as Japan or Iceland, that prosper. Much more important than a country’s natural resources is its public policy. If property rights are insecure, power arbitrary and taxes high, a society will remain poor. If, on the other hand, people are free to spend more of their own money and make their own choices for themselves and their families, society overall will thrive. Perhaps the single best illustration of this is Korea. Since the end of the Korean war, the Korean peninsula has been divided. North Korea has been run by a communist dictatorship, under which there are no property rights and rules for everything, including what you can wear. South Korea, especially since the 1980s, is an open, free market society, with relatively low taxes and light regulation. The North today can barely feed itself. The South is as wealthy as Europe or the US. This NASA photo of the Korean peninsula at night shows the difference; the North hardly has any electricity. | North Korea at night: communist societies are poor. | Korea shows us what happens when a society is subjected to two different extremes – one free market, the other a tyranny. Making sure that every society – be it Korea, Canada, Morocco or Mississippi – is run along free market principles is essential to maximise prosperity. But even with the most liberty-minded policies in place, would everyone in a free market society flourish? In the late 1960s, a Stanford psychologist, Walter Mischel, undertook a famous experiment. He offered kids a marshmallow on the understanding that they could either eat the marshmallow right away, or they could wait a few minutes and have two. What Mischel was doing was measuring each child’s time preferences. Those kids that were prepared to wait had what we call a low time preference. The less patient kids that opted to have one marshmallow right away, had what we call a higher time preference. Having assessed each kid’s time preference, Mischel then tracked their progress over the years that followed. He discovered a startling correlation between having a low time preference (being prepared to wait) with academic and other kinds of success. Those inclined towards instant gratification, his research seemed to suggest, would be less successful. | Different time preferences: do they explain where countries, not just individuals, end up? | Time preferences, it seems, play an important part in how we as individuals do. Might time preferences also have a role in explaining the different trajectories societies take? Could it be that the USA, Canada, Finland and Japan are relatively rich because they are countries with low time preferences? There is a body of evidence to suggest that poorer countries, like Mexico and Russia have higher time preferences, and that really poor countries like Tanzania and Nigeria have really high time preferences. The conventional explanation for this is that prosperity produces lower time preferences. Might it not be the case that lower time preferences produce prosperity? If being wealthy explained your time preferences, not the other way round, you might expect that people with comparable incomes in different countries had similar time preferences. They don’t. As with Mischel’s marshmallow experiment, the implication is that time preferences impact outcomes, not the other way round. Mainstream economists have a lot to say about how individuals transact with other individuals. They less often look at how we as individuals transact with our future selves. Surely how people in a society transact with their future selves is critical in explaining economic outcomes? In a society with a low time preference, people are more likely to defer consumption and save. Dropout rates in education are likely to be lower. Capital and knowledge will accumulate from one generation to the next. Time preferences are a key factor driving a society’s economic development. What about propensity to commit crime? Presumably if you are willing to risk seeing your future-self sent to prison in return for the chance of an immediate material reward you have a different time preference to someone that isn’t? Time preferences can clearly be influenced by public policy. Should you, for example, have the misfortune to live in a society with hyperinflation, your time preference will rise since you will have a powerful incentive to spend, rather than save. It would be fascinating to know, for example, how time preferences compare between North and South Korea. A recent paper I read suggested that exposure to communism had impacted the time preferences of East Germans, compared to those who lived in West Germany (albeit that the effect is wearing off and Germans overall have some of the lowest time preferences in the world). Those of us in the liberty movement often assume that if only we tweaked this tax rate or removed that regulation, we would get improved outcomes. Sometimes. Perhaps when we are considering some of those deep-rooted, inter-generational socio-economic challenges, we ought to think a little more about time preferences. What can we do to lower time preferences? Can one actually lower time preferences, or is it perhaps a case of not raising them? An idealist believes that if only we adopted the right policies, we would get better outcomes. A conservative needs to recognise that there are some aspects of human nature that we can neither change nor perfect. Time preferences might be one of them. Have a wonderful weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=156458c129c647418251e612cb3f810b&_e=zAjc5Mlgg5AqnX1xCgiGsmA4j3nrQ9NWmL_0LLi-_IozuhMN_1QigAUVF5RDmqKaIEiP8FOIDQWzj1Ih-6Rx5b8I1vI_othlK_aNVqQBI591YoSbbXbDh2u5Jn-lx145uTGujlfPPg4Sr1AWr-SLsnEs8xz2YW8WV8dmu13wHKwFwVXRn_x6dUBwN6oUVSte9DMn_ZHboisHdLtfFIOPPTAptyEekzSJf5REbSNtpX-g6fTHHltU92oOdSzTMC5mV5RvQwiLs4y7r0FVlFTxKdQ3ZtQz2gT9eaU9wnq9hEFnWKUvupmZsiUFwPsV9aXu4TQ5zpLDMd8hR6a3ILuvgGkmqVl7vqjzmvOp2wQo1I9v-HuMQno7G5ZJClNZvBSO)

Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=156458c129c647418251e612cb3f810b&_e=zAjc5Mlgg5AqnX1xCgiGsmA4j3nrQ9NWmL_0LLi-_IozuhMN_1QigAUVF5RDmqKaIEiP8FOIDQWzj1Ih-6Rx5b8I1vI_othlK_aNVqQBI591YoSbbXbDh2u5Jn-lx145uTGujlfPPg4Sr1AWr-SLsnEs8xz2YW8WV8dmu13wHKwFwVXRn_x6dUBwN6oUVSte9DMn_ZHboisHdLtfFIOPPTAptyEekzSJf5REbSNtpX_q_5T-EPE8Dz63Czp8gfN2jXe1iAFDe6HnzjToLEgA8RF2xPJJRpeZJ6le8_DtS_vPn4DOYf6_KD6T8C-qDQCMHLKF7Sg0KE3ct-KeSyp0ltSVFTyYGn6Z7Veih_ZLJLcp9r47nsXlivV37dASelZW)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

Friend,

It's hard to believe, yet the first Republican
Presidential Debate is coming up soon.

Unlike the other candidates - Ron DeSantis, Larry Elder,
Nikki Haley, Asa Hutchinson, Vivek Ramaswamy, Tim Scott, and
Donald Trump, who have all had weeks, if not months, to
professionally fundraise - we are JUST getting this grassroots
movement started.

Now, this isn't a bad thing; however, it does make it
THAT much more difficult to qualify for the first debate. We
don't want our race to be over before it even starts, so we're
asking you to join the team with a generous donation of just $2
to our campaign, Doug Burgum for America.

Every other campaign is asking for $1, yet we can do
better together. If every patriot reading this email donates just

Milwaukee in August. No candidate will work harder to earn your
support, which is why we are counting on folks like you to get us
to the debate stage so we can share our vision with America.

Please donate $2 or more RIGHT AWAY to help us qualify
for the first Republican Presidential Debate. >>

Our team is going to send around a list with the names of
each supporter who gave $2 or more by the end of the day. We

With gratitude,

Team Burgum

name: Tim Scott
subject: (image inside)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Did you see me taking on the hosts of The View this week?

| |
---
| | | Did you see me taking on the hosts of The View this week?

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62804761:JTBlaCIEN:m:1:3299561967:061D7F5438496A32DD684077ECB2AAB9:r "Speaking the truth on The View!")
---

This was me trying to explain to Whoopi and Sunny that I am the rule, not the exception. My life disproves the lies of the Left, no matter how much they lie and try to deny it.

I believe telling young African American kids that the only way to be successful in this country is to be the exception and not the rule is a **dangerous, offensive, disgusting message to send.**
_Anyone can succeed in America with the right education and opportunity and that 's why I fight._

---
| | | [HELP ME FIGHT FOR GOOD EDUCATION AND OPPORTUNITY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62804761:JTBlaCIEN:m:1:3299561967:061D7F5438496A32DD684077ECB2AAB9:r "HELP ME FIGHT FOR GOOD EDUCATION AND
OPPORTUNITY")
---

If you agree with my message of optimism and hope for a better future, then I humbly ask you to take a stand with me and support my campaign. This race isn't going to be easy, but I know our future is worth fighting for. That's why I'm giving this campaign everything I've got.

**_[Are you with me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62804761:JTBlaCIEN:m:1:3299561967:061D7F5438496A32DD684077ECB2AAB9:r "Are you with me?")_**

Tim

---
| | | [HELP ME FIGHT FOR A BETTER TOMORROW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62804761:JTBlaCIEN:m:1:3299561967:061D7F5438496A32DD684077ECB2AAB9:r "HELP ME
FIGHT FOR A BETTER TOMORROW")
---

**P.S. -** If you missed my interview on The View, no worries! You can watch it **_[HERE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62804761:JTBlaCIEN:m:1:3299561967:061D7F5438496A32DD684077ECB2AAB9:r "HERE.")_**

FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62804762:JTBlaCIEN:m:1:3299561967:061D7F5438496A32DD684077ECB2AAB9:r "That’s
why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62804762:JTBlaCIEN:m:1:3299561967:061D7F5438496A32DD684077ECB2AAB9:r "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so every donation you can make, I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: You only get to be a political outsider once
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I am the outsider Washington DC hates. They know I will bring meaningful change and dismantle the system that has brought this country down.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_t=rpZhEJNHkFICBJK25Z4l8jkZeUy_3nDdnzFiJYlHuZVvn6SEZJAYL-VU6PeJflY47uDF-gUlAKI1V3yC0C_XIDRlZobEySmILKE4GZ0kGro%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_t=rpZhEJNHkFICBJK25Z4l8jkZeUy_3nDdnzFiJYlHuZVvn6SEZJAYL-VU6PeJflY47uDF-gUlAKI1V3yC0C_XIDRlZobEySmILKE4GZ0kGro%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINncc6sMRv0xbWM7Zhx_i3gTjsuXX634L7bCBQTiyWDhm8tcoj5uGfKJteqZxgMbGTyLaGrVdZUGAHLrPUbZVOaa3BTQa0-IJB-Y0Hd-bbTrU0CyNMakrzBbENJxwRw6OjVHnBX57cs5RdBrRElBA4TC1PCkvOP6e_gssDSP3qrx-aRC91nZbINKNomc2JmXtThe1T6ygGEisnOsnRF6f1pusQ2gUeL8MC4Se6ZLBued_PSfE-MnFYMhCazMpfFOfbijJpIjr3SwLEEY7PKlNyj-XS58enj2xXpEGgyufEHU3fucBzYRjXF7_LelWkw4pOCpMuEHO0_xOV7Hj5dOBXoBltmSc744MTDslWg0m6Lr4zBnRd4Im55HTGNoUgnTpQA%3D%3D)
Fellow American, you may have heard other candidates promising to “drain the swamp,” but they never do.

_That's why I am different._

I am talking about America First 2.0 - taking America First further by doing it with first principles. **[Here are the policy commitments I would make on day ONE.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINncc6sMRv0xbWM7Zhx_i3gTjsuXX634L7bCBQTiyWDhm8tcoj5uGfKJteqZxgMbGTyLaGrVdZUGAHLrPUbZVOaa3BTQa0-IJB-Y0Hd-bbTrU0CyNMakrzBbENJxwRw6OjVHnBX57cs5RdBrRElBA4TC1PCkvOP6e_gssDSP3qrx-aRC91nZbINKNomc2JmXtThe1T6ygGEisnOsnRF6f1pusQ2gUeL8MC4Se6ZLBued_PObWFLnS4ZBjisEgwshhsEPeqdym9ryqaUS8vCNu6ava8cShCeq2clkBXMluh1C6PEd2OxZH-whvUT7GoaqZw1r4mP-dfZAq9B-QYdog4zdtAar0c4j0d-wcbkNEUiuEtB3UNkef2SE999tXdBKXtw%3D%3D)**

| [** JOIN THE AMERICA FIRST 2.0 MOVEMENT ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINncc6sMRv0xbWM7Zhx_i3gTjsuXX634L7bCBQTiyWDhm8tcoj5uGfKJteqZxgMbGTyLaGrVdZUGAHLrPUbZVOaa3BTQa0-IJB-Y0Hd-bbTrU0CyNMakrzBbENJxwRw6OjVHnBX57cs5RdBrRElBA4TC1PCkvOP6e_gssDSP3qrx-aRC91nZbINKNomc2JmXtThe1T6ygGEisnOsnRF6f1pusQ2gUeL8MC4Se6ZLBued_bG9c_F4pyIkN31H2zgSuDl9ns8qRcmJispeFu7drHdwAr-e-gKUtfqhb28tbyAa7lzDxPJf3t5SlZjj0kOpJzx_hgGeG-S2asPM3uObEFGs36yqexDCbNsRq48pr4_EHk5OADvcYkrXpl9UkxXf78g%3D%3D)
---

America First didn't start in 2016. It started in 1776. Putting America First requires moral authority, not just vengeance and grievance. I am promising:

* **Reviving American national identity.** From securing our borders to ending cultural extremism, we need to recognize that our country is better when we identify as Americans - not by artificial labels
* **Revitalize the American economy again.** Bring back American energy independence, American jobs for American citizens, and stabilize the dollar.
* **Holding China accountable for their American intellectual property theft and awful human rights violations.** The China-Russia alliance is the #1 threat to American security.
* **Truly dismantle the bureaucracy in DC.** Reform and rebuild governmental agencies and transform waste into a balanced budget.
* **Finally end the weaponization of the Federal Government.** From the DOJ to the FBI, taxpayers should not be funding politically motivated attacks on individuals and undermine the entire political process.

[** FIGHT FOR THE FUTURE OF OUR COUNTRY ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINncc6sMRv0xbWM7Zhx_i3gTjsuXX634L7bCBQTiyWDhm8tcoj5uGfKJteqZxgMbGTyLaGrVdZUGAHLrPUbZVOaa3BTQa0-IJB-Y0Hd-bbTrU0CyNMakrzBbENJxwRw6OjVHnBX57cs5RdBrRElBA4TC1PCkvOP6e_gssDSP3qrx-aRC91nZbINKNomc2JmXtThe1T6ygGEisnOsnRF6f1pusQ2gUeL8MC4Se6ZLBued_pxzfrLniBVSc2YqHCK_ljXydkPDylgj4wQuJrzYJusMFbx41-ymS1Ac3iEtmFPmeBCjk9RaXBK3sXI-0dFP1ndSpCtbSID88sH78JXv_gcczqj32j2rdasycSn73rVCV3Gh5Te9CVsnRXcpxmlzc2w%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American, I cannot emphasize enough how important a return to American values will correct the course our country is heading in. America First wasn't my idea - it was our founding fathers.

Years of inaction and unfulfilled promises from the liberal left have changed the landscape of the country - **[but with your support, we will take the vision back. Whether it's $1, $5 or $25, help continue to bring home the America First ideals we cherish.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINncc6sMRv0xbWM7Zhx_i3gTjsuXX634L7bCBQTiyWDhm8tcoj5uGfKJteqZxgMbGTyLaGrVdZUGAHLrPUbZVOaa3BTQa0-IJB-Y0Hd-bbTrU0CyNMakrzBbENJxwRw6OjVHnBX57cs5RdBrRElBA4TC1PCkvOP6e_gssDSP3qrx-aRC91nZbINKNomc2JmXtThe1T6ygGEisnOsnRF6f1pusQ2gUeL8MC4Se6ZLBued_BCkUUzSUhE-wBNepNKgW4nOX1vKuGKMgfvDsGa5VhEuZ5yaCWkdkPM1xV9Brnc9lbV6E67oGiaUk9bFIu3Eim1NPQNox23gz6Of6Exb74llWOkA_ODR3QrbsLTQuYsJwPJ_P1x3_1i0Gh52byG0YTQ%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINncc6sMRv0xbWM7Zhx_i3gTjsuXX634L7bCBQTiyWDhm8tcoj5uGfKJteqZxgMbGTyLaGrVdZUGAHLrPUbZVOaa3BTQa0-IJB-Y0Hd-bbTrU0CyNMakrzBbENJxwRw6OjVHnBX57cs5RdBrRElBA4TC1PCkvOP6e_gssDSP3qrx-aRC91nZbINKNomc2JmXtThe1T6ygGEisnOsnRF6f1pusQ2gUeL8MC4Se6ZLBued_5K41_cMkNJM5RNy0M6npVF7_AFDAIZcac62VOfi_mHd9N8FGtCyvNBZROebU_ecm8Gz7WA75POC9KVq83PfItmUF5wn4mT81wiFn4vV3NdpdzbRr6gmG2u_JSrPJ5gwOtaLkkjtqqo-bFwxH94I8Gw%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN THE AMERICA FIRST 2.0 MOVEMENT ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINncc6sMRv0xbWM7Zhx_i3gTjsuXX634L7bCBQTiyWDhm8tcoj5uGfKJteqZxgMbGTyLaGrVdZUGAHLrPUbZVOaa3BTQa0-IJB-Y0Hd-bbTrU0CyNMakrzBbENJxwRw6OjVHnBX57cs5RdBrRElBA4TC1PCkvOP6e_gssDSP3qrx-aRC91nZbINKNomc2JmXtThe1T6ygGEisnOsnRF6f1pusQ2gUeL8MC4Se6ZLBued_i9xZG63rjkZsseTUPhiltEmZpqCr3qIGei9uMC9W1HZ-y7qn2vkokAVmWK8CWEKa5c0BykE-Jh-p6YmeadeT8y50p523AdNYk3LC3VVCQaiMasBQYso-3TtwEkKeD5XEXgKsajGM-yu7PB0KQA-8Ug%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINncc6sMRv0xbWM7Zhx_i3gTjsuXX634L7bCBQTiyWDhm8tcoj5uGfKJteqZxgMbGTyLaGrVdZUGAHLrPUbZVOaa3BTQa0-IJB-Y0Hd-bbTrU0CyNMakrzBbENJxwRw6OjVHnBX57cs5RdBrRElBA4TC1PCkvOP6e_gssDSP3qrx-aRC91nZbINKNomc2JmXtThe1T6ygGEisnOsnRF6f1pusQ2gUeL8MC4Se6ZLBued_91dMOfrjtNE6VaXjSv6JZ1YGzpu-HVtL8DVsfRdjqHg5lS9O0nDZ2C_nM3iTwWxiack4veRDq3_0pce33d6Y0St1fAWo3CyJQAIKxkZDxF8_OUuqmNVHvf2JoqpR5pqMmOS2zoxe2T28g9A-F2rddQ%3D%3D)

---

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINhmq3LcEmmHYR9pa0slfM8ao0mTJftgrGGQ1t6QxYa5VKwOrY4ABKiEkmummY4VYzg-ok1ywXXUebZktXNd5330Vf8cS8odKzZdn-BY36ieOOIXwaLumR4WxYHicz-SujULlBmVhJZxvkUEOuFqBNnWBjNqq8t15zXdsmbsU6JRKQIR8ZSZhl0C0WXVbMeiUp60MD17-gnqez2RzePVLTS8%3D)| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINpc5J0jVhKKbOEdPRYx86qf-d99Y__-miAa1LAljKIIFKhMbMm3IU6MwbHr9EuUMS66yyAe3nG1y4xV-Gxgt_JVEPJvTZrG0qm3hr1uBdP7yDjmNjzuuvqJqyfmW-3wotd_R0VGwN3chKLQcvUxwp3jaYePvf0HHcf1AuPwK9DLFcqdXxuQ2x4yqd-VjTpcT4A%3D%3D)| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=45f461e4fd2441d9a022f77e29b81cf9&_e=DB4LyNbk4yclJmTDE8jINqf41uFwiHT7rg-FDWamMeQ-8Fv3-RoP6tI7ZhWVHUXMnOctPReWBOAJZBcDr3y7NBTSMelQIvGLheK-H7W5BzEWFjWM-wW2q_Hi2UXsk3F5ZFgv_xU_hvsyXIy6AuYc46PL8gU_OHyaAvzFqfKTwKaJO-42JwH3sz3UP5-R3CHzlPjJcKr7SLreWrqqPMYQHF4GRmjLontUiVetLxpwhkc%3D)

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqbet47ll5b2r1nrj9f69ptsol2cpeohrbkhe50g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i61oj6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu92kpa51h0dg2hbltrib2j9obkn1rjl262b6g78_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i61oj6c9h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsqng2c41fdnunvmuovlsussjfeudu9dvldjgu8o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i61oj6c9h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4md8gbpt5j8m51ujtujsobdladtvcvpfgdl55gg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i61oj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chi69o76cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3bmvpcdli4fhf12dv51ls2epepaern2e07lq6f8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i61oj6c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdgenfkj94bte732a7utdbeg8744pc9abf5gi4bo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c5i61oj6c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Lauren is one of my favorite candidates this year because she has a proven record as a fighter for liberty and freedom. I first came to know Lauren when she was organizing [Patriots for Rights Integrity Morals and Ethics (PRIME)](https://substack.cc/redirect/9e770b3d-56a9-49dd-99da-8fc398c3807a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I'm excited to see her take that fighting spirit to the Mississippi Senate. I encourage you to [learn more about Lauren](https://substack.cc/redirect/08439392-890b-4338-9638-6a1f17577312?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and support her with your vote and your money. She is fighting an entrenched incumbent who has all the special interest lobbyist money he want. Lauren only has you.
[Donate to Lauren](https://substack.cc/redirect/7010d32f-4d8a-4cb3-a44b-655e08d3054b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Friend,
Let me make something abundantly clear...
What the radical Left and the Deep State are doing – this backwards INDICTMENT – is not about truth or justice. _It’s about**FEAR.**_
**The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs.**
**The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then YOU could be made their public enemy #1.**
Because the America we once knew and loved is now gone.
It has been transformed into a Third World tin-pot dictatorship where the Democrats have gained complete control through the weaponization of our justice system.
_But even during these darkest times, my resolve to save America does not waiver._
I will never give up, _**and I will never end this campaign.**_
Because YOU – the countless patriots who refuse to even flinch in the face of tyranny – are my hope, my courage, and my strength to **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to the radical Left.
And that UNBREAKABLE resolve is something these sick and twisted radicals will never understand.
Which is why despite all their vicious attacks, their lies, and their witch hunts, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024!

name: Team Zak
subject: This tweet helped us meet a milestone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
George Santos will always hide the truth — but not us. So here’s what you need to know:
#
Hey —
We know that not everyone is on Twitter like Zak is. Still, we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this **important message from him:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230610?amount=5&refcode=em20230610&refcode2=100_8507_WDHdAC&akid=100%2E8507%2EWDHdAC)
When Zak posted this, our supporters stepped up in a big way and helped us clear this goal — but we can’t stop there. Republicans are going to spend millions of dollars on this race, so we’ve set a new goal: **$9,000 by Sunday night.** [
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230610?amount=5&refcode=em20230610&refcode2=100_8507_WDHdAC&akid=100%2E8507%2EWDHdAC)
[**That’s why we’re here to ask: will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to get us there? We’ll explain why reaching this goal is so important in just a second but, if you’re short on time, please chip in now:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230610?amount=5&refcode=em20230610&refcode2=100_8507_WDHdAC&akid=100%2E8507%2EWDHdAC)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230610?amount=5&refcode=em20230610&refcode2=100_8507_WDHdAC&akid=100%2E8507%2EWDHdAC)** Like Zak said, George Santos will always hide the truth — but not us. **So here’s what you need to know:**
Hitting these fundraising benchmarks makes all the difference right now. It shows everyone — from Santos and his Republican cronies to leaders of the Democratic Party — that Zak has a grassroots movement behind him that will push us to victory.[**
**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230610?refcode=em20230610&refcode2=100_8507_WDHdAC&akid=100%2E8507%2EWDHdAC)
The more support we can get early on, the better our chances are of securing key endorsements that will drive even more resources our way and ensure Zak is able to connect with voters in every part of the district.[**
**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230610?refcode=em20230610&refcode2=100_8507_WDHdAC&akid=100%2E8507%2EWDHdAC)
[**So what do you say? Can we count on you to chip in $5 now and help us close this gap?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230610?amount=5&refcode=em20230610&refcode2=100_8507_WDHdAC&akid=100%2E8507%2EWDHdAC)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230610?amount=5&refcode=em20230610&refcode2=100_8507_WDHdAC&akid=100%2E8507%2EWDHdAC)**
Thanks for reading,
Team Zak

body:
That is the donation we are asking you to make today.
#

$3, Peter.
That is the donation we are asking you to make today.
$3 because our FEC fundraising deadline is coming up and when it ends we're legally required to report not just how much we raise, but the number of donations we receive will be public as well.
$3 because a good report will lead to more endorsements as national Democrats see our campaign as the best chance to hold this seat. Not only will that lead to more fundraising, but uniting Democrats is a must to WIN.
$3 because if we can out-raise Senator Sinema again, especially with small-donors, her fundraising will dry up as rich folks get the drift she has no path to victory.
Now we know $3 may not seem like it can do ALL OF THAT, but it all adds up. A few folks have probably already donated in the time it took you to read this email.
Now they hope you'll do the same.
Ruben does too.
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $3 directly to Ruben Gallego's campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona? Do it before our FEC deadline ends. It all adds up when we're all chipping in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230610-1-f&t=1&akid=695%2E734936%2EInBK61)

name: Team Deluzio
subject: Happy Pride Month, Derek!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64623235/410695935/-954707654?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.10_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NThkNmMxOC05OTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duya4pURiH5AMIXD6fdVjcJ1Ovx8pfFzzbtXLg8-svg=) **We want to wish a very happy Pride Month to the LGBTQ+ community throughout Beaver and Allegheny Counties!**

**Pride is about freedom: The freedom to love who you love and to live as you are.** It’s also a celebration of the many LGBTQ+ activists throughout history who fought for those freedoms, especially the trailblazers that called western Pennsylvania home.

**But the fight for freedom is far from over.** The radical right has been chipping away at those freedoms, punishing transgender children and their parents for seeking life-saving gender affirming care, and making LGBTQ+ folks live in fear.

Chris often talks about fighting for our common good – and that means for _all of us_. He’s not afraid to stand up to Republicans when they come for our LGBTQ+ community.

**[We need leaders like Chris who will fight for our freedoms If you’re able, please chip in to Chris’s re-election campaign today to show your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64623236/410695936/-954707654?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.10_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NThkNmMxOC05OTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duya4pURiH5AMIXD6fdVjcJ1Ovx8pfFzzbtXLg8-svg=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = We want to wish a very happy Pride Month to the LGBTQ+ community throughout Beaver and Allegheny Counties! Pride is about freedom: The freedom to love who you love and to live as you are. It’s also a celebration of the many LGBTQ+ activists throughout history who fought for those freedoms, especially the trailblazers that called western Pennsylvania home. But the fight for freedom is far from over. The radical right has been chipping away at those freedoms, punishing transgender children and their parents for seeking life-saving gender affirming care, and making LGBTQ+ folks live in fear. Chris often talks about fighting for our common good – and that means for all of us. He’s not afraid to stand up to Republicans when they come for our LGBTQ+ community. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, and once again, Happy Pride Month! name: Mia Mason
subject: this is my track record
body:
Friends - in the early days of Donald Trump’s campaign, I remember feeling the pressure and fear that many ot
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=29023.330.1.6eb9f93a6def08309895104a7d9e473a)
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=29023.331.1.53c4ce214031525c5698220b825223c2) |
---
Friends - in the early days of Donald Trump’s campaign, I remember feeling the pressure and fear that many others did in my community. His rhetoric was inflammatory and bigoted, and he targeted many people while stoking the flames of a radical base primed with hatred. It wasn’t just the LGBTQ+ community - it was all communities outside of the radical right and their idea of what America “should be.” At his behest, they defined America as “great” as long as it didn’t include us and our rights. Women’s rights. Working people’s rights. The rights of immigrants and those seeking a better life in our nation. And so, I moved from a military service career to a civil service life. I attended and spoke at the Women’s March in 2018. I worked within my community to advance the rights of LGBTQ+ individuals and pushed back against the Trump administration’s discriminatory policies towards those of us in the military. I worked with vaccination clinics during the height of the Covid pandemic to see that people were protected against an illness that ravaged our country. And now, I am working towards ensuring that as a hopeful Congressional Representative, people across all communities are seen, and heard and that I am fighting for them. Friends, I can’t do this alone. As a campaign funded solely on grassroots support, I need you to help me achieve this goal for all of us. **[Can you chip in $50 today and help carry this campaign to victory for Maryland and for all communities?](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=29023.332.1.8871ec135dca134f1096bf4121edd10c)**
---
| | [ Rush $50 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=29023.333.1.894a1946d34f5afb757123076ce2cd5a&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE3Mzk2NTY4Mi0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My00NTBmZWU1ZTZjZWM5YmUwNDMyMjAxNjY5ZTY1N2Q4MjQ1MWRiYmM2IiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjI5MDIzIn0=)
---
| | [ Other Amount ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=29023.334.1.f0a5d7bebfae218e65ac103f3949b3e3&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE3Mzk2NTY4Mi0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My00NTBmZWU1ZTZjZWM5YmUwNDMyMjAxNjY5ZTY1N2Q4MjQ1MWRiYmM2IiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjI5MDIzIn0=)
---
Thank you so much, and thank you for being a part of a movement that will give us all a chance to be heard. ▪ Mia

name: Colin Allred via Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz failed the people of Texas for 10 years. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me.
body:
Why I’m running
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2cec82d1-a664-4297-a982-e7b6aa3ab9d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta40dd595-45b4-4f6e-905d-0ba7ad7a4a90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta48cc8e5-9d1f-4f15-a1d5-5efffd692fdd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5eaf77c7-1422-4676-87ec-b7c0ce7aa51a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc110ee1e-3680-48eb-8f51-05029494e0a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House.[Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96027085-c6be-4813-8f76-79900dadcc3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me. [**So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T447e6067-7cd5-448c-8360-f8835265b05b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8cc7e01b-4cef-440f-98f6-9c4e404fcc1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/colinallred-story5-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=cf7a8cfd-ee10-4093-8c75-b57757f7a3d8&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=cf7a8cfd-ee10-4093-8c75-b57757f7a3d8&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Election Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: This state primary will have a massive impact on everything from abortion rights to voting rights.
body:
Will you help us mobilize voters and spread accurate information about candidates and ballot initiatives before the polls officially open?
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1091%2E120351%2EO3Ohx4)
Peter —
**Early voting starts today** in Virginia, where state and local elections will have a massive impact on everything from abortion rights to voting rights.
[**We’ll explain more about the consequences of this state primary in just a moment, but if you’re short on time: will you chip in $5 to help us mobilize voters and spread accurate information about candidates and ballot initiatives before they head to the polls?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230610?refcode=em20230610&refcode2=1091_120351_O3Ohx4&akid=1091%2E120351%2EO3Ohx4)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230610?refcode=em20230610&refcode2=1091_120351_O3Ohx4&akid=1091%2E120351%2EO3Ohx4)**
**Many Virginia communities don’t have access to trustworthy local news coverage.** That leaves many voters either unaware that there’s a primary election happening or without trustworthy coverage to help them make an informed decision at the ballot box.
**That’s where Courier Newsroom comes in.**
Our dedicated reporters at our local, Virginia-based newsroom, _Dogwood_ , are working tirelessly to remedy this information gap by publishing eye-catching, straightforward news pieces.
Their stories range from explainers outlining what’s at stake in this important election to articles introducing people to the candidates vying for their support:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230610?refcode=em20230610&refcode2=1091_120351_O3Ohx4&akid=1091%2E120351%2EO3Ohx4)
With early voting **officially underway** , our reporters are racing to get this information in front of Virginians. Still, the work of our _Dogwood_ team — the articles and amplified posts — is only possible with support from people like you.
[**Will you chip in $5 now to power their work and help us spread accurate, factual information to as many voters as possible?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230610?refcode=em20230610&refcode2=1091_120351_O3Ohx4&akid=1091%2E120351%2EO3Ohx4)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230610?refcode=em20230610&refcode2=1091_120351_O3Ohx4&akid=1091%2E120351%2EO3Ohx4)**
Thanks for your support,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1091_120351_O3Ohx4&akid=1091%2E120351%2EO3Ohx4)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1091%2E120351%2EO3Ohx4)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032
