name: Mark Warner
subject: Mayo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
and other “divisive” topics that shouldn’t be

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64625158/410703283/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2M4M2I2MC05ZDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-K3f_wWVEWrfidOHB1wNR16kFSOTnm4juZGbgpINVw=&emci=933ad9b7-3206-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=57c83b60-9d07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I’ve got a quick somewhat silly story that relates to something very important. I’m sure you remember my tuna melt video I made back when we were all stuck at home during the COVID lockdown. It took people’s minds off the tough times we were going through and got people talking—arguing even...over mayonnaise. First of all, I’d like to go on the record: **That wasn’t too much mayo.** Mayo is what makes the sandwich, and I’m not sure why that was so divisive. But just when I thought we’d put this to bed, a reporter from a magazine called me up the other day wanting to talk about it again! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64625161/410703286/148714647?refcode=mw_em_230610_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2M4M2I2MC05ZDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-K3f_wWVEWrfidOHB1wNR16kFSOTnm4juZGbgpINVw=) Here’s where I’m going with all this. It got me thinking about other divisive topics that simply don’t need to be... well, divisive. Take the Supreme Court for example. After reports of multiple blatantly unethical actions by our Justices, why wouldn’t we want the highest court in our country to be held to a basic code of conduct that ensures accountability and transparency? Or mental health services. With almost every family in our country impacted by mental health challenges at some point, what’s wrong with making sure folks everywhere can access the health care resources they need to be supported and safe? Don’t even get me started on the recent debacle over the debt ceiling and whether the United States of America should pay its bills. But over and over again, some on the right politicize these issues, all for their party’s gain. This is what we’re dealing with right now in Washington. It’s a reminder that elections have consequences, and when Democrats don’t stick together and show up at the ballot box, we can have some real problems in the years that follow. Here’s where I’m at. I’m always going to be looking for opportunities to make a bipartisan deal—pushing past the faux division and partisanship to get things done for Virginians and our country. It’s in my DNA, from my time in business to the Governor’s mansion, and now in the Senate. But there are also some times where Democrats have to just stand firm and not let partisanship-gone-wild create a divisive issue that tears our country apart. The debt ceiling is about as clear an example of this as you can get. When Democrats took back the Senate and elected Joe Biden in 2020, we got the American people on board by promising to restore some normalcy to the country. We did a pretty darn good job of keeping that promise by finding issues that most people could agree on—getting our economy back on track after the COVID lockdowns, creating high-tech jobs, and dealing with inflation and climate change. Heading into the elections this year and next, this is the moment where we have to band together and recommit to that mission of electing Democrats up and down the ballot who will focus on these kinds of real results, not division and partisan gain. **_[**That’s why I’m asking for your help today. Can you chip in just $5 today to support my work in the Senate and on the campaign trail?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64625165/410703290/148714647?refcode=mw_em_230610_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2M4M2I2MC05ZDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-K3f_wWVEWrfidOHB1wNR16kFSOTnm4juZGbgpINVw=)_** **[DONATE OTHER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64625182/410703311/148714647?express_lane_other=true&refcode=mw_em_230610_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2M4M2I2MC05ZDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-K3f_wWVEWrfidOHB1wNR16kFSOTnm4juZGbgpINVw=)** It’s pretty simple, folks. I’m sure you remember my tuna melt video I made back when we were all stuck at home during the COVID lockdown. It took people’s minds off the tough times we were going through and got people talking—arguing even...over mayonnaise. First of all, I’d like to go on the record: That wasn’t too much mayo. Mayo is what makes the sandwich, and I’m not sure why that was so divisive. But just when I thought we’d put this to bed, a reporter from a magazine called me up the other day wanting to talk about it again! = Here’s where I’m going with all this. It got me thinking about other divisive topics that simply don’t need to be... well, divisive. Take the Supreme Court for example. After reports of multiple blatantly unethical actions by our Justices, why wouldn’t we want the highest court in our country to be held to a basic code of conduct that ensures accountability and transparency? Or mental health services. With almost every family in our country impacted by mental health challenges at some point, what’s wrong with making sure folks everywhere can access the health care resources they need to be supported and safe? Don’t even get me started on the recent debacle over the debt ceiling and whether the United States of America should pay its bills. But over and over again, some on the right politicize these issues, all for their party’s gain. This is what we’re dealing with right now in Washington. It’s a reminder that elections have consequences, and when Democrats don’t stick together and show up at the ballot box, we can have some real problems in the years that follow. Here’s where I’m at. I’m always going to be looking for opportunities to make a bipartisan deal—pushing past the faux division and partisanship to get things done for Virginians and our country. It’s in my DNA, from my time in business to the Governor’s mansion, and now in the Senate. But there are also some times where Democrats have to just stand firm and not let partisanship-gone-wild create a divisive issue that tears our country apart. The debt ceiling is about as clear an example of this as you can get. When Democrats took back the Senate and elected Joe Biden in 2020, we got the American people on board by promising to restore some normalcy to the country. We did a pretty darn good job of keeping that promise by finding issues that most people could agree on—getting our economy back on track after the COVID lockdowns, creating high-tech jobs, and dealing with inflation and climate change. Heading into the elections this year and next, this is the moment where we have to band together and recommit to that mission of electing Democrats up and down the ballot who will focus on these kinds of real results, not division and partisan gain. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = It’s pretty simple, folks. There are some things that just don’t need to be divisive. With your help we can make sure we have leaders in Washington who get this, too. Your resident mayo advocate, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Dr. Shawn Wilson
subject: Down In The Mud
body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/swlogo2.png]
TEAM WILSON WEEKLY UPDATE
Peter,
This week, I have been busy visiting communities across the state, talking with residents and stakeholders about our shared vision for Louisiana, and celebrating a victory for voting rights across the country. [https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2023/06/08/supreme-court-alabama-redistricting-voting-rights/]
Meanwhile, my opponents have been down in the mud. [https://www.thenewsstar.com/story/news/2023/06/05/louisiana-governors-race-takes-nasty-turn-among-republicans/70286807007/]
Republican Infighting
Time and again, we have seen Republican candidates for Louisiana governor choose infighting over the people of our great state. In both 2015 and 2019, this created a path to victory for my former boss and endorser Governor John Bel Edwards. These early attacks demonstrate the need for someone who will bring together coalitions and unite our state.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/anti%20landry%20ad.png]
Voting Rights Victory
The U.S. Supreme Court ruled in favor of Black voters in a redistricting case, and ordered Alabama to create a new majority-minority district. Louisiana must take swift corrective action based on this precedent to secure a second majority-minority Congressional district in Louisiana. Our state is 33 percent Black and deserves 1/3 representation in Congress.
State Legislature
In Baton Rouge, the state legislature rushed through a budget proposal that fails to address important issues facing the state of Louisiana. I am disappointed and concerned that the $100 million unnecessary cut [https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Flailluminator.com%2F2023%2F06%2F08%2Flouisiana-lawmakers-pass-state-budget-plan-with-only-temporary-teacher-pay-increase%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR18oAT2FjnoWoVj-ufLnIaGeLHLh4d20AfoHKB3MKQn2iJsThwUvvUF2qg&h=AT2H5rEWdBUsryX94KXL2-NM7uPhKw-ByLVc9g7_1qfrWfgSyenao5d3gdBLPlj_Dwo09VkzAcRJ2HLEnNrWbbOVo0ld-Yj5em18aNGRK4hH8Td5kznskdjHphl1E2R9sF2c&__tn__=%2CmH-R&c[0]=AT1sU4aqbuRYvdYFYglirCdK5Ya9fGZLn0qH1SKH6xUZ4aA-lvCmHbr3qT-eMyLRU5W61a4dS4K3_Sfp3bVGlBZ6qAR9hSph7xpQ-p-dcRiQDojIu-If05Ntk04vblLYWqBKEyvXKaYG0cRvocYnc2ci-wCcvAc1_U-NmmesaTRD9TDu5tU] to the Department of Health will have significant unintended consequences.
Adequate funding for education and educators will be one of the most important issues we face, and I am calling on every candidate in this race to commit to including this and future pay raises in the MFP to put teachers on a path to the pay they deserve. As Governor, my promise is to not only include this pay raise in the MFP, but also an additional pay raise for teachers. Public educators need certainty, just like our businesses do.
Take a look at some highlights from the campaign this week:
We continue to build momentum in this campaign and aren’t stopping. I’ve enjoyed listening and learning from supporters, elected officials, and small business owners. I want to hear from people in all 64 parishes! Invite us to your backyard event by emailing us at events@wilsonforla.com.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/collage%201.jpg]
Clifton Starks , the President of Shreveport and Vicinity Central Trades and Labor Council , offered me the opportunity to speak with labor leaders in North Louisiana. We had an insightful conversation about wages, working opportunities, and how these issues go hand in hand with addressing education and public safety!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/collage%202.jpg]
I had a great time visiting Steamboat Bill’s Seafood , a small business in Lake Charles that has become a community staple! Small businesses are the backbone of our economy, and places like Steamboat Bill’s give Louisiana a chance to showcase what we do best.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/collage%203.jpg]
I joined Sunday services with Pastor Edward Alexander, Jr . at Christian Baptist Church in Southwest Louisiana. Pastor Alexander also serves as the President of the Louisiana Baptist Convention . I additionally visited New Covenant Faith Baptist Church, where Pastor Jimmy Stevens delivered a masterful sermon. Pastor Stevens is the head of the 7th District Baptist Association, where my home church is a member. I also had the opportunity to attend Mount Calvary Lake Charles, led by Rev. Elmore Garner. Rocki and I enjoyed the Women’s Day service and a chance to connect with the community.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/collage%204.jpg]
Alexandria, come out to Aspen Bleu next Thursday for a meet & greet hosted by the Central Louisiana Democratic Women to hear about my vision for Louisiana and how YOU can help us claim victory in the fall!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/Wilson%20Aspen%20Bleu.png]
Mark your calendars for June 25th from 3-5 PM at the Abita Springs Town Hall for a meet and greet sponsored by the Northshore Democratic Women's Club! Come hear Dustin Granger and I talk about the issues that matter most for Louisianans.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/dustin%20and%20wilson.png]
To learn more about my candidacy visit wilsonforla.com.
With hope,
Shawn Wilson
HOST SHAWN AT AN EVENT [events@wilsonforla.com?subject=Host%20Shawn%20At%20An%20Event]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
ENDORSE [https://www.wilsonforla.com/endorse]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Wilson for Louisiana
P.O. Box 4572
Baton Rouge, LA 70821
United States

name: Tennessee Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Remember the Tennessee Three?
body:
It’s clear: Republicans will stop at nothing to keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy. With your help, we can equip Dems with the resources they need to defeat the GOP and win across the country. | | |
---
| | Here’s an update on the situation in Tennessee: **FIRST:** TN House Republicans voted to expel Democratic state Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson for joining student-led, peaceful protests in support of gun violence prevention. **THEN:** Democrats nationwide denounced the GOP’s actions. President Biden called the expulsion _shocking and undemocratic._ President Obama said it _added to an erosion of civility and democratic norms._ **NOW: Special election dates have officially been set in Tennessee – and we need Reps. Jones and Pearson to know that we have their backs as they run for their original seats.** [Rush a donation of $7 to show your support and elect state Dems nationwide »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURt3B-Jxc4nNvF-EVj5ZQXoudGFY_XZ5IR8hymLuqYmTBuNd70_4jqQp786m8zqUKdp3I991a8tJkXDYZl864wC9LGggt8pHQL7iCfbcfFiL-Ddt0qaJZa58jmlvszhWLp4CHVhIBCN3yfGNv2kBrgwtawP_Y-nUajwIspqmdbgc8kfyLtkHhKuxRMw8QVWrfvgVpNEQlmXaoxn3813jHFbvYL1WcN4oO0RVx0-z3FRNi8BtgOp5tRdvzPyJD-EdMWf__wHGlx35a2WLyPKzIPATeH4f1n7hoT953kIA_uBu0z0iAg3Nu_8kUIsrTFSC6ecCbiymx0jVxhQeEGa7BsGXWuxi8B07WnYF_SVdP48S3LNuJ9n6_lEa66szF8yafgR/3wx/UCzAuiC3TTOMPLjjH7oR8Q/h0/_QEVR8u9ABpuHGdoyqukwa0Ef-s6oxn7wQI6PU2EBVs) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

It’s clear: The Republican Party will stop at _nothing_ – including silencing their political opposition – to hinder our progress, maintain the status quo, and keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy.
But with your help, we can equip Democratic candidates with the resources they need to overcome these challenges and win across the country. Together, we will build a brighter future for all.
[Make your first donation of the year right now: Your immediate contribution of $7 or $25 will directly support things like grassroots organizing, voter outreach, candidate recruitment efforts, and more in states like Tennessee.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURt3B-Jxc4nNvF-EVj5ZQXoudGFY_XZ5IR8hymLuqYmTBuNd70_4jqQp786m8zqUKdp3I991a8tJkXDYZl864wC9LGggt8pHQL7iCfbcfFiL-Ddt0qaJZa58jmlvszhWLp4CHVhIBCN3yfGNv2kBrgwtbrAGui3oSpfocv4UkCb8U-B3_MrVjKnnSsGdMXExpar8urxSIhw3QbPxHT2hKeD2fXBOZMDNiaLk8-A5U3ZNnnNyPWdnmxgZF8DVrk3dNHmmKPUZfJGspTdC3dMyxvihDPmpqOx6KJkHk1BZlAxV-p_NlzJu_0irx3R3hg229QeUA4W77frIteblszWzW2pO4eSqIDD-QDlTtyNvPHZwB7Ut2gybWuqeUiPQ2sc7tRl/3wx/UCzAuiC3TTOMPLjjH7oR8Q/h6/FvTdBs-ZcaCcPWS7M3ffMUP0LJBGV-DCi68WNXwHOuY)
These special elections are an opportunity for grassroots supporters like yourself to support the DLCC, the organization at the forefront of electing Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson to state legislatures. **Your contribution will bolster our efforts in states like Tennessee and help fight for progressive values nationwide.**
Thank you for your unwavering commitment to building a better America. Your support makes all the difference.
With gratitude,
Team DLCC
P.S. Don't miss this opportunity! clean_body: It’s clear: Republicans will stop at nothing to keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy. With your help, we can equip Dems with the resources they need to defeat the GOP and win across the country. | | | | | Here’s an update on the situation in Tennessee: FIRST: TN House Republicans voted to expel Democratic state Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson for joining student-led, peaceful protests in support of gun violence prevention. THEN: Democrats nationwide denounced the GOP’s actions. President Biden called the expulsion shocking and undemocratic. President Obama said it added to an erosion of civility and democratic norms. NOW: Special election dates have officially been set in Tennessee – and we need Reps. Jones and Pearson to know that we have their backs as they run for their original seats. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | It’s clear: The Republican Party will stop at nothing – including silencing their political opposition – to hinder our progress, maintain the status quo, and keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy. But with your help, we can equip Democratic candidates with the resources they need to overcome these challenges and win across the country. Together, we will build a brighter future for all. These special elections are an opportunity for grassroots supporters like yourself to support the DLCC, the organization at the forefront of electing Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson to state legislatures. Your contribution will bolster our efforts in states like Tennessee and help fight for progressive values nationwide. Thank you for your unwavering commitment to building a better America. Your support makes all the difference. With gratitude, Team DLCC P.S. Don't miss this opportunity! By making a donation today, you'll not only help elect Democrats in places like Tennessee but also contribute to our national efforts to strengthen Democratic power at the state level. | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b0dd5c80156348c19478311c53194eda&_e=8bjOyjelZzQYX3e7DXPO4Z0Own7s-jpXt7TfvJxtjJlkMYVSidTNoOvhfVhyHteyEEH07UD2P4GXNCyw8508u_OpPgpXjAXZjok6XBFJuQ44kU1Ldo5r9R_ivjS6JpFMVTBlMrrWZImlhByMElxQV_uUaj20fR_f_zEcIuqJCdp3Jz5pOm3U5RDhAF9rxXBrUd-cH27_vIrdsUtSPtRJuw%3D%3D)

Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. Get informed on breaking news, politics, business, sports, world affairs, science, technology, and many other topics with a single email - a 5-minute read, once-a-day - delivered directly to your email inbox.

You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public.

This massive shift happening in the American Media is a good thing. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people.

We work for you (for free). ^ more on that in a minute First, Ask yourself: 1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading? ---|--- 2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information?? 3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important? Instead of being a Fake News victim — sign up today for a FREE newsletter called . Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. Get informed on breaking news, politics, business, sports, world affairs, science, technology, and many other topics with a single email - a 5-minute read, once-a-day - delivered directly to your email inbox. You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public. This massive shift happening in the American Media is a good thing. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people. Don't don't get left behind & miss this EXCLUSIVE opportunity to sign up for FREE today. | The chance to join for free is a limited time offer and once we're out of spots it may not be offered again. We are 100% committed to delivering TRUE news that is easy to read & timely, but we can't keep it free forever. Get your spot now before we run out of room! ---|--- > | News with just FACTS - Direct to your inbox. ---|--- > | Avoid the corporate news media's bias and spin. > | Save time. Let us sift through all the important news—so you don’t have to. > | Join hundreds of thousands of other Americans getting their news every morning from - for FREE! * | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001 | You are recieving this at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you deserve access to trustworthy news. This email has been sent on a partner list. ---|---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
I need you to understand what we’re up against, Peter.

\-- Republicans just raised $50 MILLION to expand their reign of chaos in the House.
\-- Kevin McCarthy is raking in over $400K PER DAY to buy himself another term as Speaker.
\-- We just learned MAGA Republicans launched an ad blitz against 35 (!!!) House Democrats. **[_Peter, if we can’t fight back against these MAGA attacks -- and fast -- our chances of taking back the House will vanish. It’s as simple as that. That’s why I critically need EVERY grassroots Democrat to confirm their 2023 Democratic Membership in the next 13 hours to help me raise an UNPRECEDENTED fundraising haul for my Democratic colleagues, OUTRAISE MAGA Republicans, and SQUASH their hopes of regaining full power. name: Letitia James
subject: Happy Pride, New York! 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
Happy Pride, Peter!
All month long, LGBTQ+ communities across the nation will take to the streets to proudly and joyfully reassert that their voices will not be silenced, their culture will not be wiped away, and they are _NOT _going anywhere.
I couldn't be more excited to march alongside my friends, neighbors, and loved ones in this year's Pride March in NYC – just as I have every June for decades now.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64626499/410708870/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1103-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTRhOTcyNy1hMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjaX9c-ibx3CDbUX1-lXlRCCiZk2aoF-th81-lJ-A2w=)
These last few months have been a test of our persistence and our courage. We've celebrated some wins – such as the passage of the Respect for Marriage Act – but we've also been dealt several blows in the form of a _record_ number of anti-LGBTQ+ bills that have been introduced and enacted in far-right states across our nation.
But we have proven time and time again that we are stronger than the GOP's hate-filled attacks – especially when we're standing together. That's why I vow to keep my foot on the gas and never stop fighting for equality and the freedom to be who you are meant to be – and I know you'll be there with me every step of the way.
So, Peter, this Pride Month, we take to the streets and celebrate. And then, when the last scrap of confetti is cleared and the crowds have dispersed, we continue our decades-long fight for LGBTQ+ rights.
The fight continues – and so will I.

Letitia
| | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, Letitia is counting on people like you to fuel her fight for justice, progress, and true equality. **Will you make a donation to make sure Letitia can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?**

One thing I know for sure is that his absolute favorite part of being on the campaign trail is talking with folks like you one-on-one about the issues that matter to you -- what you're passionate about, what keeps you up at night, and what you want to change in your community. And now’s your chance to have your very own conversation with him! Yesterday, we launched a contest where one lucky supporter (and a guest) will get to meet Joe and Jill -- and the flight and hotel stay are on us! Fellow American,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b91b03b252c24329924f12656b3dd2d6&_e=7m2NKzUPkx-sC49dWqiXKHBMtv0WnQgvwl4PCDFlUnR1-AGcJrG1I54h4eXPstEhp_UxkKGdy3WihgO6cYwiFxvOpJHhFWEgX1ZjG0lqcgb6OnRb0odQfAebDquHP1OfWS0CnKIhFRZpZyH8hit0BWanPkDOyFkmE-XOVD2RheSOu31Hz51CzBd_7E3Mv_k-T1anEN5hNGuA7QfBwDhxyxW-bS1jivEGPck1j1QJC4aQ4jaoYcSrxVfSh-Srg5ADpA3p9LQ_eV4DZWoldNPX_U2uS44ueHc0K6r5oCCKkVSASm6i78MKN_jU86EWI9B-CpkUWhcwnaGrahbkPS3QOVHYd-P_DSmYG9vTTudmmPSiuGtDu6ddAn-Etw3iY-tm)

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b91b03b252c24329924f12656b3dd2d6&_e=7m2NKzUPkx-sC49dWqiXKHBMtv0WnQgvwl4PCDFlUnR1-AGcJrG1I54h4eXPstEhp_UxkKGdy3WihgO6cYwiFxvOpJHhFWEgX1ZjG0lqcgb6OnRb0odQfAebDquHP1OfWS0CnKIhFRZpZyH8hit0BWanPkDOyFkmE-XOVD2RheSOu31Hz51CzBd_7E3Mv_k-T1anEN5hNGuA7QfBwDhxyxW-bS1jivEGPck1j1QJC4YO--l45vZain9goOwGjOJ3nneLtns7rCnpteSLi2365hez2WGbSZzDKrV4EcIDYaKVmCMoe66dqR5bwXr0bxupGsESK4J02onHZH_UDFzO7yXDEtfKZSj0-YdQYV2Z_FIlI4pSEh3SDynZc9-skNvx)**_

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of these facts. | | Fellow American, TRUTH. There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them: | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. body:
I am the outsider Washington DC hates. They know I will bring meaningful change and dismantle the system that has brought this country down.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=543b212afc6546c4b57189046c20a0f0&_t=TDvhbTBujKCyyrfUzm0LT7syrYSM6IKGNe_KVs86NtLm-GE443njUxnqokmkZAcKRm6eBb_gm6-Vlyfgus1zvnZS0egMrmK3qfXtdOmSL5s%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=543b212afc6546c4b57189046c20a0f0&_t=TDvhbTBujKCyyrfUzm0LT7syrYSM6IKGNe_KVs86NtLm-GE443njUxnqokmkZAcKRm6eBb_gm6-Vlyfgus1zvnZS0egMrmK3qfXtdOmSL5s%3D)

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=543b212afc6546c4b57189046c20a0f0&_e=K2Qcx_A76tW3FIqTEoFxIPPgL01xmt3bo8O3-6EWs5WMwb44fVYx1mfZP-S3J62LJEG9Q6zoIYcv0mYkUSC1RAg7nBuJKiNoSeojc6qCqzWoZXZpMrluBizkj9XIPitkq1rUVDQmAHNx2Nayp5yzgQDHNiBEbQd3sI_7HJy29MekQ0U3IxAOruXbsF05SR4-o8uig6YrAxnDwsL6LiSSU_vGp1KGaFkf0OEf25S_cA48aio1Bb0-K8nBWgRB2GbZFtRxOxLzTWvSd9ayDaqqCfyV1_14vDQRVKTk0wSyEQPiUu0vlSg6Hth9Ar_U0zSF7ntaWapsxET8a9X_w4gj2M1D_NtBSOP4UIs_lKCjXVUjOhABgsnzfQ7lXMcQhk60YMUKKPijIfioMOoUtn2wYw%3D%3D)
Peter, you may have heard other candidates promising to “drain the swamp,” but they never do.

_That's why I am different._

I am talking about America First 2.0 - taking America First further by doing it with first principles. **[Here are the policy commitments I would make on day ONE.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=543b212afc6546c4b57189046c20a0f0&_e=K2Qcx_A76tW3FIqTEoFxIPPgL01xmt3bo8O3-6EWs5WMwb44fVYx1mfZP-S3J62LJEG9Q6zoIYcv0mYkUSC1RAg7nBuJKiNoSeojc6qCqzWoZXZpMrluBizkj9XIPitkq1rUVDQmAHNx2Nayp5yzgQDHNiBEbQd3sI_7HJy29MekQ0U3IxAOruXbsF05SR4-o8uig6YrAxnDwsL6LiSSU_vGp1KGaFkf0OEf25S_cA48aio1Bb0-K8nBWgRB2GbZ59v9MbMm9XsYry2kk07PIeEr1p_RvvPalojB4yYkHqqkwiFOhjNpdc2RBD9HoUeVKS44GMW3UNiq-1T8_2ZOmpJLyVuKCeiqdNbzITczPZdyV64LbwC3czlIXcBeAJL4zbARtVQVRe9vCV-UvFZ4YQ%3D%3D)**

| [** JOIN THE AMERICA FIRST 2.0 MOVEMENT ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=543b212afc6546c4b57189046c20a0f0&_e=K2Qcx_A76tW3FIqTEoFxIPPgL01xmt3bo8O3-6EWs5WMwb44fVYx1mfZP-S3J62LJEG9Q6zoIYcv0mYkUSC1RAg7nBuJKiNoSeojc6qCqzWoZXZpMrluBizkj9XIPitkq1rUVDQmAHNx2Nayp5yzgQDHNiBEbQd3sI_7HJy29MekQ0U3IxAOruXbsF05SR4-o8uig6YrAxnDwsL6LiSSU_vGp1KGaFkf0OEf25S_cA48aio1Bb0-K8nBWgRB2GbZyqO2eLy_Rq4n8PCBT6HTLuCd2q1m6GxR_L9CBsx02RA1n8eH264C3jrNPc980PfStV1QSHueRlVvUXJ4BF6GXUBfmJzZ1ETa6w6v87T0ttZFTMc1yo-PGRjYffTuNwtvWfDP5rcorZsknxw83xYQOw%3D%3D)
---

America First didn't start in 2016. It started in 1776. Putting America First requires moral authority, not just vengeance and grievance. I am promising:

* **Reviving American national identity.** From securing our borders to ending cultural extremism, we need to recognize that our country is better when we identify as Americans - not by artificial labels
* **Revitalize the American economy again.** Bring back American energy independence, American jobs for American citizens, and stabilize the dollar.
* **Holding China accountable for their American intellectual property theft and awful human rights violations.** The China-Russia alliance is the #1 threat to American security.
* **Truly dismantle the bureaucracy in DC.** Reform and rebuild governmental agencies and transform waste into a balanced budget.
* **Finally end the weaponization of the Federal Government.** From the DOJ to the FBI, taxpayers should not be funding politically motivated attacks on individuals and undermine the entire political process.

[** FIGHT FOR THE FUTURE OF OUR COUNTRY ->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=543b212afc6546c4b57189046c20a0f0&_e=K2Qcx_A76tW3FIqTEoFxIPPgL01xmt3bo8O3-6EWs5WMwb44fVYx1mfZP-S3J62LJEG9Q6zoIYcv0mYkUSC1RAg7nBuJKiNoSeojc6qCqzWoZXZpMrluBizkj9XIPitkq1rUVDQmAHNx2Nayp5yzgQDHNiBEbQd3sI_7HJy29MekQ0U3IxAOruXbsF05SR4-o8uig6YrAxnDwsL6LiSSU_vGp1KGaFkf0OEf25S_cA48aio1Bb0-K8nBWgRB2GbZPo9mABMwzaXMQiydhhDZNLbfBigejyphS4h1qvPVwR2RHEc6LzsBd7cMX6oHRK3SK7EN1C82Cm2bgwr41DCdG49bk3k6rC6iH8EolXnuBIgZYi_8OPuzsCDQYcnL5FXxUHPMvtnEy1jneMNWeMHFHg%3D%3D)
---

Peter, I cannot emphasize enough how important a return to American values will correct the course our country is heading in. America First wasn't my idea - it was our founding fathers.

Years of inaction and unfulfilled promises from the liberal left have changed the landscape of the country - **[but with your support, we will take the vision back. Whether it's $1, $5 or $25, help continue to bring home the America First ideals we cherish.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=543b212afc6546c4b57189046c20a0f0&_e=K2Qcx_A76tW3FIqTEoFxIPPgL01xmt3bo8O3-6EWs5WMwb44fVYx1mfZP-S3J62LJEG9Q6zoIYcv0mYkUSC1RAg7nBuJKiNoSeojc6qCqzWoZXZpMrluBizkj9XIPitkq1rUVDQmAHNx2Nayp5yzgQDHNiBEbQd3sI_7HJy29MekQ0U3IxAOruXbsF05SR4-o8uig6YrAxnDwsL6LiSSU_vGp1KGaFkf0OEf25S_cA48aio1Bb0-K8nBWgRB2GbZN_ODnBH4Jjkb53asITD4CePi2NRQyQxAmtrC9DDEtVVG5I3utcpi-bNQ0GuRKnchex0vAuWeJP7YlfQs6l09CCvxzXZCNY9hULJJGKBjD0_1yDR47_ICqOfFanywtgj54-BlRwxDFLrJ3xQqJNAjjQ%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

Years of inaction and unfulfilled promises from the liberal left have changed the landscape of the country - Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Friend,
I have been summoned to appear at a federal court in Miami, Florida on Tuesday, June 13 at 3:00 P.M. for the SHAM indictment by the Biden-Harris Department of Justice.
Details of my arraignment are still developing... As reported by _Forbes:_
“It is likely Trump will be arrested, booked and taken into custody before he appears before a judge...DNA samples are sometimes taken from federal defendants so they can be profiled...”
While there are still many uncertainties concerning Tuesday, one thing remains certain: **_my resolve to save our country has only gotten stronger._**
What the Biden Department of Justice has done to me is downright un-American – and I will fight this until the end to ensure we PREVAIL.
I could throw in the towel tomorrow, close down my 2024 presidential campaign, and all charges against me would magically be dropped!
But I wouldn’t just be turning my back on our campaign. _I would be turning my back on our country._
Because if the Deep State can get off scot-free with threatening its single biggest opponent, then America will be lost forever.
And I could NEVER turn my back on America.
America has given me the world: a beautiful family, a wonderful life, and the chance to give back to the USA.
_Mark my words: I will save this country if it’s the last thing I do._

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64627352/410712436/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230610_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZkYjQ0MTYtYTMwNy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x1LTq5pPGjGBfDLsXJ1z4od5wjcW63CSjB4P_v1P5mk=)
---
Peter, We’re preparing for the mifepristone case to be appealed all the way to the Supreme Court — and we can’t help but be worried about how the justices will rule when it does. It was almost exactly a year ago that the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and opened the country up to the onslaught of regressive, dystopian abortion restrictions we see in place all over the country. This Court is sending our country backwards — that’s why we’re calling for Court reform before it’s too late. Our Supreme Court is broken. MULTIPLE seats were stolen by Mitch McConnell’s obstruction in the Senate. Clarence Thomas is allowed to accept (and lie about) obscenely expensive gifts from a Republican mega donor, while his wife helps organize a coup, with no consequence. **These are the people who have our rights in their hands.** We must not sit by as a corrupt court takes away our rights.**** The time to reform the Court is now. [_**If you agree, please sign our petition calling for immediate reform of the Supreme Court. Peter,
---
The chaos happening at the border is **NOT** part of the American Dream.
---
Illegal activity at the border continues to hurt our communities in southern Arizona as cartels become more advanced in evading CBP and law enforcement.
---
_During every visit to the border, agents on the ground have emphasized to me the urgent need for action on this issue._
---
**It’s past time to send a strong and powerful message to the cartels.**
---
That’s why I’m working to ensure that we prosecute any and all individuals aiding and abetting the illicit activity of criminal organizations to the fullest extent of the law.
---
_We have to do everything we can to stop the cartels from destroying this country and we need your help._
---

Cartels controlling the southern border are smuggling drugs and violent criminals into the U.S., endangering Americans, and posing a national security threat to our country.
---
_They have taken advantage of our porous border and our border communities are bearing the brunt of it._
---
Nearly 100 known or suspected terrorists were arrested at the border last year.
---
Fentanyl has become the leading cause of death for adults in the U.S., with 645 million lethal doses seized in just March alone.
---
**And until we take back the border from the cartels, things are just going to get worse.**
---
__We must increase penalties for anyone aiding a cartel and diminish dangerous cartel activity and take the safety of our communities seriously.__
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help FIGHT BACK against the cartels to secure our border, protect this country, and preserve the American Dream for future generations.**](https://links.ciscomaniforarizona.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=db65aed7a1a6480c8b49bdf7ec31bfa3&_e=W8sBI68rGWHWMI96mT5gIAa_XHHdG8OJxKTN8Iiy_Gl0rU1UcODbbTfUH5ntJrqxvKXcuWqPDwdd9SnSjA4Pwndf9byS8SFw8YWD3WzG9ceXgl8t_ylu_J8exCojcce15EmxsAwwRCmuLs33n4CGUMOmvkEGVUfo6_YYdNrM6riQFx_Vq-PQswri9zvZgVgLu8HSQ5KBkfZam7jL8boMoD_xVKs6Ki159Yk41dW1_T3kt98Ki35UlMpHH2Batbzi4UXkR5K2kaB5eCzVJ6q1Fl1zMWsHJ37by2b7q7UahSPG-QDqp9buDWBmRpl17aZ2_ix6ebu9YOcsGZeXHWbnzbg5N80F_2ERSGfN07uCcUgGx6gjQrvr-wG1VmBmP6T1KicnigY9_x6EHBeBn-4wfprmMPZDJMoUehV5NzgzWKqYoHLRT6MXHsWMg7s-iXy4b2DsZwDRmw_olXqpmt-zzA%3D%3D)

clean_body: We have to defend our national security. | Peter, The chaos happening at the border is NOT part of the American Dream. Illegal activity at the border continues to hurt our communities in southern Arizona as cartels become more advanced in evading CBP and law enforcement. During every visit to the border, agents on the ground have emphasized to me the urgent need for action on this issue. It’s past time to send a strong and powerful message to the cartels. That’s why I’m working to ensure that we prosecute any and all individuals aiding and abetting the illicit activity of criminal organizations to the fullest extent of the law. We have to do everything we can to stop the cartels from destroying this country and we need your help. Cartels controlling the southern border are smuggling drugs and violent criminals into the U.S., endangering Americans, and posing a national security threat to our country. They have taken advantage of our porous border and our border communities are bearing the brunt of it. Nearly 100 known or suspected terrorists were arrested at the border last year. Fentanyl has become the leading cause of death for adults in the U.S., with 645 million lethal doses seized in just March alone. And until we take back the border from the cartels, things are just going to get worse. We must increase penalties for anyone aiding a cartel and diminish dangerous cartel activity and take the safety of our communities seriously. Thank you, Rep. Juan Ciscomani Arizona’s 6th Congressional District PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

We might be biased, but Michelle is one of our favorite people. She does so much to represent and give back to her community — from running her family’s Pulga to running for Congress, everyday she is fighting to make life better for the people of South Texas. And to celebrate that, we want to do a little something to support her in what matters most — her fight for economic opportunity in TX-15, our veterans, affordable healthcare and ensuring that all South Texans can achieve their American Dream. Thank you for helping us make Michelle’s birthday a blast! Team Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, this is the state of our country after we failed to hold the House: We came DANGEROUSLY close to defaulting on our debt Social Security & Medicaid are on the chopping block Abortion rights are under attack across the country. Extreme MAGA Republicans like MTG are in key committee appointments — even serving as Speaker Pro Tempore. LGBTQ+ communities are being persecuted more than we’ve EVER seen. THE ONLY THING KEEPING US FROM TOTAL DESTRUCTION? OUR SENATE MAJORITY | Here’s the deal: 2024 is going to be an incredibly competitive year in the Senate and Democrats are SERIOUSLY at risk of losing our majority. That’s where we come in. We’ve done the work before (like when we helped elect Raphael Warnock in Georgia -TWICE) and we know how to do it AGAIN , in key races across the country. It’s simple: we can invest in races now and help candidates like Barbara Lee and Colin Allred win or we can risk losing our Senate Majority. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me. Now I am asking for you to take a chance on this campaign.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
If we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort.

| Peter -

The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way.

I want loving relationships with my family. I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.

Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me.

I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs, to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.

**The truth is, Senator Sinema has been an advocate for the rich and powerful in the Senate.**

But those folks have enough advocates there.

It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

That’s why I am running.

But if we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort.

I couldn’t get to where I am in life without help. And I can’t win this race either. It’s going to take all of us to win. So I am asking:

[_**Can I count on you to split $10 between Stop Gun Violence PAC and our Senate campaign? clean_body: If we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort. | Peter - The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way. I want loving relationships with my family. I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals. Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me. I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs, to name just two. Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress. The truth is, Senator Sinema has been an advocate for the rich and powerful in the Senate. But those folks have enough advocates there. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help. That’s why I am running. But if we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort. I couldn’t get to where I am in life without help. And I can’t win this race either. It’s going to take all of us to win. clean_body: | | | | He’ll make a mockery of the process and once again hand the Presidency to Biden | The Official Super PAC Supporting Chris Christie for President Friend, Chris Christie is running for President. Before Chris Christie can face off against Joe Biden, he needs to first defeat Donald Trump in the primary and liberate Republicans from his bullying, blaming, and endless lies. But, in accordance with Republican National Committee rules, he can’t make it to the debate stage unless he receives 40,000 unique donors. | According to Donald Trump, he has never made a mistake, has never done anything wrong, has never lost, and when something has gone wrong it’s always been someone else’s fault. Yet isn’t he the same man who lost to Joe Biden, the oldest, most radical, and incapable President in history? We’re facing out of control inflation, a porous border, crime running rampant in many parts of our country, and the ejection of parents from our public education system, thanks to Donald Trump. He’s done plenty of losing and made plenty of mistakes. He just needs someone who isn’t afraid to back down to call him out on it all. That’s where Chris Christie comes in. Sparring with Trump doesn’t phase Chris, and the insults Trump is going to inevitably hurl his way don’t bother him in the slightest. Frankly, if you want to hear from any 2024 Presidential candidate in the debate besides Trump, you need to ensure Christie is on the stage – because no one else dares to speak over him, stop him, and call him out! | Thank you, Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. The Climate Crisis impacts us all, but not equally.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64628169/410715375/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230610CodeRed_N_TEAM_90do_7_G_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2M2ViMDQ4LWE1MDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KV7BQlH1oFYCYqstm20yQJjXTkntg9AQKp794ciCvPA=)
| Fellow activist, there is no debate. The climate crisis is here, **burning our world and poisoning our air. We’re not just fighting for a distant future anymore.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64628170/410715376/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230610CodeRed_N_TEAM_90do_7_G_A_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2M2ViMDQ4LWE1MDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KV7BQlH1oFYCYqstm20yQJjXTkntg9AQKp794ciCvPA=) Unprecedented Canadian wildfires, intensified by record-high temperatures and abnormal droughts, raged out of control and created toxic smoke that poisoned our air here in Pennsylvania this week.

Meanwhile, the Republican-controlled State Senate was hard at work passing legislation to... rename the Department of Environmental Protection to the Department of Environmental Services.

**Because they don’t like the “connotation” that its purpose is to enforce the law and protect our environment.**

**[Fellow activist, we wish we were kidding, but this is the unfortunate reality of the PA GOP. Can you pitch in $10 today to help us expand the electorate and elect leaders that prioritize our people in the midst of the climate crisis?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64628171/410715377/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230610CodeRed_N_TEAM_90do_7_G_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2M2ViMDQ4LWE1MDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KV7BQlH1oFYCYqstm20yQJjXTkntg9AQKp794ciCvPA=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64628172/410715378/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230610CodeRed_N_TEAM_90do_7_G_A_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2M2ViMDQ4LWE1MDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KV7BQlH1oFYCYqstm20yQJjXTkntg9AQKp794ciCvPA=) This disaster was not just a wake-up call to the reality that the climate crisis is already here; it was a reminder that it disproportionately harms the most vulnerable and neglected communities.

Toxic smoke is far more harmful to those whose lungs have already been damaged by poor air quality and those who cannot take shelter. Black, Indigenous, and other people of color are significantly more likely to be exposed to harmful climate environments.

**[Climate justice is racial justice, and both depend on democracy. clean_body: The Climate Crisis impacts us all, but not equally. = | Fellow activist, there is no debate. The climate crisis is here, burning our world and poisoning our air. We’re not just fighting for a distant future anymore. = Unprecedented Canadian wildfires, intensified by record-high temperatures and abnormal droughts, raged out of control and created toxic smoke that poisoned our air here in Pennsylvania this week. Meanwhile, the Republican-controlled State Senate was hard at work passing legislation to... rename the Department of Environmental Protection to the Department of Environmental Services. Because they don’t like the “connotation” that its purpose is to enforce the law and protect our environment. = = This disaster was not just a wake-up call to the reality that the climate crisis is already here; it was a reminder that it disproportionately harms the most vulnerable and neglected communities. Toxic smoke is far more harmful to those whose lungs have already been damaged by poor air quality and those who cannot take shelter. Black, Indigenous, and other people of color are significantly more likely to be exposed to harmful climate environments. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

If we had to rehash every attack Adam has faced since our last deadline, the truth is we’d have to keep you here all day.
In the last week alone, Donald Trump released a campaign ad with some truly unhinged images of Adam, and MAGA Republicans in Congress continue their retribution campaign to censure him.
And less than 48 hours ago, the Department of Justice indicted Donald Trump on federal charges of mishandling classified materials and potential obstruction during their investigation. We know he’ll weaponize this indictment for his political gain, just like he did for his impeachment, so the attacks are only going to ramp up from here.

body:
Summer Lee was able to overcome $4 million in attacks from outside groups. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvxJ2YVgc5nMB0RBWyVIhURjh0ncjI_Wo8ulcCKs0F9GsKtIm3NBDy965Lt0Ol1VAR9Oz5M11wNjZc3bFq3t8z5wsWio52bvnbT_LK2D5J-v2wfFJfOUojBgRkfdAlvAYZsr-HOjCu0C5wVIbA44lQw0AAKN_AUKxgJDE8iW5fVikuK49XtHmRW5q4twqFgNXwHB6KSkUzIhI25gPmybidSA/3wx/mbYv-IoFTTK-s2yVdCUTXw/h0/RXg269ygAcT1cEHoT5O-blqxMtcPeUOiR7l0l54ZkuM)

Friend, In just her first 5 months in Congress, Rep. Summer Lee has distinguished herself as a critical progressive ally, fighting back against right-wing hate and the unjust status quo. This month, I stood side-by-side with Summer as we both voted against a Republican-led budget that rewarded Kevin McCarthy for GOP hostage taking. Summer has stood by my side in our shared struggle for the rights of marginalized communities―from LGBTQ+ rights to Palestinian rights. Summer hasn't backed down in fighting for climate justice. **Last year, Summer overcame more than $4 million in attack ads and mailers from outside groups, including AIPAC, to become the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress.** Now, she’s preparing for her first re-election campaign and an onslaught of special interest attacks, which want to silence Summer and other strong women of color. [**Will you split a donation between my and Summer Lee’s campaigns today to send us back to Congress to fight for you?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rN3LXcCRrvuPS9i3hss7lLkW4vVEvtouWm10WIjppD0OFwPmoKFj4iA0y1h5bJE8U7yDr8GVo95WP_tNMB-9x_2HXH3wmz8ZCjjKIaNpCFp3ugjeHxGQr1C9-9UkzRSO-6PLpFo93unMxKwboZnQKp70zFT7_bWfSgv95HURn87MzKjIszva4UW0oisVpyRIoMzd6TetL8SfWyASbW9_FP5C6B2aXvEGU0FBXmb5Ega2zJKcG1bmOi-6mxaxZF5XxI7sqFb6J6l5_7ljgyfxixjnvDxE9gx7SuBCTT862dy26IlZ-slGpt-MEpqzhzZzPaw/3wx/mbYv-IoFTTK-s2yVdCUTXw/h1/CEoUuAS69oC5SiBbEICEbt6oWAmeL1-XCuYmaRulokc) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rNxIusAANPD6QecfCTKwLlWAtHIN-vTDRusT6vd5pCSQNbO4MGnmUfotruh9-mzGZn9jJb1CAEd2dTp8J89l9N5RxHCK_5cuIziMfKxELy-TIM0_OnrQ3fRdWKDaVsl5QkBFAYNAor2Kmcr3F5hYgFG4BaTb-YGmxgpgLAlEYwreP0kWP9X77uRpSKDeFFV7nyWUQftX_TXkFMsZ9FUNqXejNxgAHbu19HjYJE8jrgS-6QB9_ceHwfCd9n2SgFlZ7LCwk7mVW5SPl26c-dCONCd14PMSP1_sJHN0PF8r2jxc82xQYlAnzI1v1UA5z8lfhaQ/3wx/mbYv-IoFTTK-s2yVdCUTXw/h2/Wi4gcr_YZve46t5ze_g5xKAKaS7fA5MCfq1o19hgIeU)

Before being elected to Congress, Summer already had a proven track record as an organizer and state legislator who has fought against corporate greed, systemic racism, labor exploitation, and environmental dangers.
**One of Summer’s top issues is environmental justice, because her region suffers from some of the worst air quality in the country.** Like me, her priorities include fully funding the replacement of all lead water lines—and ensuring that clean air and water are treated like the human rights they are.
[**I need Summer fighting by my side in Congress for years to come. Rush a contribution today to Summer Lee’s re-election campaign and send a progressive champion back to Congress to fight for us and the rights of all marginalized communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rN-mAJPN0Ub__cHz4AaQTVFVVHpk97hfmpHEwccylZiJ-ordGipdTyMUxzD6lIDljk9CYY08fp-FmqaSERS3XrMDdqNvUJoh2OZ85azYX544cVvY6Ho5_RnvqY-OA73IVAMq0ccM25zly_KHlesVAJiORZIr0j9K0IAdXplsLT-qTSen_02pwTr5BH8I-usvrQcmaXZcDeXs0cY3EVonTZs7KIEVNYv_9YpRxWMxRJCTFzRvpCLDiXp1_GWnrevFEAGpkIwkm1suSqRaXnhBudx_8eT6Rqczw3QRAm5HbmBgwzz6HybrcSFt7Jr8fgIqQEw/3wx/mbYv-IoFTTK-s2yVdCUTXw/h3/t2vGROPpigtTiqKDsdo1_hzUyFBCeUpqr8H-ikS_6fA)

Fellow Conservative,

On April 27th, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he's challenging Joe Manchin for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=12abb4052bce4febbd9977cc11c7f51f&_e=I9GCAWHV9Ch189FMqeoIhF6WRkEVXvyOnEOG4oe1wuznHzE049okJ-6P4dYNDzMOI7fWozI2kzScJF6jao8sV_-a00UXAUiaOo7k0u6EYiP8iQrArYJvdiuUOZtZqaNjxkNJCwOLZUr4N8TNf1yb1K3Dsf6EvAEYSrBKCyMF8qf0eSmRoGmU2usFSiSpxESm7jCVa8q4uSFkny56Mnc9Sv9JL1UDWvPRAgmGHvsex7egRo3OIEHZFdE02JQHdXWVWCsqqRUxf8ohUDRubq1_uXy_KqZodSjOWNAZGkQISi4mR2oAkA0XrBwjUGFcZzbJ-lga4ESXqyq1GEp1VIYCdAQC-KwKeJ7GaKaZfwYzvLsqP8u_NOHoZg22slh9d9BY7i4yRCCE6p1L91W7MnB0DJ1ZpKf3v0Ei5WvpIr_jlF4%3D)**

Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Taking action for climate, higher wages, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Climate Chaos & the Dirty Deal | Stop the Mountain Valley
Pipeline | Rally to Raise the Wage + Tips on Top | Critical Virginia
Elections | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

A cloud of heavy smoke hangs in the air from a wildfire burning millions
of acres of Canadian forests, suffocating any doubt that we’re in the
midst of climate chaos.

Our Revolution joined US Rep. Rashida Tlaib and a powerful coalition of
environmental justice groups led by People vs. Fossil Fuels at the White
House on Thursday, calling on President Biden to stop the Mountain
Valley Pipeline which he allowed into the McCarthy debt deal last week.

The MVP pipeline is a disaster in the making - Joe Manchin’s pet project
is set to add millions of tons of emissions to our heating planet.

“The White House needs to understand this isn’t just a climate crisis.
The corruption needs to stop,” Rep. Tlaib [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8708?t=1011&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]told the crowd. “Instead of
the fossil fuel industry inside the White House right now drafting these
bills, it should be the people of the United States.”

“Corporate greed is killing us every single day,” she said. “Don’t tell
me this is about the deficit, this is about making more money!”

Because of our member support, Our Revolution sent hundreds of thousands
of texts and our phonebank teams connected thousands of people with
their representatives, calling on them to strip Manchin's pipeline and
other terrible environmental rollbacks from the debt bill.

All told, 38 members of the Congressional Progressive Caucus and 28
senators voted against the bill, providing insights for the climate
fights ahead, as Our Revolution Deputy Director Paco Fabián [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8709?t=1012&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]explains
in this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8709?t=1013&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]clip.

We must be ready. Big Oil and the right-wing will try to use upcoming
must-pass legislation like the Farm Bill, National Defense Authorization
Act, and Budget Bill to get more giveaways at the expense of our people
and planet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8710?t=1014&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]We need your help. Chip in an extra donation today to invest in our
organizing work so we’re prepared to take on the power of the fossil
fuel industry wherever and whenever it rears its ugly head.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution’s campaign to raise the wage and end subminimum wages for
tipped workers is also heating up!

Senator Bernie Sanders just wrapped up a tour with the growing worker
justice coalition with rally stops in NC, TN, and SC — calling for a $17
federal minimum wage and to raise the tipped wage from the outrageous
$2.13 per hour it’s been stuck at for more than 30 years.

Last week, we joined One Fair Wage activists in Chicago to protest the
National Restaurant Association, and on Thursday we took the fight to
D.C., rallying to demand a full minimum wage for restaurant workers with
tips on top.

“DC voters overwhelmingly approved Initiative 82 - which requires
restaurants to pay a full minimum wage of $16 with tips on top - with
over 70% support last year,” Aaron Chappell, Political Director of Our
Revolution, said during his testimony Thursday afternoon before the D.C.
Council.

“Now the Restaurant Association of DC is trying to undermine this goal
by shifting from tips to service charges and by passing a bill to
exclude restaurants from DC consumer protection laws,” he said.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

VICTORY! The Supreme Court on Thursday preserved the ability of people
with disabilities, older adults and their families to sue when
federally-funded programs like Medicaid aren’t fairly and safely
administered.

The 7-2 decision, which marks Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson’s first
major majority opinion, upheld a lower court’s ruling that the daughter
of Gorgi Talevski could sue an Indiana health care system, wrote [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8711?t=1015&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Vox

Our Revolution Field Director Mike Oles “organized local protests
against the Health and Hospital Corporation of Marion County in Indiana
and was part of the coalition that unsuccessfully attempted to pressure
withdrawal or settlement of the case,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8712?t=1016&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]19th News reports.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is working on legislation to eliminate Medical Debt and
organizing people with medical debt around the country to speak up and
fight for health care justice.

This week, our organizers and patient activists are working to generate
comments to the CFPB to get medical debt excluded from credit reports!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8647?t=1017&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Join our Medical Debt Team to build pressure at every level of
government to cancel medical debt, end price-gouging, guarantee free
care, and stop predatory collection tactics. Our next meeting is this
Thursday at 7 pm ET on Zoom!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

VIRGINIA ELECTIONS: WHAT'S AT STAKE

Elections in Virginia on June 20th can turn the tide against rightwing
extremism - and we have a strong slate of progressives on the ballot!

We must expand Democrats’ slim one-seat majority in the state senate to
hold Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin in check, safeguard the last haven
for reproductive care in the South, and get critical progressive policy
over the finish line.

For State Senate, Our Revolution is proud to be working to elect Ben
Litchfield (SD-27), Heidi Drauschak (SD-35), and Elizabeth Guzman
(SD-29); and for State House, Rozia Henson (D-19).

One of our progressive candidates for VA Senate, Ben Litchfield, is
working with Our Revolution in the fight for affordable housing, quality
education, and more.

Ben knows first-hand about the challenges faced by working class
families. Early in his childhood, his family was ripped apart by the
opioid crisis. His father, a blue-collar worker, got hurt on the job and
became addicted to prescription painkillers, and when those became too
expensive, heroin. Being raised by a single mother shaped Ben’s views on
issues like paid family leave, childcare subsidies, and the struggle to
make ends meet.

“One of my earliest memories is standing in line at the food pantry with
my mother. But, like many working families, giving up was never an
option,” Ben said.

Despite working on campus during college, Ben said he couldn’t afford to
eat and had to return home to get a job and take online classes to save
up to return the following year.

After graduation, he went to work as an attorney at the Consumer
Financial Protection Bureau, assisting in the aftermath of the Financial
Crisis of 2008 and the Great Recession that followed.

“It feels harder for workers to find a job that pays a living wage, for
families to afford housing in the communities where they work, and for
our kids to receive a first-rate education,” Ben said. “That’s why I’m
running for State Senate in Virginia.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1018&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ][IMG]

Early voting is underway and Election Day is June 20th! Our phone bank
team has been making lots of calls for Ben Litchfield and said they’re
having amazing conversations with voters on the ground.

We hope you’ll join our phone bank team to help mobilize voters to stave
off right-wing extremism and win real progressive policy in Virginia and
around the country in this year’s important down-ballot races!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1019&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]MAKE SOME CALLS!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

>

VICTORY! Our Revolution helped get out the vote in California leading up
to a major win for our Troublemakers Slate in the CA Progressive Caucus
leadership election.

Thanks to our members, we were able to reach out to thousands of
California voters by text, email, and more — leading to a landslide
victory over the candidates aligned with corporations and fossil fuels.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohenwill speak at the Healthcare Not
Warfare Forum on Sunday, hosted by Massachusetts Peace Action - LIVE
this Sunday from 2-5:30 pm ET. Larry goes on at 4:30 pm ET.

Larry will join public health leaders from around the country to discuss
how the bloated Pentagon budget is harming the wellbeing of our
communities and families by diverting precious resources away from
healthcare, public health, and research towards war, militarism, and
corporatism.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8713?t=1020&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]TUNE IN TO HEAR THE DISCUSSION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8418?t=1021&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ][IMG]

Our Revolutionis waging campaigns to raise the wage, abolish medical
debt, end fossil fuel subsidies, and more. If you’re not a recurring
monthly donor, sign up to sustain our critical work. If you are already
a member, thank you for supporting this movement!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8418?t=1022&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]HELP SUSTAIN OUR WORK

★ ★ ★

An estimated 41% of Americans are saddled with nearly $200 billion in
medical debt. It forces people to cut back on food and shelter, put off
needed care, and put their lives on credit cards.

Do you owe money for medical care that you couldn’t afford? Have you put
life expenses on credit cards to pay medical bills? [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1023&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Share your
story!

Our goal is to feature voices from every congressional district in
America to build pressure on Congress and the White House to abolish
medical debt at its source.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1024&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]TELL YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1025&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.8I-z1A&t=1007&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.ZV7cWB&t=1008&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.V07bqE&t=1009&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230609_NL_RevReport_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.-frJO1&t=1010&akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4359%2E5885482%2E1W3Syd

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as

Peter, it’s me, Diamond — this is my butt:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=img_video [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=img_video]The only thing I dislike more than a rectal exam is Lauren Boebert’s grandstanding. Did you know she tweeted 23 times against the legislation to avoid an economic catastrophe — but didn’t even cast a vote on it?!
Lauren Boebert is full of $#*!, so let’s keep building the people-powered campaign to kick her out of Congress and make sure folks everywhere see Dr. B’s video featuring yours truly. Chip in $25 or the most generous donation you can right now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=link_CTA1]

Others have tried and failed to beat Boebert, but they didn’t have me and you on their team! If we pull together, Dr. Debby Burnett (yup, that’s her with the big glove!) can and will be the strong woman we need to defeat Boebert once and for all.
I’ve heard there’s a lot at stake: accessing safe abortions, protecting our natural resources, keeping our kids safe in schools, and defending our democracy.
So I’m gonna ask you again: Will you give $25 or whatever you can right now to fuel Debby’s grassroots campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=link_CTA2]
Giddy up!
💎 Diamond, the horse
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of Western and Southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
