name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Building on our progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Sign my petition urging my Senate colleagues to bring the Equality Act to the floor for a vote so we can protect the rights of every LGBTQ American.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=396%2E35263%2EUF0vPg)
Happy Pride Month, Peter! As we celebrate in parades and festivals across Wisconsin, we have to remember that LGBTQ Americans’ fundamental freedoms and civil rights are under attack by Republican governors and state lawmakers across the country. From Florida’s horrific “Don’t Say Gay” bill to Mississippi and Iowa’s recent laws going after medical professionals providing gender-affirming care to minors, the attacks on the LGBTQ community are relentless. Last year, we made incredible progress by passing the _Respect for Marriage Act_. But our work isn’t over yet. Just this year, a record number of anti-LGBTQ legislation have been introduced. **That’s why we cannot stop the fight for progress and equality, Peter. For every step forward we make, far-right lawmakers try to pull us backward.** We need to fight back against these draconian measures and ensure that LGBTQ youth across the country are given the support and equal opportunity they deserve. No LGBTQ American should face discrimination and unjust treatment simply because of who they are and who they love. **Now more than ever, we need to pass the _Equality Act_ so we can guarantee every LGBTQ American the full freedom of equality and protection under federal law.** **[I’m a proud co-sponsor and advocate for the _Equality Act_. Sign my petition urging my colleagues in Congress to bring the _Equality Act_ to the floor for a vote so we can protect the rights of every LGBTQ American.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2306_equalityact_petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230610_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=396%2E35263%2EUF0vPg)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2306_equalityact_petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230610_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=396%2E35263%2EUF0vPg)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard on this issue – I’m so grateful for your support.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=396%2E35263%2EUF0vPg) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=396%2E35263%2EUF0vPg)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences [here.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=396%2E35263%2EUF0vPg) If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=396%2E35263%2EUF0vPg)

name: Emilia Sykes HQ
subject: Will you take a moment to let us know what’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
[30 second survey attached]
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64629969/410722604/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.06.10_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmUzNWRhYi1hOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fW80TNTGnNObCfgxwzzOPxQYnwN6jrobTTzUS0roC_Y=)
Peter,

While the extreme Republicans controlling the House have proven that they’ll place their political schemes over the interests of the American people any day, **Emilia has never failed to show us where her priorities lie: Delivering for the hardworking families across Northeast Ohio.**

And throughout our time on the campaign trail and in the Halls of Congress, Emilia and our entire team aim to keep the voices of this grassroots team at the forefront of everything we do.

[**That’s why we have to ask: What’s on your mind? What issues are most important to you and your family, Peter? If you are able, please take our 30 second June Issues Survey to let us know.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64629970/410722612/883679391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmUzNWRhYi1hOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fW80TNTGnNObCfgxwzzOPxQYnwN6jrobTTzUS0roC_Y=&emci=dd370c51-a107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1fe35dab-a907-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)
| [**Share what’s on your mind »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64629971/410722613/883679391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmUzNWRhYi1hOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fW80TNTGnNObCfgxwzzOPxQYnwN6jrobTTzUS0roC_Y=&emci=dd370c51-a107-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1fe35dab-a907-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)
---

Understanding the issues that matter to you is critical to ensuring that our campaign strategy is aligned with your interests and values.

**Because after all, this campaign is about you.**

– Team Emilia

She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I’m humbled to have the endorsement of the Missouri AFL-CIO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Will you please give me a moment to explain why this election-winning coalition matters so much to our campaign?
#
Peter — earlier than ever before for a U.S. Senate challenger in Missouri, working people are uniting behind our movement to replace Josh Hawley.
**In a moment, I’m going to tell you why the support of this election-winning coalition matters in this race.** But first, let me share a little more about my background and why I’m running for this seat:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)
**[CHIP IN TO ELECT LUCAS KUNCE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)**
I grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Jeff City, right in the middle of Missouri. Like most Missourians, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck — so when my little sister was born with a heart condition, medical bills bankrupted us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)
But we weren’t alone. When my parents had to take my sister to get surgeries at a hospital over 100 miles away, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes. And when we couldn’t afford groceries, they brought more casserole and lasagna by the house than we could ever hope to eat.
The support from our community motivated me to work hard, stay focused on school, and run on the cross-country team. That all helped me get into college, which I could afford thanks to a Pell Grant and scholarships from people around town. I got to keep running there too.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)
After college and law school, I joined the Marines to honor and serve the community that had done so much for me. I was active duty for 13 years. Deployed to Iraq once, Afghanistan twice. Then the Joint Staff at the Pentagon, where I'd go on to help lead arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)
In the Marines, I learned what service for your country really means: Doing the right thing — even when you’re far away from home — and never forgetting the community you signed up to serve. **But for every tour of duty, I also learned just how little service meant to corrupt elites like Josh Hawley.**
I led a police training team in Iraq, running missions outside the wire through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. Near our camp, a burn pit bathed us in toxic fumes for months. And when we came back home, politicians like Hawley turned their backs on us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)
Between deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, I was stationed at Camp Pendleton. While our politicians let Wall Street banks gamble away our economy, I fought to protect service members from predatory scams and illegal foreclosures.
I deployed twice to Afghanistan. Learned Pashto. Investigated corruption. I saw how lies from corrupt leaders in Washington cost us two decades, $2 trillion, and nearly 2,500 American lives.
Then at the Pentagon, I saw how Big Oil bought off our politicians so dictators, war criminals, and a handful of corporate executives got to decide how much Americans pay for energy — while authoritarian oligarchs in China start to dominate renewable energy.
But between tours, one of the hardest things was coming back home and seeing what was going on in my old neighborhood. The community I had signed up to serve was stripped for parts. The corner store boarded up. Our first family home even bulldozed down. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)
The whole time politicians like Hawley kept voting to send Marines like me overseas to fight pointless wars, they were letting their corporate mega-donors gut our communities back home. **And now they don’t just attack our way of life, but also the democracy I swore to defend.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)
On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed us he’s a fraud and a coward who will cut and run at the first sign of trouble.
I’m running for U.S. Senate because Missourians deserve a senator who’s willing to stand and fight for them. They deserve a warrior for working people — and I'm ready to serve.
**Now we’ve united on-the-ground leaders, workers, and everyday people across Missouri into a record-breaking movement to take on Josh Hawley.** This is the same coalition that defeated an anti-union “Right-to-Work” scam statewide by 67.5%-32.5% in 2018.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)
The national GOP and corporate elites are afraid of the movement we're building because this is our chance to defeat Josh Hawley — and they know we’re not going to waste it. **So I have to ask:**
**[Will you chip in $10 or anything you can afford right now to help us flip this U.S. Senate seat and take back power for everyday Missourians? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, which means I’m relying on real people like you to power this campaign forward every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34020?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=11&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34020?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=12&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34020?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34020?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34020?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34020?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34019?refcode=em20230610-3243&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)
---
Together, we can take back our power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real working people in charge of our country again.
Thanks for always having my back, Peter.
Let’s get to work,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230610-3243-footer&t=18&refcode2=3243_614464_m2S61W&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=3243%2E614464%2Em2S61W). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Judge Aileen Cannon recuse herself from the Trump case](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a18b93f-14d1-4703-a788-19ff8803cd8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ff06329-ebae-4e48-90f1-5793f0969e1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [**Demand that this absurdly biased judge recuse herself from the Trump case.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b46d5b4-9c00-492b-92bb-13a14917e295/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Just hours after news broke that Donald Trump had been indicted on multiple counts for federal crimes, it was revealed that the judge overseeing the case would be none other than Aileen Cannon. This was the judge whose rulings on an earlier Trump issue were so ridiculously biased and untethered to the law, that they were overturned and eviscerated by a higher court. There is no way in hell that she should be overseeing this case. And she needs to recuse herself immediately. [Please sign the petition, and demand that she do so ASAP](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1237a4fe-ecb5-4208-b070-eb66e3cf28a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**. We're going to need big numbers to get ****adequate pressure, so sign and share this with others!**** ** How biased is this judge? [Biased enough to ignore the law itself:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1bea33d-7c5d-46e6-a275-a003a37ffe1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _" That would be the same Trump-appointed, Trump-serving Cannon who completely overlooked existing law to appoint a "special master" to help Trump keep documents from being reviewed by the Department of Justice. The same Cannon who supported the most ridiculous claims from Trump's third-rate legal team. The same Cannon who, when the special master made reasonable demands on Trump's team, overruled the judge she had appointed to give Trump gift after gift in rulings so ridiculous even right-wing pundits seemed shocked. It would be the same Cannon whose actions in this case were absolutely shredded in a ruling from the 11th Circuit that tossed out everything she had done, except the two months of stalling she achieved for Trump." (source: Daily Kos)_ Again, there is no way in hell that she should be overseeing this case. [**Please sign the petition, and demand that she recuse herself NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47f419f3-bc89-4ceb-a2c9-1c51175bf883/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Just hours after news broke that Donald Trump had been indicted on multiple counts for federal crimes, it was revealed that the judge overseeing the case would be none other than Aileen Cannon. This was the judge whose rulings on an earlier Trump issue were so ridiculously biased and untethered to the law, that they were overturned and eviscerated by a higher court. There is no way in hell that she should be overseeing this case. And she needs to recuse herself immediately. . We're going to need big numbers to get adequate pressure, so sign and share this with others! How biased is this judge? " That would be the same Trump-appointed, Trump-serving Cannon who completely overlooked existing law to appoint a "special master" to help Trump keep documents from being reviewed by the Department of Justice. The same Cannon who supported the most ridiculous claims from Trump's third-rate legal team. The same Cannon who, when the special master made reasonable demands on Trump's team, overruled the judge she had appointed to give Trump gift after gift in rulings so ridiculous even right-wing pundits seemed shocked. It would be the same Cannon whose actions in this case were absolutely shredded in a ruling from the 11th Circuit that tossed out everything she had done, except the two months of stalling she achieved for Trump." (source: Daily Kos) Again, there is no way in hell that she should be overseeing this case. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P. body:
Over 500+ bills have been introduced across the country, directly attacking our LGBTQ+ friends |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64630505/410724735/-662322978?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWRjM2FlNy1hYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJS_LTnBGzAq9vZW7efxbWFjoYHAnjBvh10beFbVGjg=)
Dear friend, While thousands gather at Pride events all across our country this month, thousands also remain **fearful** for the future of their basic human rights. This week, **for the first time ever,** The Human Rights Campaign issued a _‘National State of Emergency’ declaring that LGBTQ+ individuals are in danger._ **In**** 2023 alone, our LGBTQ+ friends are facing attacks from 500+ bills — 75 that have been signed into law — in states across the country.** During the month that LGBTQ+ individuals should be celebrating love, themselves, and their community, they instead are facing attacks and violence from extremists. | [SUPPORT PRIDE 🏳️🌈](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64630506/410724736/-2039027626?refcode=E21693-20230610-LGBTQ+BadBills-SB-LGBTQRights-REG-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWRjM2FlNy1hYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJS_LTnBGzAq9vZW7efxbWFjoYHAnjBvh10beFbVGjg=)
---
Look, we have seen time and time again, that **when MAGA Republicans have no real agenda, they use their platform to attack communities through fake culture wars.** _And a majority of Americans are sick of the bullsh*t._**Most Americans support the basic human right to love and marry whomever you wish. **
**We cannot afford to let MAGA Republicans and their fear-driven agenda continue backpedaling on human rights issues. [_Can you show the LGBTQ+ community you have their back by chipping in whatever you can so Eric can continue to fight for their rights in Congress?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64630507/410724737/-2039027626?refcode=E21693-20230610-LGBTQ+BadBills-SL-LGBTQRights-REG-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWRjM2FlNy1hYjA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJS_LTnBGzAq9vZW7efxbWFjoYHAnjBvh10beFbVGjg=)**

clean_body: Over 500+ bills have been introduced across the country, directly attacking our LGBTQ+ friends | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Dear friend, While thousands gather at Pride events all across our country this month, thousands also remain fearful for the future of their basic human rights. This week, for the first time ever, The Human Rights Campaign issued a ‘National State of Emergency’ declaring that LGBTQ+ individuals are in danger. In 2023 alone, our LGBTQ+ friends are facing attacks from 500+ bills — 75 that have been signed into law — in states across the country. During the month that LGBTQ+ individuals should be celebrating love, themselves, and their community, they instead are facing attacks and violence from extremists. | = Look, we have seen time and time again, that when MAGA Republicans have no real agenda, they use their platform to attack communities through fake culture wars. And a majority of Americans are sick of the bullsht.Most Americans support the basic human right to love and marry whomever you wish. subject: Prioritizing solutions over politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
body:
I’ve been hard at work delivering results for our working families on the things you care about most

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64630636/410725152/-345890914?refcode=EM_PET_230610Survey_NB_5_TESTB&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDI1ZjI0NS1hYzA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GB3hWx5TJQ4zEgT6tkznLm4RrGcw8qtv4nzq1ThgkIk=)
Team,

After hearing from you firsthand in our district and reading your responses by email, I’ve been hard at work delivering results for our working families on the things you care about most.

I’m fighting to protect the right to choose at the federal level in our post-_Roe_ landscape in order to protect against attacks on reproductive care by far-right state legislatures. I’m creating investments for our farmers as a member of the Committee on Agriculture by supporting crop insurance programs and resources for young farmers. I’m ensuring our veterans have the care they need by establishing quality healthcare services, especially in rural areas, and tackling the misuse of funds meant for support. And, I’m pushing past bipartisan gridlock by working with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to prioritize solutions for our families over political games.

I’m honored each day to serve you in Congress, and I’ll continue to prioritize the issues that affect you and your family most. [Will you take a moment to let me know what issues you’d like to see action on next? Your input truly means a lot to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64630637/410725153/218527997?refcode=EM_PET_230610Survey_NB_5_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDI1ZjI0NS1hYzA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GB3hWx5TJQ4zEgT6tkznLm4RrGcw8qtv4nzq1ThgkIk=&emci=fd356d3f-ac07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4425f245-ac07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

body:
Join us one month from today for IDCCA’s Annual Summer Brews!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64630765/410725830/29679659?refcode=EM_FR_230610SummerBrews_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_A_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTgyY2U5NDAtYWQwNy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zBqHrVXPQnfOvdNvc-VrTHM1U1QnF7lVnlM-C0wBqEo=)
Fellow Democrats, summer is just around the corner, so you know what that means: we are hosting our 5th Annual Summer Brews, and you’re invited!

As the weather gets warmer, there is really no better time to kick back and enjoy some drinks with friends, all for a good cause!

**[Join us one month from today, July 10, at 5:30 p.m. CT for IDCCA’s Annual Summer Brews at Eris Brewery& Cider House in Chicago. Trump Tower, New York.
Mar a Lago, Florida.
Bedminster, New Jersey.
Aberdeen, Scotland.

Trump’s got residences in a lot of places.
Soon, there might be one more on that list.
**Leavenworth Penitentiary, Kansas.**

He isn’t going to get away with it, Derek.
One way or another, it’s going to catch up to him. Either he’s charged and serves time, or we beat him so badly that we knock the Republican Party out of this Trump fueled fever dream for good.
Whatever happens, VoteVets is ready to do our part. So think about your donation as an investment: You can be sure that we’ll put your donation to work keeping Trump out of the White House in 2024.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Pass the Paycheck Fairness Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Women still only earn just 82% of what men earn — meaning the gender pay gap has barely budged in the past 20 years.
#
Peter, it’s time for equal pay for equal work.

Today is the 60-year anniversary of the passage of the Equal Pay Act. However, even after six decades, the gender pay gap _still_ persists.

Women still only earn 82% of what men earn — **meaning the gender pay gap has**** _barely budged_****in the past 20 years.**
It’s clear that the Equal Pay Act was an important first step — but it was only a first step.**Now we need to take the**** _next_****step and pass the Paycheck Fairness Act.**

[**Passing the Paycheck Fairness Act through this Congress won’t be easy, but we can start by showing everyone just how much support there is for equal pay for equal work — please add your name in support of the Paycheck Fairness Act today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-paycheck-fairness-act/?source=em20230610-2588&t=1&akid=2588%2E420207%2EzAMj5b)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-paycheck-fairness-act/?source=em20230610-2588&t=2&akid=2588%2E420207%2EzAMj5b)**
Not only does the gender pay gap persist year after year and decade after decade, but it’s _even worse_ for Black and Latinx women, who only make cents on the dollar compared to white men.

After 60 years, it’s clear that we need the Paycheck Fairness Act to close the loopholes in the original Equal Pay Act and build an economy that works for everyone.

[**Add your name and join the movement to guarantee equal pay for equal work by passing the Paycheck Fairness Act.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-paycheck-fairness-act/?source=em20230610-2588&t=3&akid=2588%2E420207%2EzAMj5b)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-paycheck-fairness-act/?source=em20230610-2588&t=4&akid=2588%2E420207%2EzAMj5b)**
Thank you,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230610-2588-footer&t=5&refcode2=2588_420207_zAMj5b&akid=2588%2E420207%2EzAMj5b)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Women still only earn 82% of what men earn — meaning the gender pay gap has barely budgedin the past 20 years. It’s clear that the Equal Pay Act was an important first step — but it was only a first step.Now we need to take the nextstep and pass the Paycheck Fairness Act. Not only does the gender pay gap persist year after year and decade after decade, but it’s even worse for Black and Latinx women, who only make cents on the dollar compared to white men. It’s time to expand Medicaid and save our hospitals:

* * *
**Peter , Mississippi’s hospital crisis can no longer be brushed aside.**
* ❌ According to a report in April by the Center for Healthcare Quality and Payment Reform, about one-third of rural hospitals in Mississippi are on the brink of closing down.

* ❌ Hospitals across the state are overwhelmed with patients facing serious health problems that could have been addressed earlier with proper healthcare.

* ❌ Tate Reeves allegedly admitted that it was in his “personal political interest” to oppose expanding Medicaid — despite the policy being a win for Mississippi hospitals, patients, and doctors.

Mississippians deserve better than this.

Brandon Presley is running for Governor to defeat Tate and finally solve our state’s hospital crisis. But we still have a long way to go. Until then, we want to know you're with us, Peter.
Do you agree that It’s time for Mississippi to expand Medicaid and save our hospitals?

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Join our movement and fight for LGBTQ+ rights.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64631676/410729779/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWM4MDQzZC1iMDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PjAZB1iNAC7Xhl4tm5aMuqwiOBRvZ9kxyDA6d1dPpT8=&emci=f5b8b126-e606-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=75c8043d-b007-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Pride is rooted in activism. **And this pride month I'm calling for more action**. More action to support the LGBTQ+ community. More action to protect transgender kids. More action to stop extremists who would marginalize LGBTQ+ communities. _More action_. Pride began with Stonewall in 1969 and the parades that commemorated the uprising in 1970. **Pride has always been about standing up for our right to love freely and openly and to be who we are.** This year we have so much to celebrate, like the Respect for Marriage Act that we passed last summer to protect marriage equality, but we also have so much more to fight for. Above the Supreme Court is carved, "Equal Justice Under Law." But it's painfully, tragically obvious that for all of our progress, not everyone is guaranteed equal justice in the United States. The LGBTQ+ community still faces discrimination and hatred and marginalization. And that is why **I continue to fight for equal justice under law.** In our country, we see Republican-led states become less free while Democrat-led states bolster the rights of LGBTQ+ communities. Republicans have selected the trans community as their latest political punching bag, passing laws to bully children and marginalize entire communities. **We are at a point today where the Human Rights Campaign has issued travel advisories to warn LGBTQ+ people of the dangers of traveling to certain states.** Our movement is not about you or me. It is about all of us. It is about the fight to protect the rights of LGBTQ+ people, children, and communities. A fight that we wage every day. Pride is a time to celebrate, to see how far we have come, and to remember those we lost along the way. **But it is also a time to renew our commitment to this fight, the fight for LGBTQ+ rights.** Onward! clean_body: | | | | Pride is rooted in activism. And this pride month I'm calling for more action. More action to support the LGBTQ+ community. More action to protect transgender kids. More action to stop extremists who would marginalize LGBTQ+ communities. More action. Pride began with Stonewall in 1969 and the parades that commemorated the uprising in 1970. Pride has always been about standing up for our right to love freely and openly and to be who we are. This year we have so much to celebrate, like the Respect for Marriage Act that we passed last summer to protect marriage equality, but we also have so much more to fight for. Above the Supreme Court is carved, "Equal Justice Under Law." But it's painfully, tragically obvious that for all of our progress, not everyone is guaranteed equal justice in the United States. The LGBTQ+ community still faces discrimination and hatred and marginalization. And that is why I continue to fight for equal justice under law. In our country, we see Republican-led states become less free while Democrat-led states bolster the rights of LGBTQ+ communities. Republicans have selected the trans community as their latest political punching bag, passing laws to bully children and marginalize entire communities. We are at a point today where the Human Rights Campaign has issued travel advisories to warn LGBTQ+ people of the dangers of traveling to certain states. Our movement is not about you or me. It is about all of us. It is about the fight to protect the rights of LGBTQ+ people, children, and communities. A fight that we wage every day. Pride is a time to celebrate, to see how far we have come, and to remember those we lost along the way. But it is also a time to renew our commitment to this fight, the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. Onward! Fellow Conservative,

On April 27th, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he's challenging Joe Manchin for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8621e67aaaed46e59be2733a59277b8d&_e=ibS8pqxYqBVIF6ZEAUzU6sPbIXTpMjwWd2x-r-ZfBywYzmNHCa3hx7Uh8ynbs7I5MMhjJfs1vrr_xm6cBVMMfvXrBcN0rxvlQwRRV6pWy1wUD9VHokDFAPFK90CEOocvr1_BLMALr5kWJdle3bGh37mShIAM_XVaUFW08EUQgpawBS7PVsQhQ-LJj8HHhaVzDGMYAjTzFL2F_B2bRUg385EQriXXcwd_2NXKHpJzmE61wgc8fRebPkN9JtchfADyqpHUM5_g1Ilch89p8FWkcCQNTh-7gHifzFhXMu951wxmaZf4Js1Adp4y-o4i_TWA9A6C5MQrIHm5U21F7sp6FDrVPlrz3yLAhzCkkuG7SAbxHrkufonblL6YZ7d4xgtL0jFxL9KQ4p9yoRBoovLML8jGw8hVADlMHMmsRlA6srk%3D)**

Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

Please, if you can,**[take two minutes right now and submit your response to our questionnaire.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8621e67aaaed46e59be2733a59277b8d&_e=ibS8pqxYqBVIF6ZEAUzU6sPbIXTpMjwWd2x-r-ZfBywYzmNHCa3hx7Uh8ynbs7I5MMhjJfs1vrr_xm6cBVMMfvXrBcN0rxvlQwRRV6pWy1wUD9VHokDFAPFK90CEOocvr1_BLMALr5kWJdle3bGh37mShIAM_XVaUFW08EUQgpawBS7PVsQhQ-LJj8HHhaVzDGMYAjTzFL2F_B2bRUg385EQriXXcwd_2NXKHpJzmE61wgc8fRebPkN9JtchfADyqpHUM5_g1Ilch89p8FWkcHhLIP-IEwdYZ1ZQcg5FbJRJaWGcpwh1UUEiOXw0l1Urj2vWlXa6WJ8s4ibEDDoEzCtzTmiQW21Rl3jh3KguSBneS-_pescp24rqiEkGJPq1QNUJj7trpZqKLaq962ghJgY4Qni8ZXFdpxs7mbVFlAc%3D)** We’re looking to conservatives like you for guidance ahead of what we’re expecting to be an extremely hard-fought campaign.

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20WAGOP?=
subject: Take our Washington State Presidential Preference Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Select your pick(s) NOW!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Alex, United We Dream Action
subject: ✊📣 Our States, Our Power: Can we count you in?
body:
here’s how busy people can participate: | | | **✊📣The Our States, Our Power Week of Action is coming up ... and we’re excited to include you in it, Peter!** Immigrant youth are _tired_ of waiting for elected officials to do their job & pass policies that’ll _actually_ help our communities live in safety and dignity. 🥱 So, next week, we’re reclaiming our power & fighting back against harmful state policies that try to bring hate & division into our communities. [(If you missed our last email, click here to learn more about how we’re reclaiming Our States, Our Power.)](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Szk9b9eP3Ui1CGkxjufZ3Lwt14d0Ba3GUHEIzLW5BreLJeLoPbtZzlp_yZFdxTZKVhAWgXS9kW_glGP0SIUggTwmP1MWvQ7Vm1toIFEQo5HJGdC8sSY5qflCcdZYIkg27le8tBamXbXzEiJh7ZgcmM9AZdrZoqawLz1S5-WwwJW4BcHJ6GEmaN7E9-bwtATkePaG-NBeY8SmWBBWbcBomCpsxvaifaGNw9CFCz4Jfcf7TCTTM9zygS4mb6O4AeHB6FPrxWIRRkQTbOMESWfF3Rk/3wx/Fnd8NiMfRwaVJPMy7VFSqA/h0/WMh-mWpYNiJWybuCSHy937zqH3DdubAklRVAR5IJZHk) **🔥 Join us in action from JUNE 12 through JUNE 16 to make it clear: 🔥**

Just recently, organizers in California and Connecticut achieved **BIG** wins – like expanded medicaid access & employment opportunities for immigrant youth. But, I understand we all have different capacities to join the fight. No matter how much or little time we each have, we can still contribute in meaningful ways. That’s why we’ve prepared special opportunities for you to take part in our Week of Action & demand the change we need for our communities. ****[Register here to receive _**Power Break alerts**_ throughout the week of impactful (but simple) ways you can contribute to our fight for immigrant justice!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnle5-xP_wpQFDFRgLmQ_3B65WgwN0EflViEjsQB4knZGNbhIx5o6nY2jciRIiHSvMysmFabwtkErkOvYpcX58jJGBblF-C0XjBLDBLW5GQiynB104vWoFROEkX6HcSRAkjNkbqfn9z0N8uQuwGW3ZIhKL9GG1eim91KDrvdvl5uMXcbqOen1ZKzrZZH11ZJRhHQWrL8vSFHgR17WZ0Wl5Wkju8UDfDE5P0Hd4CLD28gm-sZb-wC_8nJ2kAGCqVUT2-NEOCCT0DpUM-KIvyrTppW7MUmDJoNRE59XTKgnyXWoA/3wx/Fnd8NiMfRwaVJPMy7VFSqA/h4/-6uC8cbx28phcwvUEY-eFmeSxPkSC16Cf5Ool0oGn5I)**** **Together, we can show up for our people & create a future we’ll love. 🤩 **[If you’re counting down the days, for now, here’s a map of events happening next week. **Be the first to RSVP to an action near you!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/mRNLFKyANPYkYXuUTzk_Szk9b9eP3Ui1CGkxjufZ3Lwt14d0Ba3GUHEIzLW5BreLJeLoPbtZzlp_yZFdxTZKVpDXk1WJ48v4TXtRq3MPtqLFlWyQd1--O0WfaS5OEmsLWv6Nj1bXAwpEH-b0sNhQKMi7omhOj4ll6IuElZA3Xhhdq_gxgMoY9EPQCU-idCBNvFrpbG0lY-pxgY8lZz_nmYvaE0Xh6I7a6Cak1GyzGAd6c9VSiaqqpNhTbusomotk163oFmqkrA2vAPc4_fmRKd90viT-YB0UC2FvvNwirJk/3wx/Fnd8NiMfRwaVJPMy7VFSqA/h5/qztMzzSMnZtvmVWftglYP4XDk7ma91GBC_ykZiyMqow) Thank you for everything you do for our communities! Alex and the rest of the UWD Action Team

name: Cori Bush
subject: It’s time for reparations.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Justice means reparations. | |
---
Peter, As a Black woman in Congress, I work in a building built by our ancestors who were enslaved. I serve in an institution where past members of Congress enslaved Black people, near the White House where past presidents traded and enslaved Black people. Throughout my life, I’ve personally experienced how Black people continue to bear the harms of slavery and its vestiges. We see this in present-day health disparities, the growing Black-white wealth gap, escalating police violence against Black communities, and so much more. That’s why I partnered with grassroots groups to introduce the Reparations Now Resolution, which recognizes the federal government’s responsibility to provide reparations for the enslavement of Africans -- and for the harm our government continues to inflict on millions of Black people. In the U.S., Black people die at 3 times the rate of white people during childbirth. Across the country, Black people are also 3.6 times more likely to be arrested for cannabis possession than white people, despite using it at similar rates. Arrests and convictions have lifelong impacts that deny people of their basic rights, including voting rights and opportunities for housing and employment. **This is all part of the legacy of chattel slavery and its evolutions, such as Jim Crow, segregation, and redlining.** Discriminatory lending practices are ongoing, contributing to the growing racial wealth gap. _Here’s the truth: we don’t know for sure WHO or WHAT is coming into our country, be it dangerous fentanyl or hardened criminals._

That’s called EXTORTION. That’s how the Mafia works – not America. But allow me to address this matter so that there is NO DOUBT where I stand... ... I WILL NEVER DROP OUT OF THE 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RACE. They can indict me, they can arrest me, but I know – and the American people know – that I am an innocent man. My only offense is challenging the corrupt ruling class and fighting for the forgotten men and women of our country. If I were to drop out, what precedent would that set going forward? Presidents would be decided by extortion, not by elections. You cannot plead with people who are holding your freedom and justice hostage. As the age-old saying goes, “I would rather die on my feet than live on my knees.” 2024 is no longer just about an election. It’s about whether America will still even have elections – or if the president will be picked by unelected bureaucrats through a weaponized legal system. | | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I want to make you some promises, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I hate how some politicians are treating their supporters. That’s why I’m changing the narrative with this campaign.
---

Good morning, Peter,
A lot of campaigns are trying to convince you to donate with a fake 1,000% matching gimmick. And if you don't donate they threaten you, they call you a bad Republican... they lead with fear instead of optimism.

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. When we tell you about our internal fundraising goals, those are real numbers.
**__No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies. __**
That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign you want to invest in, then **[please become a recurring donor to our campaign today.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f939d1cefef4f23bb16ea7227df2fcd&_e=aaa2X4xU7A6Fl8pkW4BCPzDtLuqZVCe9-suCOglJ0pbWK6Z_brROYCM4SoTCxtcAIkNxsMnzgxwTQgCC4Y8oQr5oGkB3QsYVB1dRmq2-P9V81Q6PfsR3kZqQD3cTmMEU5XRh76WoSeo3gt3jhaxhMF178XJvAGBhx9712jkRSX6Ceuv2krmVO2vcUeOnrkZW5rlSb0KivlWfTxUfqZfvlvymmNa6MNvLnjklf8edy2fTPAtRG1y5gcAMMAa7pTBs5DCRf0ldpebozl4ot3u_ACZMjCkJNIzRINEgkTFeBtVztxYdgxwdRACI0REnKM6PiYc6quIF6mnYfhiP9wjk3TZY4kK-xF3eLIPkDeXeiRxwU_pqSL5Hnshk4Jgq3u9Zl9zo0dxbLAYL0IIEpa9qWiEt7gL_dFbcaDO6KUQQZdA%3D "please become a recurring donor to our campaign today.") **

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f939d1cefef4f23bb16ea7227df2fcd&_e=aaa2X4xU7A6Fl8pkW4BCPzDtLuqZVCe9-suCOglJ0pbWK6Z_brROYCM4SoTCxtcAIkNxsMnzgxwTQgCC4Y8oQr5oGkB3QsYVB1dRmq2-P9V81Q6PfsR3kZqQD3cTmMEU5XRh76WoSeo3gt3jhaxhMF178XJvAGBhx9712jkRSX6Ceuv2krmVO2vcUeOnrkZW5rlSb0KivlWfTxUfqZfvlvymmNa6MNvLnjklf8edy2fTPAtRG1y5gcAMMAa7pTBs5DCRf0ldpebozl4ot3u_ACl7HhHtKMYeGJn_OuOUSwuEWSlEiI3ukiqPEMuNhyjufXU3IKvR-4Wo5myhUHDm-v3ueqWp3nkBJt8RMyWmtErv76wqa86cwCV1-JgkjOgaWznIXINQ1CsXpvp5CIANiq6zKY5gqE_J2Be73EAfS64%3D)

| Ron DeSantis is the 46th Governor of Florida.

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL
---
mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: I hate how some politicians are treating their supporters. That’s why I’m changing the narrative with this campaign. | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click "here" | Good morning, Peter, A lot of campaigns are trying to convince you to donate with a fake 1,000% matching gimmick. And if you don't donate they threaten you, they call you a bad Republican... they lead with fear instead of optimism. At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach. Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank. Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it. You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. When we tell you about our internal fundraising goals, those are real numbers. No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies. That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House. If that sounds like the kind of campaign you want to invest in, then "please become a recurring donor to our campaign today." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Once you become a recurring donor, you receive access to exclusive briefings, town halls, merchandise, and so much more because we want to show you how much the entire campaign appreciates your ongoing support. Let's show the country we love that we're willing to fight for it, every day. | | In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | Ron DeSantis is the 46th Governor of Florida. A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%% %%unsubcenter_url%%

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene smeared me with age-old racist tropes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64633462/410735712/1378948325?amount=10&refcode=MTFC_20230610_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWE5ZTZiMi1iNDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bIyMG9s4elRAnSxR9PisYxJ8Ez73Y4_LVmSvptW42TA=) Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear:

In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me.

**Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.”

Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw.

This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change.

[**We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I’ll keep standing up to right-wing extremists. clean_body: Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. | = Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear: In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me. Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.” Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw. This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jamaal Bowman and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you for being on our side in this fight. Peace and love, Jamaal Bowman | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Indiana Dems
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|

Peter, Today, we’re reaching out to say thank you for all you’ve done to support our cause. We are building a movement that will lead to a safer, stronger Indiana and we couldn’t do it without the support of grassroots donors like you. All of your effort goes a long way, whether you’ve given your time, energy, or made a donation. We know that our vision of an Indiana with a stronger economy, better education system, and more accessible health care is one that all Hoosiers can relate to. That’s why we’re in this for the long haul. And by giving to our cause, you’re investing in the future that Indiana deserves. Extreme Republican politicians have had their chance, but after years of Republican control, Indiana consistently ranks near the bottom of the 50 states in important metrics like wages, female mortality, and education rates. Indiana deserves better. [**If you can, help us kickstart our fundraising this quarter by making a donation. Every dollar you give brings us closer to our goals.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64633518/410735816/1643342139?refcode=230610-Thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTUwYTdkOS1iNDA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdV0ZB6omb2kXhCAPicXcplTXWS8ipModb1jlo15yW8=) Thank you again for all of your time and support. | George Santos’ list of lies is growing EVERY DAY – so when we reached out to top Democrats to sign our letter demanding his resignation, we thought signatures would POUR IN. **__Butwe couldn’t have been more wrong.__** We’re sending our letter to Santos tomorrow morning at 9am sharp, and we need a SURGE of signatures before we do!

_If we don’t, Santos will think nobody cares about his lies and he’ll get away scot-free!_ [We’re asking one last time: Chip in $3 to add your name to our letter demanding George Santos resigns from Congress »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47401?t=6&akid=8335%2E878179%2E4lPvRX) | [**DONATE $3 AND ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47401?t=7&akid=8335%2E878179%2E4lPvRX)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47402?t=8&akid=8335%2E878179%2E4lPvRX)
* * *
**TO: Rep. George Santos**
**FROM: Add your name**
Dear Rep. George Santos,

I’m SICK and TIRED of your misinformation, lies, and constant scandals.

American working families need REAL support, but you’re too busy playing politics and covering up your potential crimes!!

[That’s why I’m calling on you to RESIGN NOW and gladly chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to remove MAGA extremists like YOU from public office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47401?t=9&akid=8335%2E878179%2E4lPvRX)
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47401?t=10&akid=8335%2E878179%2E4lPvRX)
---
We deserve genuine, honest Representatives that care about healthcare, voting rights, LGBTQ rights, accountability in our Democracy...

NOT an ultra MAGA fan who lied about his entire identity while running for office!!

[That’s why I’m signing this letter calling on you to RESIGN immediately and pitching in $3 to Voter Protection Project to ensure far-right Republicans like you never hold office again »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47401?t=11&akid=8335%2E878179%2E4lPvRX)

With conviction,

_**_X Add your name_**_
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47401?t=12&akid=8335%2E878179%2E4lPvRX)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Donald Trump's indictment on seven counts Thursday, including violating the Espionage Act, makes it even clearer what we must do.
body:
He’s finally indicted! Now what?
| | | | |
---
| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Robert F Kennedy Jr
subject: running on Truth, the future of America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Today, I am proud to share a short documentary about our historic launch.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=1)
---
Hello Peter, At the launch of this campaign in Boston just over a month ago, **_I declared that I was running for President for all Americans_**. Today, I am proud to share a short documentary about our historic launch.**Please take a moment to[watch this video](https://www.kennedy24.com/rfk-jr-running_on_truth?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=2) and share it with your family and friends.** **_Running on Truth – The Promise of America_** [](https://www.kennedy24.com/rfk-jr-running_on_truth?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=3) | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/rfk-jr-running_on_truth?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=4 "WATCH NOW") [WATCH NOW](https://www.kennedy24.com/rfk-jr-running_on_truth?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=4)
---
I’m a lifelong Democrat. I’m proud of my family’s long history in this party – standing up for the voiceless and the downtrodden when no one else would and trying to end wars that drain our nation’s coffers, leave our world less safe, and our working and middle class less well off.
But it doesn’t matter today what party you identify with, **_I am here to fight for all of us. Democrat, Republican, Libertarian, and Independent_** – what unites us is always more powerful than what divides us.
I’ve spent my entire career, over three decades in the trenches fighting for the environment, the health of our children, clean water, and clean air. I’ve spent my life standing up to the biggest corporations on Earth – those that hide the pollution and harm of their products behind powerful lobbyists and big PR firms.
**Please join me today in helping spread this message to your family and friends – who are eager for a new Generation of Leadership.**[**Your support today will make all the difference!** ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=5)
As a Democrat today, I’m as concerned about the powerful elements of my own party and of corporate interests as my father and uncle were over 50 years ago. Today, we have a media and political establishment that is desperate to hide the truth from us and worse – censoring those who dare to stand up and tell the truth. This is antithetical to democracy.
Young and old, poor and middle class, urban, rural, and everywhere in between – **[I'm asking you today to join this campaign](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=6) and support our efforts to reclaim the heart and soul of our nation. **
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=7 "DONATE TODAY") [DONATE TODAY](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=7)
---
**My father ran for President in 1968, on a similar mission. He ran to heal and unite a nation experiencing deep division and tribalism.**
55 years ago, my father ran against the president of his own party, against war, and in a time of unprecedented polarization. Many felt he had no chance of winning. Yet, on the day he died, he won the California primary and South Dakota primary, uniting the most urban state and the most rural state on the same day toward one common vision for America.
When my father was buried, he was taken by train from New York to Washington, DC. That train ride normally takes less than 2 hours. That day, it took over 7 hours as 2 million people stood on the tracks to say goodbye. I will never forget how I felt seeing Black and white men together and hearing so many singing the Battle Hymn of the Republic.
**Before my father passed, as he was on the campaign trail in 1968,** he visited many of the poorest communities in America, in West Virginia and the Mississippi Delta. When he came back from the Delta one day, he told us around the dinner table**:**
_“I was in a tar paper shack today, smaller than this dining room, with 2 families living there. The children eat one meal a day. When you get older, I want you to help these people." - Robert F. Kennedy Sr._
When he brought us to these communities, **my Dad often told us** :__
_"These are your people. These are Kennedy people. Big shots, corporations, and millionaires, they have lobbyists and PR firms. They have lawyers. They don’t need the Kennedys. These are the people you need to spend the rest of your life helping."_
When I’m president, I’m going to be president for those people. You give me a piece of ground and a sword, and I am going to take back this country– with your help and the help of all Democrats, Republicans, Libertarians, and Independents — who are Americans first.
Please take a moment to [**watch my full announcement speech from Boston**](https://www.kennedy24.com/historic_presidential_announcement_in_boston_ma?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=8) outlining my platform and vision for America.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=9)[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=10)[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=11)[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=12)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=running_on_truth_the_promise_1&n=13).

Peter,

On April 27th, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he's challenging Joe Manchin for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f6d329b5c25e44609d2fba12ff7bffde&_e=Wo59B38YfpjPE7lc-lMLG_dd7RvFh8sjF7xC19PSWScNqUz1iyPmbN4WfHtA7GmcCtLLgekUYxjsCeKcCKVusi0_VGYwm9iGTmszxAYKxsaxG-oCpYPjUJFiJmkcWUVXwyXPbB6m-ttLJNhc5oTaKcIMAlsaC5qd2ywOVSVNw7NbsCso4m-116hsaMnj9mXKydkkIjI5Soa8ggScSEsvgqrSKsZQQ4xLrxw4qlql3xRzX7EGX78vsDBgYfo78ehfxJxkoJcM-iH3B3SuoVBRbvbfzdhC1KxKJdIw9kir1o9UzkOmkV0Wh9WP5PAmvjgSKve5-7Y4iVgPOUqEnU80ecs4YnR8KA6V__7iT-VFozxN4d5PMjHLnvzNTKmq-DOHRI__vj5RLmeHgcqAfdRfv8pCREHX6jigAd00L3OxHa0%3D)**

**We need 400 responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you.**

[** START HERE-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f6d329b5c25e44609d2fba12ff7bffde&_e=Wo59B38YfpjPE7lc-lMLG_dd7RvFh8sjF7xC19PSWScNqUz1iyPmbN4WfHtA7GmcCtLLgekUYxjsCeKcCKVusi0_VGYwm9iGTmszxAYKxsaxG-oCpYPjUJFiJmkcWUVXwyXPbB6m-ttLJNhc5oTaKcIMAlsaC5qd2ywOVSVNw7NbsCso4m-116hsaMnj9mXKydkkIjI5Soa8ggScSEsvgqrSKsZQQ4xLrxw4qlql3xRzX7EGX78vsDBgYfo78ehfxJxkoJcM-iH3B3SuoVBRblMeWNQluBo9ZwcezFCX1Vf9wKIjTrC4J6yGtkD_atAT2sgD2Mr5b_Usb6gFKeFHbO6ktArhynjvIanLMuO3Cz4UhVsJYmGQzPZm-VS4hnIz7UO6zPVeqiBvKPK5BHtDxAKOuA0wMO32lGQ4Kppl-N4%3D)
Not only does Sen. Manchin drive an **$80,000 Maserati SUV** around D.C., but he also lives on a **$700,000 houseboat** in one of city's most upscale neighborhoods. **And he's spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants**.

**American people are paying the price.**

**Sen. Manchin isn’t going to go quietly into the night**. His time in the Senate has afforded him the national spotlight, which won’t be easy for him to give up. He’s a constant presence on cable news, and the Washington, D.C. social scene.

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

Friend,
The timing of my unjust INDICTMENT is no coincidence.
Crooked Joe’s Department of Injustice is not _just_ attempting to silence and IMPRISON his leading political opponent (me, an INNOCENT man), they’re actively COVERING UP one of the biggest scandals in our nation’s history!
On the very same day that the Biden-appointed Special Counsel unjustly indicts me on the “Boxes Hoax,” _credible_ evidence is brought to light showing that Crooked Joe and his Crime Family collected at least **$10 MILLION IN BRIBES** from a foreign national.
**It’s very simple, this is a smoke-and-mirrors witch hunt designed to ELIMINATE our campaign and divert the American peoples’ eyes from Crooked Joe Biden’s _ REAL_ CRIME. **
At this point, you can’t even call this a two-tiered justice system. _There is no justice at all in Biden’s America._
The radical Left Democrats and the Deep State have transformed our country into a Third World tin-pot dictatorship. They have crossed a line that will be written in the history books as the beginning of the END of our once great Republic.
_BUT IT’S NOT TOO LATE..._
**Our incredible America First Movement – _75 MILLION patriots strong_ – is the one and ONLY movement with the sheer will to SAVE America before it is lost for good. **
Together, we will stand tall in the face of tyranny, and we will **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to the radical Left.
Mark my words, Friend, we will WIN BACK the White House in 2024, we will DISMANTLE the Deep State once and for all, and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
**[Please make a contribution to peacefully DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts – and together, we will SAVE our country.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGP0zAQhX-Nc0tkj107OeTAYvWwBSSEBIhLNbGddpbYCYlD1X-PXHW5fu9p9D4NxmWi8d4z88IAruQ3BsDkBwZwUi8_v-jTj5Oth0_2tbb6oG4lhY8MIN-X8L_6vNKEiDQVamzle3AtOFeFXuhWK1CgeHXtjeLdKCQqLo0ZQYphFAcN2DquuOtERT1wkFwLLjrBJTR-RN2iGFBxZUTwTPEbpcbPCSf_ltc9Lo2bYzX115yX7THpyOC4BbevoblRWoMvjcLwb6gxhpUc1m8zpVyPe_Ir0kbpUrs5Rso5BAbH5KahMyOa1uhBBz_CwORxz_Ecg6c9MmmfvrrAbd5XF5i0js74ZA7jgnRJTNp3p_dkTjmkzKTtJC_wnCbyTNr796_58zeXD-kBHx-R9tef06tr1W9frb1fbjRNtGnDFL-UBcXtXwAAAP__fjKNRg)**

Now, I want to protect our daughters across America.
