name: Campbell, Heidi
subject: Three quick things you need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230610_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230610_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
Peter,
I'm reaching out to you today because this is important:
With so many outsiders looking at what's going on in Tennessee and our city, we have a chance to stand for Nashville values this election. Let me give you three reasons why our race for Nashville Mayor was called "the most up-in-the-air race anyone can remember” by Axios Nashville.
1️⃣ With Mayor Cooper not running again, the entire Nashville state legislative delegation has endorsed my campaign for Mayor.
2️⃣ The first public poll of this race found us in the lead, BUT analysts are confident that the large amount of voters undecided will determine the winner of this election.
3️⃣ As the only candidate in this race with experience as a small business owner, local leader, and State Senator, I'm working every day to tell people our plan for making Nashville a place where we can really live , not just visit.
Peter, but we need YOUR SUPPORT to spread our positive message across the city, reach undecided voters, and win this election on August 3rd.
As Mayor of Oak Hill, I cut my pay when our communities needed it. Now, I'm up against deep-pocketed candidates trying to buy this election. Together, we can win this—can you help make a difference in Nashville's most important election in years by donating today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230610_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
With gratitude,
Heidi
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230610_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230610_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230610_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230610_em_fr_b1_HC_big.acq]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

subject: Jesse Watters explains why he thinks Biden could be forced to return all of Trump’s docs to Mar-a-Lago
body:

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Our southern border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, Our Southern border is absolutely OUT OF CONTROL, and Joe Biden is doing _nothing about it._
People are coming to our border from all over the world because they think that in Joe Biden’s America, it’s a free-for-all to get into our country.
_Here’s the truth: we don’t know for sure WHO or WHAT is coming into our country, be it dangerous fentanyl or hardened criminals._

We MUST secure the border to keep America safe, but we can’t do it without every conservative standing up.
[**Join us today to SECURE OUR BORDER and keep America safe!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=cfa3e3544af84311afec3ea9dc17d785&_e=MgAR2UOmsJC0YlnGh6yAkII61PK1SZfuMzv8-SIx3YOne9QnBkPKejn1MnASb4aP8W3Qx8PbVYsUn_WccT79E1PC_dvZx5uu3CQw4M3lWbRZ_lA6YKWBnJjPBowAAAF7I2zwRvBoC0-mkZRp7PP3zsI5OOO74KFnwNtsGCz4gWd5qNwCYMg5kewfTVOnJsZK1NoSBQYI3AnRbVvEo1XwlTZ6yAs1kZ8PJZWdp_qt4JMnYU1c6GtDZ8jlQF3DAe2JdW43EfKi50HL9AC3_qtRR5TLlhQEIl0yeV-vAZjW9ZQGCo0rwgmm6v8lM28hh4l_lfXf2DjQ_Qj04XUDryESfujev8VPhaK4ceTg3BEwgdDzK2CCEgZaGb1e6XdtABE5ARzQ1XP1cto9vIb7vgHXmg%3D%3D)
---
[**SECURE THE BORDER**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=cfa3e3544af84311afec3ea9dc17d785&_e=MgAR2UOmsJC0YlnGh6yAkII61PK1SZfuMzv8-SIx3YOne9QnBkPKejn1MnASb4aP8W3Qx8PbVYsUn_WccT79E1PC_dvZx5uu3CQw4M3lWbRZ_lA6YKWBnJjPBowAAAF7I2zwRvBoC0-mkZRp7PP3zsI5OOO74KFnwNtsGCz4gWd5qNwCYMg5kewfTVOnJsZK1NoSBQYI3AnRbVvEo1XwlTZ6yAs1kZ8PJZWdp_qt4JNPlOkwKurxqA2Mvqf0rdgRsnXNvScbuSUzludePOqXE44n3ZoQDjwlJ0Daxm_WjpfsLYumvlPsGvlxKiRYRdop7cwqIG41TeTFz4HeQqR-odDpQUXXN_KE6E7RsP4XpFklxRfbE4qa3y7R7jdC6B3rTxbKgvrvi3S9SrKxUMm_1g%3D%3D)
---
Peter, the answer to this problem is simple: build the wall and give border patrol the resources and manpower they need to keep Americans safe.

_But the problem is, the Democrats don’t even see the chaos at the border as a problem: they see it as an opportunity to get more Liberals into our country._

I will NEVER jeopardize our safety for political gains, and the Democrats MUST be held accountable.

[**Please, act NOW and help conservatives SECURE our border once and for all!**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=cfa3e3544af84311afec3ea9dc17d785&_e=MgAR2UOmsJC0YlnGh6yAkII61PK1SZfuMzv8-SIx3YOne9QnBkPKejn1MnASb4aP8W3Qx8PbVYsUn_WccT79E1PC_dvZx5uu3CQw4M3lWbRZ_lA6YKWBnJjPBowAAAF7I2zwRvBoC0-mkZRp7PP3zsI5OOO74KFnwNtsGCz4gWd5qNwCYMg5kewfTVOnJsZK1NoSBQYI3AnRbVvEo1XwlTZ6yAs1kZ8PJZWdp_qt4JMUhgo9Eas2ecHWaxyZkYaQBVwRroI0X81x5MDVZ7KHeq1lFXKOpm9naf7eCYS4AdYD7ZbQCbGwr9rYKq2t1jZ2eBH1LveIHlRe90QOOIXXPPasYZtbgOnWO1CWuO3xKS80C8QVrEM8stqFVMBc0uDER1SyIYp23tjUhvEFv7Qpsw%3D%3D)
---
[**SECURE THE BORDER**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=cfa3e3544af84311afec3ea9dc17d785&_e=MgAR2UOmsJC0YlnGh6yAkII61PK1SZfuMzv8-SIx3YOne9QnBkPKejn1MnASb4aP8W3Qx8PbVYsUn_WccT79E1PC_dvZx5uu3CQw4M3lWbRZ_lA6YKWBnJjPBowAAAF7I2zwRvBoC0-mkZRp7PP3zsI5OOO74KFnwNtsGCz4gWd5qNwCYMg5kewfTVOnJsZK1NoSBQYI3AnRbVvEo1XwlTZ6yAs1kZ8PJZWdp_qt4JNoFfMp4d2FCrw2N2Dkvy0r4V4JIIoQMlBKT3JFEXwdQu_S9-XnmYGW6j09fj2P997_S7fApj89YyU24whsAUrABIj54Gfa89_WbidIyaw0jx9sTbT9ZINyilQ1fdp7RxGXs9aVgWwFldeVycEok6LUsHfi4oSMLTgys7FECQ12tA%3D%3D)

name: Heather G. from VPP
subject: I'm gay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi friend — Here’s something you may not know about me: **I’m gay.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47324?t=6&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe) Pride Month is a time when we are supposed to be celebrating the countless qualities that make people beautifully different.

But this year, it’s tough to celebrate when extremist Republicans are doubling down on their hateful bills to target LGBTQ+ people like me.

They’re banning gender-affirming care for trans kids.

They’re targeting drag shows.

They’re silencing discussions about pronouns and LGBTQ+ history in schools.

They’re allowing religious entities to discriminate against LGBTQ+ people.

They’re forcing trans people to use bathrooms that don’t correspond to their gender identity...**and so much more.

**The recent uptick in anti-LGBTQ+ bills is not only heartbreaking; but also illustrates how long of a way we have to go to secure equal rights and protections for LGBTQ+ folks like me. And that starts with voting out every single homophobic, bigoted Republican at the ballot box.**

[The Voter Protection Project is dedicated to replacing these same Republicans with Democrats who are dedicated to guaranteeing equality for _all_ LGBTQ+ people. If you support our mission, will you chip in anything you can in honor of Pride Month to help us continue our work? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47324?t=7&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe)** | [CONTRIBUTE $7 NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47324?t=8&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe)
---
Here’s what Republicans don’t want you to know: **80% of Americans support anti-discriminatory laws that support LGBTQ+ people.**

_But they’ll suppress the right to vote to ensure they can stay in power so they can keep fueling their anti-LGBTQ+ agenda._

I’m fed up with watching folks in my community be targeted, silenced, and attacked for choosing to live as their authentic selves.

[If you are too, will contribute to the Voter Protection Project today? Every dollar donated to this email will go towards combating Republicans’ attacks on the ballot box while electing Democrats who will push for LGBTQ+ protections. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47324?t=9&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47326?t=10&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47327?t=11&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47328?t=12&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47329?t=13&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47324?t=14&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe)
Thanks and happy Pride Month!

—Heather G.
Executive Director
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8299%2E878179%2EoG8UZe).**

clean_body: | Hi friend — Here’s something you may not know about me: I’m gay. Pride Month is a time when we are supposed to be celebrating the countless qualities that make people beautifully different. But this year, it’s tough to celebrate when extremist Republicans are doubling down on their hateful bills to target LGBTQ+ people like me. They’re banning gender-affirming care for trans kids. They’re targeting drag shows. They’re silencing discussions about pronouns and LGBTQ+ history in schools. They’re allowing religious entities to discriminate against LGBTQ+ people. They’re forcing trans people to use bathrooms that don’t correspond to their gender identity...and so much more. The recent uptick in anti-LGBTQ+ bills is not only heartbreaking; but also illustrates how long of a way we have to go to secure equal rights and protections for LGBTQ+ folks like me. And that starts with voting out every single homophobic, bigoted Republican at the ballot box. | Here’s what Republicans don’t want you to know: 80% of Americans support anti-discriminatory laws that support LGBTQ+ people. But they’ll suppress the right to vote to ensure they can stay in power so they can keep fueling their anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. I’m fed up with watching folks in my community be targeted, silenced, and attacked for choosing to live as their authentic selves. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thanks and happy Pride Month! —Heather G. name: Team Schrier
subject: Cutting-edge medicine only helps people if they can afford it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This fight is personal for Kim [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64644403/410751438/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2I1Nzk1ZC1jOTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ie_o7TusGD0u58fZS4edki_W28Zm2H4GdShpgUQHjWw=&emci=ab104cd1-0507-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=33b5795d-c907-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Last year, Kim was proud to help pass the historic Inflation Reduction Act. This legislation includes provisions to reduce costs by letting Medicare negotiate lower drug prices.

**But now, big pharma is fighting back. Pharmaceutical giant Merck just announced it’s suing the federal government over the IRA’s Medicare-negotiation program:** Reducing the cost of prescription drugs is personal to Kim. As a person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim knows how crucial it is for people to afford the lifesaving drugs they need.

**Cutting-edge medicine only helps people if they can afford it.** Kim knows that no one should have to choose between putting food on the table and paying for the medication they need. That's why she's ready to keep fighting back against big pharma to lower the cost of prescription drugs.

clean_body: This fight is personal for Kim Peter, Last year, Kim was proud to help pass the historic Inflation Reduction Act. Pharmaceutical giant Merck just announced it’s suing the federal government over the IRA’s Medicare-negotiation program: Reducing the cost of prescription drugs is personal to Kim. Hey Peter, happy Saturday!

I wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m in this fight.

I’m not the kind of guy you’d expect to see in Congress. I still get $12 flattop haircuts. And at home on the farm, I butcher my own meat.

I didn’t come to Washington to play into partisan hogwash—I came because I didn’t see anyone in our government sticking up for rural communities like mine.

I’m running to continue to deliver for Montanans, from holding our government accountable to standing up for veterans and protecting the Montana way of life.

**But with Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers hellbent on taking back the Senate majority and targeting my seat to make their pipe dream a reality, I’ll need all the help I can get from my grassroots team.**

clean_body: | = (Me getting a fresh cut) Hey Peter, happy Saturday! I wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m in this fight. I’m not the kind of guy you’d expect to see in Congress. I still get $12 flattop haircuts. And at home on the farm, I butcher my own meat. I didn’t come to Washington to play into partisan hogwash—I came because I didn’t see anyone in our government sticking up for rural communities like mine. I’m running to continue to deliver for Montanans, from holding our government accountable to standing up for veterans and protecting the Montana way of life. But with Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers hellbent on taking back the Senate majority and targeting my seat to make their pipe dream a reality, I’ll need all the help I can get from my grassroots team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks for chipping in. I want to see your name go up on the walls of our home base, Peter. We are embarking on a mission to restore freedom, sovereignty, and sanity to our country, and I want you fighting alongside me. I'd like to see your name go down in history with mine, Peter. **Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7c4ec438909c4add93a8e8d693526604&_e=9h-h52I6j3xDW00IuKXXUq2NdNsGFokhqLPqj3D8nj2htgOHszSrwkQf2GFl3FRC24cWovrwmgkCtmSW6bDk4bBw4HOqJRJtYDJYGAm97HGnN7fJAOmtMmVjosH82MuHmdvDslrixgOU-tlG46M1EyhcAobpK8ACk4Uf85NRVkMNDeE1YKP3ZUKKq7FGoasYjeIeMFLOqqiwNQrviM2HQkDQlSxUyy67-ePAGMpdwVHwToZNmIE-SDCcUyd3IRvDqMHScz7QNBFFjR27Lto8Rf8wKwvYnnaeqL5NjbxENeEYJfKREkrvFRsxjz6nhxuOwZxEKR-Jaq7Jmk5MbIAp9wmdv4Jo-Bh7rBt0LaRsmlakxOY1pT2b259NYvWUKtQftrpR9lOXDO7Hp14hWzCEi0QljwINRbCv1laS4rCOikl3D9TluBSvUtMHN9dRFVqc)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

Peter,

The end of this month is a major deadline for our campaign. **It’s the next Federal Election Commission (FEC) public filing deadline of the year and we know Republicans will be waiting to see the fundraising numbers we report.**

At the end of the month, all of our fundraising progress will be made public and our numbers will immediately be searched for any signs of weakness. If Republicans think our campaign doesn’t have the grassroots strength to win, they’ll double down on their attacks and dark-money spending here in Rhode Island to try to flip this seat.

[We need to make it clear that our campaign has the strength to win and is ready for whatever baseless attacks the GOP throws at us. name: National Democratic Redistricting Committee
subject: Good news and bad news from A.G. Holder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, Attorney General Eric Holder had good news and bad news about our fight for fair maps and a strong democracy: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64645072/410755317/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230610_FR_6J_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5ZjMwNjdhLWNiMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7PicFBru5kXjccjyfAIa0eT7LJfIku70bhCrmnMIB_g=)
---
[Help defend democracy: Donate to the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64645074/410755318/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230610_FR_6J_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5ZjMwNjdhLWNiMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7PicFBru5kXjccjyfAIa0eT7LJfIku70bhCrmnMIB_g=)
---
Our movement for fair maps helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” And last November, we helped elect Democracy Defenders in key states across the country, and we helped defeat dangerous election deniers.

But now, Republicans are seeking to secure unearned power by:
* Manipulating maps and suppressing voting rights ahead of the 2024 election
* Attempting to stack state courts with judges who they believe will enable their anti-democratic schemes
* Asking courts to roll back decisions upholding fair maps and protecting voting rights
* Advancing a fringe legal theory that would give GOP legislatures unchecked power over federal elections
* ...and more

But we must remember that _we are not powerless_ against the GOP’s efforts to undermine our democracy. That’s why A.G. Holder also said **“We can and we are fighting back against cynical, partisan tactics like these. . . We need supporters like you to help us keep up the fight for fairness.”**

The NDRC counts on this grassroots team to power our democracy-saving work. We know not everyone can give every time we ask, but if even just one out of every four people reading this message pitches in, it will go a long way.

**Please, team: Will you be that one person?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Team, Attorney General Eric Holder had good news and bad news about our fight for fair maps and a strong democracy: | = = Our movement for fair maps helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” And last November, we helped elect Democracy Defenders in key states across the country, and we helped defeat dangerous election deniers. But now, Republicans are seeking to secure unearned power by: Manipulating maps and suppressing voting rights ahead of the 2024 election Attempting to stack state courts with judges who they believe will enable their anti-democratic schemes Asking courts to roll back decisions upholding fair maps and protecting voting rights Advancing a fringe legal theory that would give GOP legislatures unchecked power over federal elections ...and more But we must remember that we are not powerless against the GOP’s efforts to undermine our democracy. That’s why A.G. Holder also said “We can and we are fighting back against cynical, partisan tactics like these. . . We need supporters like you to help us keep up the fight for fairness.” The NDRC counts on this grassroots team to power our democracy-saving work. We know not everyone can give every time we ask, but if even just one out of every four people reading this message pitches in, it will go a long way. Please, team: Will you be that one person? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. As we head into the summer months, I wanted to check in with you directly.

**I’m in Congress to work for you – so understanding what matters most to you and delivering on your key issues will always be my number one priority.** And however you voted last November, I’m here to serve you and fight for the issues that matter most.

body:
The people of Colorado’s third congressional district deserve a representative who listens – but Lauren Boebert is too preoccupied fueling the angertainment industry and working for her corporate PAC donors to care or notice.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64645258/410756128/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjNmNWUzYi1jZTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bcwtuilnCTK7vpME5drHvcLYYEmmBWLUPTlejNEIGXo=&emci=55d305f2-cc07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b63f5e3b-ce07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64645259/410756129/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjNmNWUzYi1jZTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bcwtuilnCTK7vpME5drHvcLYYEmmBWLUPTlejNEIGXo=&emci=55d305f2-cc07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b63f5e3b-ce07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
When I was a member of our local city council, one of the top issues I focused on was creating more affordable housing.
It’s an issue that affects all kinds of people – from low-income families and single mothers to recent graduates and seniors living on fixed incomes.
During my campaign against Lauren Boebert last year, I drove over 24,000 miles across the district, meeting voters in small towns and cities. No matter where we went, people asked me about jobs, the water crisis here in Colorado, and protecting access to abortion – but also issues like affordable housing.
The people of Colorado’s third congressional district deserve a representative who _listens_ – but Lauren Boebert is too preoccupied fueling the angertainment industry and working for her corporate PAC donors to care or notice.
**It’s why I was able to come just 546 votes shy of defeating Boebert last year, and why the early polls show this race is going to be extremely tight once again.**
I’m ready to go to Washington and work every day on the issues that matter to voters, but Boebert’s Super PACs and her Washington allies are already attacking me.**If I’m going to be able to correct the lies and finally defeat Lauren Boebert, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – no amount is too small – so we can send Lauren Boebert packing in 2024? I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so every dollar you can give matters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64645260/410756130/1610638071?refcode=em20230610pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=b63f5e3b-ce07-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjNmNWUzYi1jZTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bcwtuilnCTK7vpME5drHvcLYYEmmBWLUPTlejNEIGXo=)

clean_body: The people of Colorado’s third congressional district deserve a representative who listens – but Lauren Boebert is too preoccupied fueling the angertainment industry and working for her corporate PAC donors to care or notice. Hello, When I was a member of our local city council, one of the top issues I focused on was creating more affordable housing. It’s an issue that affects all kinds of people – from low-income families and single mothers to recent graduates and seniors living on fixed incomes. During my campaign against Lauren Boebert last year, I drove over 24,000 miles across the district, meeting voters in small towns and cities. No matter where we went, people asked me about jobs, the water crisis here in Colorado, and protecting access to abortion – but also issues like affordable housing. The people of Colorado’s third congressional district deserve a representative who listens – but Lauren Boebert is too preoccupied fueling the angertainment industry and working for her corporate PAC donors to care or notice. It’s why I was able to come just 546 votes shy of defeating Boebert last year, and why the early polls show this race is going to be extremely tight once again. I’m ready to go to Washington and work every day on the issues that matter to voters, but Boebert’s Super PACs and her Washington allies are already attacking me.If I’m going to be able to correct the lies and finally defeat Lauren Boebert, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = My top priority in Congress will always be the everyday people who sent me there to work for them and represent them. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement to defeat Lauren Boebert. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. We’ve added LOTS of new names to Bob’s new map of Pennsylvania this week, with folks rushing to show their support. (_Picture to come soon!_)
**But we can’t slow down.** CNN named this seat one of the “Top 10 Most Likely to Flip” Senate seats, and national Republicans will spend millions to win here in Pennsylvania.
Adding names of online donors to our map isn’t just for fun — it’s a representation of how many people we have fighting alongside us to defend this seat.
**[The map is filling up quickly, Peter, so stake your spot by chipping in any amount now. We’re counting on your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230610-1?refcode=em20230610-1&refcode2=142_552475_BXSuwG&akid=142%2E552475%2EBXSuwG)**

Tiernan

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

Get informed on breaking news, politics, business, sports, world affairs, science, technology, and many other topics with a single email - a 5-minute read, once-a-day - delivered directly to your email inbox.

You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public.

name: Tina Smith
subject: We don’t need a rigged campaign finance system to represent real people in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Your support means everything |
#
$16.51, folks. That’s the average donation people like you made to our campaign last month. The truth is, it doesn’t take much to make an impact with our people-powered work when we can count on so many others like you to chip in. I love seeing so many people in Minnesota supporting our campaign, but with the Senate map looking the way it does now, I know that I’ve got to keep fighting for folks in Montana, Ohio, and Nevada, too. People across the country, in states both red and blue, are counting on us every day to deliver real results and tangible progress. And many of you are donating your hard-earned dollars to help me do it. I’m so grateful for every one of your donations, whether they’re just a buck or $25, because they’re proof that we don’t need a campaign finance system rigged by dark money Super PACs to represent real people in Washington. That’s what I’m fighting for in the Senate, and why we need to protect our Democratic majority. I can’t win this fight with Mitch McConnell taking charge and blocking our priorities. **So folks, that’s why I’m humbly asking you to pitch in $16.51 or any amount that works for you to my campaign today. It doesn’t have to be much, but if we do it together, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64645589/410757487/1268205826?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20230610_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2Q1M2JlNS1kMTA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ud4boIhjE8pEJWNXGSETuTo6BviUrHHys7CT_0rWuGU=)

clean_body: Your support means everything | $16.51, folks. That’s the average donation people like you made to our campaign last month. The truth is, it doesn’t take much to make an impact with our people-powered work when we can count on so many others like you to chip in. I love seeing so many people in Minnesota supporting our campaign, but with the Senate map looking the way it does now, I know that I’ve got to keep fighting for folks in Montana, Ohio, and Nevada, too. People across the country, in states both red and blue, are counting on us every day to deliver real results and tangible progress. And many of you are donating your hard-earned dollars to help me do it. I’m so grateful for every one of your donations, whether they’re just a buck or $25, because they’re proof that we don’t need a campaign finance system rigged by dark money Super PACs to represent real people in Washington. That’s what I’m fighting for in the Senate, and why we need to protect our Democratic majority. I can’t win this fight with Mitch McConnell taking charge and blocking our priorities. So folks, that’s why I’m humbly asking you to pitch in $16.51 or any amount that works for you to my campaign today. It doesn’t have to be much, but if we do it together, there’s nothing we can’t achieve. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you from the bottom of my heart for your continued support. Warmly, Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ohio Republicans can't accept that a ballot measure in November on abortion rights will pass, as they have in deep red states like Kentucky & Kansas. They’re trying to cheat, because these extremists are in the minority on every issue, and it’s the only way can win.
body:
Republican power grab in Ohio
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1248719e-dde5-465e-9708-e12e317a8ecb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We Must Stop Them From Endangering Millions Of Women.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88787ef9-7619-4879-81a3-ae3994fce42e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The "them," is Ohio Republicans, who can't accept that a ballot measure in November on abortion rights will pass as they have in deep red states like Kentucky & Kansas. So they're trying to cheat, because these extremists are in the minority on every issue. It is the only way can win, and they know it._ **So GOP state legislators passed legislation creating a special August election--wasting millions in taxpayer dollars--try to fix the vote by changing necessary support for an amendment in Ohio from 50% to 60%**_._ **_We must get the word out to Ohioans now to turn out in August to vote against this ridiculous power grab that seeks to force the religious zealotry of a small minority of fanatics on all of us._** _Ohioans for Reproductive Choice is educating voters about the GOP's treachery. Per their recent email:_ ...Together we will defeat this extreme measure on August 8, then secure abortion rights on the November ballot. The next several months are make-or-break for the future of our great state. [**_So will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ohioans for Reproductive Justice, to stop right-wing extremists from benefiting from their cheating to ban abortion rights in Ohio?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T67c4900e-d6bb-445e-9ea8-8eddb9346a69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for decency and humanity wherever it's needed._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49559057-f8e2-407a-ab60-795c67984c3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---

| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/ohioansforreproductivefreedom2-june10-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac84d1e6-4f09-496b-bc90-43c59c512a54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kash Patel
subject: Subpoena list for Congress to expose the Deep State
body:
_Friend, Congress must subpoena these people and documents if they are to expose the weaponization of government. It 's the only way to save our Republic and defend the rule of law in our country. Please read carefully._

[](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd)

Hello Friend,

The deep state has entrenched itself in every major federal institution. I call them government gangsters because they use their power as leverage against Americans to unlawfully influence elections.

If Congress is serious about tackling the weaponization of government, then here is the subpoena list I recommend.

_You may ask yourself, "What credibility does this guy have?!"_

Good question.

I served on the Russiagate committee in Congress. When Devin Nunes asked me to lead the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad, had to be published.

My investigation discovered it was a fraud, and the FBI's investigation was unlawful. They did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump and thought they would never get caught.

And only after leaving government service 2 years ago, I discovered the FBI was spying on me while I served as Senior Counsel on the committee for Devin Nunes. Yes, they subpoenaed my records to get dirt on Devin Nunes because our investigation was exposing FBI/DOJ corruption.

**After my service with President Trump, I founded the Kash Foundation.** The Kash Foundation's goal is to provide financial assistance to veterans, America-first patriots, and whistle-blowers and fund education programs. As you may know, the Russiagate tactic of the radical left is to baselessly prosecute patriots.

**I am urgently asking for your help. I am looking to raise $100,000 online this month to secure critical funding for Kash Foundation.**
[Can you please donate $250, $50, $35, or even $10 today? Click here to donate >>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd)

[Donate >>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd)

Congressional Subpoena List
1. **Twitter:** Every contract with FBI/DOJ on election projects (the FBI established an 80-agent task force that met with Twitter weekly before the 2022 election).

2. **FBI and Chris Wray:** He has willingly violated a congressional subpoena and must be brought up on contempt of Congress charges.

3. **James Baker:** Former FBI number 1 lawyer who signed off on the unlawful Trump FISA, once caught and fired. Number 2 lawyer at Twitter.

4. **ALL 51 Intel officials who signed bogus Hunter Biden** laptop letter

5. **Blinken:** He has now lied about his involvement in said letter and must be held to account. Lying to Congress is a federal crime.

6. **Garland:** IRS whistleblower has submitted a valid claim that the Hunter Biden investigation is being politically obstructed. Garland testified under oath that has not happened. Someone's lying.

This is exactly who Congress needs to go after. And guess what? This is only a start!

If you are as concerned about deep state interference, if it is a top priority for you, then please I urge you to support the Kash Foundation.

[I'm counting on you to sustain the Kash Foundation's fight against the deep state. Please consider donating $250, $50, or even just $10 to help defeat the deep state and expose the government gangsters running the show. Click here >>>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd)
[Donate $10 >>>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd&amount=10)
[Donate $35 >>>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd&amount=35)
[Donate $50 >>>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd&amount=50)
[Donate $100 >>>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd&amount=100)
[Donate $250 >>>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd&amount=250)
[Donate $500 >>>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd&amount=500)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd&amount=1000)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://the-kash-foundation.revv.co/om-donate?utm_term=ftd)
A critical way to uncover the government gangsters is if brave whistleblowers come forward with the TRUTH.

But they can't do so without help. That's why the Kash Foundation protects patriots from deep-state tyranny. But I can't do it alone. Your support is critical to our mission.

Thank you,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

108 S Washington St. Suite 300 Alexandria, VA 22314**

name: Sherrod
subject: what I stand for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
I want to make sure you know exactly who I am and what I stand for.
| | |
---
Friend, as our race in Ohio heats up, I want to make sure you know exactly who I am and what I stand for.
I've spent my life fighting for workers and families. That means advocating for raising the federal minimum wage, for stronger labor unions, for protecting the retirement benefits that folks have earned, and more.
I've stood up to big banks and corporate special interests who pad their pockets at the expense of families, because taxpayers shouldn’t be on the hook for Wall Street's risky bets.

I've fought for voting rights, which are under attack. When I served as Ohio Secretary of State, _The Washington Post_ called my voter registration efforts "the most intensive and wide-ranging in the nation."
**I want what most Americans want: to ensure our nation delivers on its promises. That's why I'm fighting for a country where hard work is rewarded and where _all people _are given the opportunity to live their version of the American dream.**
But right now, I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, and _Politico_ __ says Ohio could decide Senate control. I simply cannot defend my seat and keep up this critical fight without your grassroots support. **Unlike my potential GOP opponents, I don't have my own multimillion-dollar fortune to pour into this race – so I'm counting on folks like you, friend: **
**[Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to help me win in Ohio, keep the Senate blue, and continue delivering for working families across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64645778/410758389/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk253-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWI4OTIyNS1kMzA3LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HTtu2TMN-AV9NkfHbHTMy6tE-psdfht-LLt-bP6X3NM=)**

clean_body: I want to make sure you know exactly who I am and what I stand for. | | | Friend, as our race in Ohio heats up, I want to make sure you know exactly who I am and what I stand for. I've spent my life fighting for workers and families. That means advocating for raising the federal minimum wage, for stronger labor unions, for protecting the retirement benefits that folks have earned, and more. I've stood up to big banks and corporate special interests who pad their pockets at the expense of families, because taxpayers shouldn’t be on the hook for Wall Street's risky bets. I've fought for voting rights, which are under attack. When I served as Ohio Secretary of State, The Washington Post called my voter registration efforts "the most intensive and wide-ranging in the nation." I want what most Americans want: to ensure our nation delivers on its promises. That's why I'm fighting for a country where hard work is rewarded and where all people are given the opportunity to live their version of the American dream. But right now, I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, and Politico says Ohio could decide Senate control. I simply cannot defend my seat and keep up this critical fight without your grassroots support. Unlike my potential GOP opponents, I don't have my own multimillion-dollar fortune to pour into this race – so I'm counting on folks like you, friend: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = It's an honor to serve. I'm humbled to have your support. With gratitude, Sherrod Brown = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is a big one.
#
HeyDerek, we want to check in with you really quick about how things are going during John’s first year as a U.S. Senator.
You see, in less than three weeks, we’re coming up against a major FEC deadline. These only happen four times a year.
**After June 30, John is required by law to report how much money we raised this quarter.** It’s absolutely critical that we raise a LOT of money in the coming days to show our grassroots strength, support John’s work in the Senate, help campaign for vulnerable Democratic colleagues in the midterms, and more.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230610-1?refcode=em20230610-1-8405&refcode2=8405_434096_5tw9B2&akid=8405%2E434096%2E5tw9B2)
Everyone — from the news media to the Republican establishment — will look at our campaign’s quarterly fundraising report to judge John’s grassroots support + staying power as a Senator.
It’s also summer, though, which means we anticipate our fundraising slowing down, TBH.
So...if we’re going to report a quarterly fundraising total that shows everyone that our powerful grassroots team isn’t going ANYWHERE, we need your help:
**[Please help us get a critical head start on our June 30 end-of-quarter deadline by chipping in $5 right now. Meeting this goal is critical and we can’t do it without you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230610-1?refcode=em20230610-1-8405&refcode2=8405_434096_5tw9B2&akid=8405%2E434096%2E5tw9B2)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230610-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230610-8405&refcode2=8405_434096_5tw9B2&akid=8405%2E434096%2E5tw9B2)**
What we raise today will make a really big difference to our EOQ total, and we really can’t afford to fall short right. Anything you can chip in today, even a few bucks, means a lot to John and our whole team.
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230610-8405-footer&t=1&refcode2=8405_434096_5tw9B2&akid=8405%2E434096%2E5tw9B2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8405%2E434096%2E5tw9B2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8405%2E434096%2E5tw9B2)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64646075/410760132/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNmEyODI1LWRhMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=amemSjW9nHE5FHCTO1frj7CjqIHtjcxT_bkaITQhZgw=)
**Peter: It's 2023, and we still haven't had a woman president. But GOP extremists like Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and Mike Pence are running without consequences for their actions. What gives?**
Could it be that far-right Republicans are more _rational_ than grassroots Democratic women? Could it be that American voters just aren’t _ready_ to see bold, compassionate, and qualified women in power? Could it be that Democratic women just don’t _belong_ in politics?
**No. No. And NO.**
[**Emerge is working nonstop to help Democratic women run for office and win, and we can elect the FIRST woman U.S. President in our lifetime. Can we count on you to give $5 or more now to support our crucial work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64646077/410760146/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNmEyODI1LWRhMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=amemSjW9nHE5FHCTO1frj7CjqIHtjcxT_bkaITQhZgw=)
| | [DONATE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64646081/410760180/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNmEyODI1LWRhMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=amemSjW9nHE5FHCTO1frj7CjqIHtjcxT_bkaITQhZgw=)
---
**While Trump and other GOP radicals are using their power to distract us, divide us, and scapegoat our most vulnerable neighbors, Democratic women are ****fighting to strengthen our democracy and put people first. **
We’ve seen bold Democratic women run historic campaigns to break glass ceilings in politics and inspire millions to demand real, equitable, and meaningful representation for all. **But we’ve also seen the massive obstacles they face including vicious smear campaigns, junk polls, and outdated assumptions.**
That's what Emerge is here to fix. The first woman president _is_ out there, Peter, and we MUST ensure she's empowered to run for office. **Emerge is recruiting and training Democratic women to succeed on the campaign trail and beyond at every level of government, so we can pack the political pipeline and support bold, trailblazing women as they rise to higher office.**
With the direction of our country and democracy at stake, we need to hear women’s voices more than ever. That’s why Emerge is 100 percent dedicated to powering a women-led transformation in politics. **But we can’t do it without you. [So please, before midnight tonight: Will you donate $5 or more now to help Emerge recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women up and down the ballot in every state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64646089/410760189/-1657939538?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1225-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNmEyODI1LWRhMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=amemSjW9nHE5FHCTO1frj7CjqIHtjcxT_bkaITQhZgw=)**
Thank you for being part of this movement.

– Team Emerge

Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Hello,

**I am officially running again against Lauren Boebert!**

In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the __entire__ country. Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:

[**Please, will you make a donation now – split between my campaign and American Bridge PAC – and become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64646341/410761004/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2689-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MWMwN2QzLWRhMDctZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3PdVgh6ucC9zt0i-tq5IE95G4nyRJMgnOvo09JFsC_w=)

But we proved them all wrong.

With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. **I’m counting on you to be able to correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.**

clean_body: | We're making incredible strides in our race to defeat Ted Cruz, and now, Peter, I am personally asking for your support to help us keep up this incredible momentum. = | = Since we launched this campaign one month ago, the Cook Political Report and Roll Call both upgraded our chances of winning. FiveThirtyEight now says Texas could be Democrats' best chance to flip a red seat blue. And a brand new poll shows us just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, with 14% of voters undecided. This is a testament to the powerful grassroots movement we're building, Peter, and I'm so thrilled that you're a part of it. But the more national attention this race gets, the more wealthy Republicans will be lining up to fill Ted Cruz's war chest.I'm counting on your immediate support to help me keep up our momentum from now until Election Day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much, Colin | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 Please, consider making a =. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b7d54e617503445ab678a3f65d34484d&_e=uZeFPpv1oW17z_DQra2XgSuJ-H0-8PyfORCzFnmAn3jQ5QZk-1bw5_hWqeFhs8FEjTeAGbqEs0nmdpFjv8J4wcAaMRJ1kfAoCEe0nfcz8WQaFODa2XNOiO3BdJekds4QNhmbiYI_tU77qcObnZT-hBx4a69dT2WT5Djx7Eg0xQuW955j6Cu9zbVfNCsT_x7vmOdN7m2eEikRs4S63lrUEhHGaGTiy9ZAyYE1cnzg6qXq7uGFB_LG8iHYTp0ug8Tq2AyqlCkEWVqnI_6GSkyTkcM_mK6_0P_C45geIRTUlGd7qBw9eYX22JidnTx__AaZNAZ5ivgP7-AC4Jz9hRqE4BEq4HywuZ8R0PsKuyVOKMsz03l5k92oNl138tuw4IcUDFv3efw-QBgSE6-jKYwpjd6QZrNV__leP8PjNaScgIE%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b7d54e617503445ab678a3f65d34484d&_e=uZeFPpv1oW17z_DQra2XgSuJ-H0-8PyfORCzFnmAn3jQ5QZk-1bw5_hWqeFhs8FEjTeAGbqEs0nmdpFjv8J4wcAaMRJ1kfAoCEe0nfcz8WQaFODa2XNOiO3BdJekds4QNhmbiYI_tU77qcObnZT-hBx4a69dT2WT5Djx7Eg0xQuW955j6Cu9zbVfNCsT_x7vmOdN7m2eEikRs4S63lrUEhHGaGTiy9ZAyYE1cnzg6qXq7uGFB_LG8iHYTp0ug8Tq2AyqlCkEWVqnI_6GSkyTkQm_YZfQu1oGZ0zyOdnkppuymbXX3iEVSR_y8Y0k010XZHxeAokaRYbb9ysHoLUoI53EfQi0cD2xqkFQ3T_AVBaTB_yvdOGdYPJsc43ajNh6XMDoaAgDZJHZUXhsGID73fJbIA1sMeVpj9o-yAe4bI0%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b7d54e617503445ab678a3f65d34484d&_e=uZeFPpv1oW17z_DQra2XgSuJ-H0-8PyfORCzFnmAn3jQ5QZk-1bw5_hWqeFhs8FEjTeAGbqEs0nmdpFjv8J4wcAaMRJ1kfAoCEe0nfcz8WQaFODa2XNOiO3BdJekds4QNhmbiYI_tU77qcObnZT-hBx4a69dT2WT5Djx7Eg0xQuW955j6Cu9zbVfNCsT_x7vmOdN7m2eEikRs4S63lrUEhHGaGTiy9ZAyYE1cnzg6qXq7uGFB_LG8iHYTp0ug8Tq2AyqlCkEWVqnI_6GSkyTkYee_bxXChGCbhjIVTLSPpPNAyj9UtZzsJoSK0tI_gpGFW3lgt1s_eDTgidvg8yZZGr2meGtLGRwYNyhOqdE2b9FYYY_97-X1Ga5_QIrZmV6ouVN1lZq9CGIJJr0VBYsqw4-v-fRpZswNiJSuEqJgNY%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

subject: I have only one question

body:
Just ask yourself this...
| | | [ ](https://email.info.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGu2ywQhZ8G72yZgYBZeJH7oyz-qFfqqlU3EWZwMilgy8aN8vaVo9xuWHznCJ1P49IcaXz2TH8wgBvhygCYODKAs_z4-anOP862_t3G_2urDvKxp_AfAyjPOfyrvn9pQnIUd6pthb0aJNdYhZ6rTknRCTDVrXdacc8x6IMY3WDA8U6rzkArDXcHoyrqoQXRKr6_B5CN62TH5aAG7NDrgTPZUh6nBqfsIt7LsqW58VOqYn8rZV5fm04MTmvw2xKaB-Ul4N7YmfsTapfCQt7V94lyqcct4-JopXyt_ZQSlRICg1P2EVAZRNWN0rUeBsXEaSvpkgLSlpiwb2G1w3XaFh-YsJ4u7s28S7Oja2bCfkl9JVMuIRcmrAGjGahLjoRMWPz069kVvxxf8HUSYaX5dffH57fv1dLj_KAYaVWayfa6L9jd_gYAAP__HvaNjA)

Friend,
You only have to ask one question...
_**Why is it ONLY our movement that is targeted, persecuted, and dragged through witch hunt after witch hunt?**_
It’s very simple, this is **ELECTION INTERFERENCE** of the highest order.
The Deep State happily turns a blind eye to Crooked Joe Biden – the most corrupt politician in HISTORY – all while they spin up one hoax after another to try and “get Trump” and destroy our campaign that puts YOU first.
_It’s never been about justice to them, it’s about concocting a Soviet-style plot to try and force us out of the 2024 election._
They think that if they bury me in enough lies, smears, and**INDICTMENTS** , then I’ll throw up my hands and give up on our beautiful movement.
_**They are sorely mistaken.**_
I will **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to the radical Left!
The Democrats and the Deep State seem to think that with each passing witch hunt they are chipping away at our resolve, breaking down our spirit...
**Friend, my resolve to SAVE our country has _never_ been stronger!**
And it’s all because of YOU.
_You are my courage, my strength, and my hope that we can and we WILL save America in the face of this Third World tyranny._
Together, we are taking a stand for TRUE justice.
**[During this dark chapter for our nation, please consider making a contribution of any amount – _truly, even just $1_ – to stand with me and your fellow patriots who have declared, “I WILL NEVER SURRENDER” our country to the Left’s tyranny.](https://email.info.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kTGv2yAUhX8N3mzBhQAePLxXlFaNWqldWnWJMBc75AG2bNwo_75ylHRh-M4ROp-uTXMMw70j6p0AXAKuBIDwNwJwEu-_v8vTr5OpP2j8Wht5ELc9hU8EoNxn_7_6_KXxyYa4U2Uq7GQvmMLKd0xqKbjm0FaXjlNmBaJG1LplUitGB2vtwQM9KOaGKnRAgVPJ9vcAorFaaCZ62aNGp3pGBA15mBqcso14LcuW5sZNqYrdpZR5fWw6Ejiu3m2Lb24hLx73xs7sX1_b5JfgbH2dQi71sGVcbFhDHms3pRRK8Z7AMbsIKFtEqQdhqYNeEn7cSjonj2FLhJunsNzhOm2L84QbF872yZxNsw1jJty8pF7JlIvPhXDTQqsIyHOOAQk3H9x8Vv3P8Yt_wMdJuBHtn6t7u3_7US0dzrcQY1ilIoKO-4Ld7V8AAAD__5q2jXY)**

subject: MIGOP PRESS RELEASE 6.10.2023
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9502a11153f6/migop-press-release-6102023?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **The Michigan Republican Party Protects the Voice of Michigan Republican Voters** Grand Rapids, MI – June 10th, 2023 – In a move that threatens electoral representation and undermines the voices of Republican voters in Michigan, the Michigan’s Democrat controlled legislature advanced the Michigan presidential primary to February 27th. This would automatically cause an RNC penalty reducing Michigan Republican delegates at the RNC convention in Milwaukee from 55 to 12!

This resolution complies with RNC rules and avoids the penalty.

The Democrats thought they held the keys to whether Michigan Republicans have a voice regarding who is our nominee for president.

They set the stage to make our process dependent upon when the Democrats end the Michigan’s legislative session. Today that control was destroyed.

The Michigan Republican Party would have been derelict in duty, and grossly irresponsible to leave the decision of full delegate representation of Michigan Republicans in the hands of the Democrats.

Republican voters are tired of the party seeking to cut deals with Democrats instead of protecting the voice and interest of Republican voters.

This drastic reduction in representation at the Republican National Convention would have marginalized millions of voters and stifled our ability to have a meaningful say in the selection of the 2024 Republican presidential nominee. The Resolution of Intent passed by the Michigan Republican Party State Committee protects the voice of millions of Republican voters across Michigan by ensuring the will of those voting in the primary will be heard.

This resolution simultaneously prevents the RNC penalty.

Recognizing the urgency and gravity of this situation, the Michigan Republican Party State Committee took decisive action today. The Michigan Republican Party has taken a crucial step towards ensuring fair representation for their constituents.

"The Michigan Republican Party stands firmly against any attempts to diminish representation of Michigan Republicans," said Kristina Karamo, Chair of the Michigan Republican Party.

"We are committed to preserving the integrity of the electoral process and guaranteeing that all Michigan voters, regardless of their political affiliation, have an equal opportunity to participate in the primary process."

For those in the party who do not trust the election system run by the Secretary of State due to election integrity concerns, they now have a representative voice for some of the delegates from Michigan.

By asserting their commitment to protecting the rights of Republican voters in the state, the Michigan Republican Party has demonstrated their dedication to preserving a fair and inclusive electoral system.

The Michigan Republican Party encourages all Michigan voters to stay informed and engaged in the political process. By participating in the upcoming primary elections, voters can make their voices heard and contribute to shaping the future of our great state.

###

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Raising the minimum wage. Expanding health care. Legalizing weed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Since 2018, Missourians have approved all these initiatives at the ballot box. But guess whose side Hawley has been on...
#
Peter,
Our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce and replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate isn’t just about making a point — **this is a race we can win.**
Working people in Missouri have spent the last three election cycles taking back their power at the ballot box because they’re tired of corrupt politicians getting in the way. But just guess whose side Hawley has been on...
**2018** — Missourians voted to raise the minimum wage from $7.85 to $12 per hour.
**2020** — Missourians voted to expand Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act.
**2022** — Missourians voted to legalize recreational weed.
**And in 2024, they’re going to vote Josh Hawley out of the U.S. Senate.**
**[CHIP IN TO DEFEAT HAWLEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34023?refcode=em20230610-3244&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3244%2E614464%2E7vje6S)**
While Josh Hawley pretends to fight for everyday people, he’s stood against them on raising wages, expanding healthcare, and legalizing weed. And in Washington, he raised his fist because he thought it’d help him get power — then ran for his life at the first sign of trouble.
Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator whose mission is to stand up and fight for them – not a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley. **And Lucas is ready to serve.**
**[Help us replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate by adding your first donation of $10 or more to our grassroots campaign today. clean_body: Since 2018, Missourians have approved all these initiatives at the ballot box. But guess whose side Hawley has been on... Peter, Our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce and replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate isn’t just about making a point — this is a race we can win. Working people in Missouri have spent the last three election cycles taking back their power at the ballot box because they’re tired of corrupt politicians getting in the way. But just guess whose side Hawley has been on... 2018 — Missourians voted to raise the minimum wage from $7.85 to $12 per hour. 2020 — Missourians voted to expand Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act. 2022 — Missourians voted to legalize recreational weed. And in 2024, they’re going to vote Josh Hawley out of the U.S. Senate. While Josh Hawley pretends to fight for everyday people, he’s stood against them on raising wages, expanding healthcare, and legalizing weed. And in Washington, he raised his fist because he thought it’d help him get power — then ran for his life at the first sign of trouble. Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator whose mission is to stand up and fight for them – not a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley. And Lucas is ready to serve.
